name: Jon Ossoff for Georgia
subject: Absolutely pummeled.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Off the Sidelines PAC
body:
|
Friends, As you read this, Jon Ossoff is getting absolutely pummeled by attack ads in Georgia. Republicans have spent more than _$10 million_ on TV and online already. It’s ridiculous. Why so much money, this far from Election Day? Because Jon Ossoff is the only Democratic Senator running for reelection in a state won by Trump. _That_ is why Republicans are hitting him so hard, so early in the campaign. _And it’s why we’re coming to you with this request to help fight back._ If Jon is going to defend this seat, we _really_ need to keep hitting our fundraising goals, and donations to emails like this are a huge part of how it happens. **[_Can Jon Ossoff count on you to split $10, $50 or whatever you can afford to help him lay the foundation for a winning Senate reelection campaign here in Georgia? Your donation will be split between his reelection campaign and Off the Sidelines._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120239881/585669463/-116537968?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.11.29_OTS-Jon-Ossoff_B2_F1_S1_C1_90AC-NC_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOWVmMDk4OS03ZmNkLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=41n6Tkoi06oyOr84olOfmdJdJGqfiuqFbSs7cIXRsBM=)** | | [ DONATE NOW >> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120239885/585669470/-116537968?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.11.29_OTS-Jon-Ossoff_B2_F1_S1_C1_90AC-NC_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOWVmMDk4OS03ZmNkLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=41n6Tkoi06oyOr84olOfmdJdJGqfiuqFbSs7cIXRsBM=)

We wish we didn’t have to ask at all, but _Citizens United_ opened the dam for limitless dark money to flood into our elections.
_That’s a big part of why Congress is broken and corrupted. It’s why we have really expensive elections._
And also it’s why campaigns like ours have to build serious grassroots fundraising operations _from the very start._
Because if we don’t, we run the risk of our message getting drowned out by a flood of Super PAC spending.
So here’s the truth:
**Jon needs our help _today_.**
_He is literally MAGA’s #1 target._
They will spare no expense and try every dirty trick in the book.
So yes, this election will be tough.
But this team knows how to win tough fights. We’ve done it before.
Let’s do it again.
**[_Please, use this link to support Jon’s reelection campaign and Off the Sidelines. Every donation counts. Every donation sends a powerful message to MAGA that we’re ready to fight and win._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120239888/585669474/-116537968?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.11.29_OTS-Jon-Ossoff_B2_F1_S1_C1_90AC-NC_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOWVmMDk4OS03ZmNkLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=41n6Tkoi06oyOr84olOfmdJdJGqfiuqFbSs7cIXRsBM=)**

name: James Carville
subject: Don't you dare go to sleep on me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Governor
body:
Losing Colorado to the GOP would be downright EMBARRASSING 🤦🏼♂️
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120240553/585673566/851209409?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk996-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTViNWYzYS04MGNkLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MpQehk4fU4IYF8veUjptrVjSQY8_EpwHH-oUrrqh5P0=)
Now looky here, y’all –
If I've learned anything over my more than half-century in Democratic politics, it's that we cannot afford to take any state for granted. Especially not the ones we think are "safe."
That's why if you've been sleeping on Michael Bennet's campaign for governor out in Colorado, I'm going to need you to _WAKE THE HELL UP –_**because we're only 1 day away from his end-of-month goal, and he's on track to fall short.**
**_[So before I go on, I need every member of this grassroots team to get serious and rush $5 or more to his campaign before midnight tonight.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120240556/585673578/851209409?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk996-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTViNWYzYS04MGNkLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MpQehk4fU4IYF8veUjptrVjSQY8_EpwHH-oUrrqh5P0=)_**
| | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120240558/585673583/851209409?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk996-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTViNWYzYS04MGNkLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MpQehk4fU4IYF8veUjptrVjSQY8_EpwHH-oUrrqh5P0=)
---
Now you'll have to pardon my French, but I'm scared sh*tless Democrats just don't get how bad we need to gin up grassroots resources to fight in Colorado.
'Cause right now, big-time Republicans like Trump and Lauren Boebert are already putting their thumbs on the scales of this race.
And even though you and I know they're _really_ the ones to blame for housing and health care soaring out of reach for regular folks, mark my words:

**They'll do anything, say anything and _spend anything_ if it makes voters blame Democrats like Michael for the outcomes of their bat-sh*t policies.**
I know Michael Bennet is the right person for the job. That’s why I was proud to endorse him for president in 2020. But without the funds to reach _every single voter_ , from the Denver suburbs to the most remote mountain communities, the GOP _will_ beat us to the punch. They _will_ flood the airwaves with millions in attack ads to ensure this movement sinks. And we _will NOT_ have the resources to fight back.
**_[If you want to stop that from happening, then _PLEASE, _yall, before midnight, donate $5, $25, or anything you can – _toot sweet – _to ensure Michael reaches his $550,000 goal tonight and has the grassroots support to win this thing.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120240560/585673585/851209409?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk996-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTViNWYzYS04MGNkLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MpQehk4fU4IYF8veUjptrVjSQY8_EpwHH-oUrrqh5P0=)_**

name: The Antimonopolist
subject: Letting Facebook off the hook (and Google too)
body:
Hi, this is Tim Wu, taking over for Zephyr with a note on the Facebook case that was dismissed last week. If we are not acquainted, I am a professor at Columbia University and the author of a number of books related to tech and antimonopoly, including The Curse of Bigness. My new book, released just a few weeks ago, is The Age of Extraction, which tells the story of the last 25 years of tech platform power and what needs to be done. You can get it here * Last week, as you may have read, a fed

| | | | [](https://the-antimonopolist.ghost.io/r/175f703e?m=46b412a0-1cbe-4fcb-b85d-2477ce9f4e21)
---
[The Antimonopolist](https://the-antimonopolist.ghost.io/r/9428ad6f?m=46b412a0-1cbe-4fcb-b85d-2477ce9f4e21)
| [Letting Facebook off the hook (and Google too)](https://the-antimonopolist.ghost.io/r/28514c36?m=46b412a0-1cbe-4fcb-b85d-2477ce9f4e21)
---
| By Tim Wu • 29 Nov 2025 | [View in browser](https://the-antimonopolist.ghost.io/r/c9e0fa50?m=46b412a0-1cbe-4fcb-b85d-2477ce9f4e21)
---|---
[View in browser](https://the-antimonopolist.ghost.io/r/d1ee2008?m=46b412a0-1cbe-4fcb-b85d-2477ce9f4e21)
Mark Zuckerberg and Donald Trump at the White House. Breaking the law has been a winning strategy for Facebook.
| | | Hi, this is Tim Wu, taking over for Zephyr with a note on the Facebook case that was dismissed last week. If we are not acquainted, I am a professor at Columbia University and the author of a number of books related to tech and antimonopoly, including _The Curse of Bigness_. My new book, released just a few weeks ago, is [ _The Age of Extraction_ , ](https://the-antimonopolist.ghost.io/r/3fc80c26?m=46b412a0-1cbe-4fcb-b85d-2477ce9f4e21)which tells the story of the last 25 years of tech platform power and what needs to be done. You can get it [here](https://the-antimonopolist.ghost.io/r/7f2976e6?m=46b412a0-1cbe-4fcb-b85d-2477ce9f4e21)*Last week, as you may have read, a federal district court dismissed the U.S. government's main anti-monopoly case against Facebook -- or Meta, as it calls itself (I'll use Facebook in this post). The court did so despite strong and direct evidence of monopoly power and wrongful conduct that no one could deny -- yet Facebook still managed to get off the hook. The result is that, despite a decade of scandals, whistleblowers, and direct evidence of illegal behavior, no public authority in this country has been able to meaningfully hold Facebook accountable for anything.Breaking the law has been a winning strategy for Facebook, and the judge's ruling fortifies the impression that the world's wealthiest corporations are above the law. It is hard to imagine a worse message for the judiciary to send right now.The Facebook antitrust case was filed in 2020. The FTC accused the firm of maintaining its monopoly by buying rivals Instagram and WhatsApp in 2012 and 2014 (it also bought other threats). Mark Zuckerberg, in a series of emails later made public, made it clear that he bought the firms to eliminate them as a threat. The antitrust laws may be vague about some things, but buying your most dangerous rivals is supposed to be clearly illegal.In 2012 and 2014, the FTC, deep in the depths of the antitrust winter, did nothing. Among other things, the agency managed to convince itself that Instagram and Facebook weren't actually competitors, based on the premise that Instagram was a mobile app and Facebook was mostly (at the time) a desktop app. It takes a lot of education to reach conclusions like this that the average high schooler would find absurd, and by such fine-grained distinctions does the law lose its power.Under new management and some eight years later, the FTC sued Facebook for monopolization -- perhaps seeking, in some way, to correct its mistake. The core of the government's theory was this: Facebook held a monopoly in personal social networking -- sharing with "friends and family." It continued to hold onto that monopoly to the present day, as demonstrated by its outlandish and durable profits ($87.1 billion in operating profit on $164.5 billion in revenue in 2024, for example). And in 2012 and 2014 it wrongly and intentionally maintained that monopoly with its purchases.The judge nonetheless let Facebook off the hook by finding it wasn't a monopoly now (whether it had one in 2012 and 2014 was not discussed, due to a quirk in the law). He then asserted that the development and growth of an adjacent market for short videos such as TikTok and YouTube Shorts since that time shows that Meta does not possess monopoly power. But every firm has its core customers and those who leave for something new: the key question is whether it retains power over its base. Those profits answered the question directly. The judge was forced to twist himself in knots and ignore undergraduate-level economics to give Meta yet another break.But to dwell on the shortcomings of the judge's reasoning is to overlook something worse: the message that his ruling sends to the country. Among the chief goals of antimonopoly laws like the Sherman Antitrust Act of 1890 -- the statute that the government accused Meta of violating -- was to make clear who is actually in charge of this country.As one of the original anti-monopolists, President Theodore Roosevelt explained in 1901, the antitrust laws are about who is actually in charge of this country. As he put it, the "vital question" is whether "the government has the power to control the trusts." He understood, during a period characterized by challenges similar to our own, that unaccountable power is a threat to the Republic and that the spectacle of untouchable elites fosters mass resentment.The misguided ruling in the Facebook case follows the decisions of the federal judge Amit Mehta, who last year did manage to rule that Google is an illegal monopoly -- yet this year could not bring himself to impose on Google a strong remedy.The decisions are the blessing of a major power imbalance of our age. They signal to companies that spending tens of millions of dollars on lawyers will be repaid with billions of dollars in profit.And maybe the worst part is that they reinforce the tech industry's cultivated sense of impunity -- the belief that they represent an untouchable sovereignty above the control of mere humanity.Does anyone seriously doubt that Meta is the kind of company that antitrust laws were designed to restrain? In the 1980s and 1990s, judges held AT&T and Microsoft to account for antitrust violations, despite their protests. But there is a faction of the judiciary -- often hailing from an earlier, tech-enraptured era -- that cannot seem to grasp, unlike seemingly everyone else in the country, that Facebook and Google are precisely the kinds of companies that antitrust law is designed to control.Unfortunately, the weak antitrust rulings are part of a broader trend. Many of the policies enacted in the 20th century to maintain economic balance have been undermined or gutted: labor law, financial regulation, telecommunications laws, and effective tax laws, among others. For much of the postwar era these laws forestalled a collapse into a two-class society and the resulting class tensions that have upended other republics. As this system of balance collapses, more and more of the population seeks radical responses to its plight.Back in the 1940s, famed federal judge Learned Hand pondered a similar case against the Alcoa company, which dominated the aluminum market in the United States. It was in some ways a tough case, and the district court had ruled against the government. Hand granted that there were "legal niceties" in which one might get "entangled." But he concluded that "if we hold that it is not a monopoly," everyone not caught up in those niceties would "quite rightly, I think, write us down as asses."There are times when the judiciary needs, like Learned Hand, to realize the broader stakes. Our judiciary -- and Congress too, for that matter -- is failing to rise to the challenges of our time. Both are showing themselves to be out of touch with economic realities that any American could describe. It is no wonder the population is growing increasingly cynical -- and more and more ready to look to ideologies that promise to upend the entire system.(A shorter version of this note appeared in the New York Times, as [The Bad Reasoning in the Meta Antitrust Ruling Isn't Even the Worst Part](https://the-antimonopolist.ghost.io/r/e72830ed?m=46b412a0-1cbe-4fcb-b85d-2477ce9f4e21)Thanks for reading, Tim[Support our newsletter. ](https://the-antimonopolist.ghost.io/r/6850b44c?m=46b412a0-1cbe-4fcb-b85d-2477ce9f4e21)
---

The antitrust laws may be vague about some things, but buying your most dangerous rivals is supposed to be clearly illegal.In 2012 and 2014, the FTC, deep in the depths of the antitrust winter, did nothing. Among other things, the agency managed to convince itself that Instagram and Facebook weren't actually competitors, based on the premise that Instagram was a mobile app and Facebook was mostly (at the time) a desktop app. It takes a lot of education to reach conclusions like this that the average high schooler would find absurd, and by such fine-grained distinctions does the law lose its power.Under new management and some eight years later, the FTC sued Facebook for monopolization -- perhaps seeking, in some way, to correct its mistake. The core of the government's theory was this: Facebook held a monopoly in personal social networking -- sharing with "friends and family." It continued to hold onto that monopoly to the present day, as demonstrated by its outlandish and durable profits ($87.1 billion in operating profit on $164.5 billion in revenue in 2024, for example). And in 2012 and 2014 it wrongly and intentionally maintained that monopoly with its purchases.The judge nonetheless let Facebook off the hook by finding it wasn't a monopoly now (whether it had one in 2012 and 2014 was not discussed, due to a quirk in the law). He then asserted that the development and growth of an adjacent market for short videos such as TikTok and YouTube Shorts since that time shows that Meta does not possess monopoly power. But every firm has its core customers and those who leave for something new: the key question is whether it retains power over its base. Those profits answered the question directly. The judge was forced to twist himself in knots and ignore undergraduate-level economics to give Meta yet another break.But to dwell on the shortcomings of the judge's reasoning is to overlook something worse: the message that his ruling sends to the country. Among the chief goals of antimonopoly laws like the Sherman Antitrust Act of 1890 -- the statute that the government accused Meta of violating -- was to make clear who is actually in charge of this country.As one of the original anti-monopolists, President Theodore Roosevelt explained in 1901, the antitrust laws are about who is actually in charge of this country. As he put it, the "vital question" is whether "the government has the power to control the trusts." He understood, during a period characterized by challenges similar to our own, that unaccountable power is a threat to the Republic and that the spectacle of untouchable elites fosters mass resentment.The misguided ruling in the Facebook case follows the decisions of the federal judge Amit Mehta, who last year did manage to rule that Google is an illegal monopoly -- yet this year could not bring himself to impose on Google a strong remedy.The decisions are the blessing of a major power imbalance of our age. They signal to companies that spending tens of millions of dollars on lawyers will be repaid with billions of dollars in profit.And maybe the worst part is that they reinforce the tech industry's cultivated sense of impunity -- the belief that they represent an untouchable sovereignty above the control of mere humanity.Does anyone seriously doubt that Meta is the kind of company that antitrust laws were designed to restrain? In the 1980s and 1990s, judges held AT&T and Microsoft to account for antitrust violations, despite their protests. But there is a faction of the judiciary -- often hailing from an earlier, tech-enraptured era -- that cannot seem to grasp, unlike seemingly everyone else in the country, that Facebook and Google are precisely the kinds of companies that antitrust law is designed to control.Unfortunately, the weak antitrust rulings are part of a broader trend. Many of the policies enacted in the 20th century to maintain economic balance have been undermined or gutted: labor law, financial regulation, telecommunications laws, and effective tax laws, among others. For much of the postwar era these laws forestalled a collapse into a two-class society and the resulting class tensions that have upended other republics. As this system of balance collapses, more and more of the population seeks radical responses to its plight.Back in the 1940s, famed federal judge Learned Hand pondered a similar case against the Alcoa company, which dominated the aluminum market in the United States. It was in some ways a tough case, and the district court had ruled against the government. Hand granted that there were "legal niceties" in which one might get "entangled." But he concluded that "if we hold that it is not a monopoly," everyone not caught up in those niceties would "quite rightly, I think, write us down as asses."There are times when the judiciary needs, like Learned Hand, to realize the broader stakes. Our judiciary -- and Congress too, for that matter -- is failing to rise to the challenges of our time. Both are showing themselves to be out of touch with economic realities that any American could describe. It is no wonder the population is growing increasingly cynical -- and more and more ready to look to ideologies that promise to upend the entire system.(A shorter version of this note appeared in the New York Times, as for reading, Tim | | The Antimonopolist (C) 2025 -

name: Thomas
subject: We’re spiraling
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
Look at this graph.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=40502%2E3422442%2ERyYG4w)
As Katie Porter’s Finance Director, I’m relentlessly checking ActBlue results—and I’ve never seen anything quite like this, Peter. Look at this graph of contributions to Democrats:
November in the off-year is typically the slowest fundraising month of the year. But this is different.
**We’re in freefall.**
As you can see, fundraising has dipped massively since October— _Democrats have nearly fallen off a cliff._ I crunched the numbers to see where we stand, and I’m concerned about the slow trickle of donations we’re seeing on our own campaign.
**That’s why we’ve set a $45,000 fundraising goal before the end of the month. If you’re ready to chip in right away, you can use this link:**
**[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20251129_3_ak?personal=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20251129_3_ak.X-aloN&refcode=em20251129-40502&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=40502%2E3422442%2ERyYG4w)**
Now, let me explain why your contribution matters right now.
We’re facing a billionaire opponent who can afford to spend millions of dollars to buy this race. He spent $350 million running for president, and he’s already dropped $2 million on television ads in the first week of his campaign.
And in the polls, we’re neck and neck with Republican extremist and Fox News host Steve Hilton. Republicans think they have a shot at winning this race, and dark money GOP donors could dump millions into California to make it happen.
There’s no telling what happens next in this race, but we know it’ll be close. Your support could be the difference between a self-funding billionaire, a Republican Fox News host, or a fighter for people and families like Katie Porter being elected as California’s next Governor.
**[If everyone reading this email gave $5, we would be able to close the gap. But here’s the deal: Not everyone will. So it’s critical you do, Peter. Can Katie and I count on you to donate $5 today?](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20251129_3_ak.X-aloN&refcode=em20251129-40502&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=40502%2E3422442%2ERyYG4w)**
[Donate ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20251129_3_ak.X-aloN&refcode=em20251129-40502&t=23&akid=40502%2E3422442%2ERyYG4w)
We can’t afford to fall short of our goal, so I appreciate your support.
Thank you,
Thomas
Finance Director, Katie Porter for Governor

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20251129-40502&amounts=&t=24&refcode2=40502_3422442_RyYG4w&akid=40502%2E3422442%2ERyYG4w)**
---

* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4g-emails?source=40502&t=25&akid=40502%2E3422442%2ERyYG4w)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4g-em-update-info-footer?source=40502)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4g-unsubscribe?source=40502&t=26&akid=40502%2E3422442%2ERyYG4w)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Governor 2026
PO Box 5176, Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)

name: Democrats.org
subject: A 60-second update for Derek
body:
---
**A 2026 update for our fellow Democrats:** Derek, here’s where things stand as we look ahead to 2026: **This year, Democrats in every corner of the country won or overperformed up and down the ballot, with high voter turnout across the map.** Those victories were made possible by over 1,315,100 Democratic supporters just like you who chipped in to help. We put their financial support to work holding town halls in _every single_ state and organizing everywhere to win anywhere. Here’s the bad news, Derek: Republicans saw how enthusiastic our supporters are, and they’re gearing up to beat us in 2026 with the help of their billionaire allies. **It’s simple: If we want to win back control of Congress and stop Donald Trump’s agenda in its tracks, we need to get to work _now_. That’s why we’re asking for your help.** [**If fighting to undo Donald Trump’s disastrous plans to make health care unaffordable and destroy our economy is important to you, we’re asking you to consider donating $7, or whatever you can, to the DNC today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-november-2025?amount=7&refcode=em_20251129_5386_fr&refcode2=5386_22930333_uvE-Jt&akid=5386%2E22930333%2EuvE-Jt) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $7](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-november-2025?express_lane=true&amount=7&refcode=em_20251129_5386_fr&refcode2=5386_22930333_uvE-Jt&akid=5386%2E22930333%2EuvE-Jt)**

name: Voter Action Project
subject: Gaming an antiquated system
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Team: When nearly two out of every three Americans agree on something, it's probably a good idea to do it. When it comes to the Electoral College -- a system that isn't equipped to handle the stress tests that opponents of voting rights are giving it -- we need to end it and stop letting cynical candidates game the system to take power.
Fuel our efforts to support a popular vote standard that will end the Electoral College forever with $25 or whatever you can right now >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?refcode=112925_3&amount=25]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
Pew Research Center: Majority of Americans continue to favor moving away from Electoral College [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?refcode=112925_3&amount=25]
As has been the case for over 200 years, the Electoral College determines the outcome of U.S. presidential races. Yet most Americans have long supported moving away from this system.
More than six-in-ten Americans (63%) would instead prefer to see the winner of the presidential election be the person who wins the most votes nationally. Roughly a third (35%) favor retaining the Electoral College system, according to a Pew Research Center survey of 9,720 adults conducted last fall.
We're clearly all tired of a system where all our candidates and their campaigns care about is whether the margin of victory is close enough in the state to make it worthwhile to campaign there instead of speaking to real Americans with real challenges.
The people who tell you we can't get rid of the Electoral College are wrong. Chip in $25 or more to help us change to a popular vote system once and for all >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?refcode=112925_3&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?express_lane=true&refcode=112925_3&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?express_lane=true&refcode=112925_3&amount=25]
GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?express_lane=true&refcode=112925_3&amount=50] GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?express_lane=true&refcode=112925_3&amount=100]
GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?express_lane=true&refcode=112925_3&amount=250] OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?refcode=112925_3&amount=35]
Defenders of voting rights like Cory Booker, AOC, Robert Reich, and Stacey Abrams recognize that the Electoral College is harming our democracy and needs to go.
It’s the biggest tool the opponents of voting rights have to swing national elections and suppress the will of the people. We have to move to a system that's right and just over a system that benefits only themselves and silences others.
This is about the people's voices being heard and their votes meaning something . This is about a system that has rewarded the popular vote loser with the job anyway five times now. This about the people and the states that get ignored and lost along the way to *just enough* Electoral College votes.
The Electoral College is an antiquated system built for a vastly different America and we need to adapt to our changing needs as a democracy. Fuel our efforts with $25 or whatever you can today to help end it >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?refcode=112925_3&amount=25]
Thank you,
The Voter Action Project Electoral College Team
https://voteractionproject.org/ [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/ [https://www.facebook.com/] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://instagram.com/ [https://instagram.com/] https://www.linkedin.com/ [https://www.linkedin.com/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=112925_3&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=112925_3&amount=20]
Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code.
A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003.

Integrity First Voter Action Project
P.O. Box 19294
Portland, OR 97280
United States

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.everyaction.com/p/FQb7Rbo110qLPmSvMAn63Q2?unsubscribedata=%2BJb61WhdUCp8Q34NaYCgTbfXDI5Yw1GbL99fpWSN267ETak5pRP792UyEq9UD3aDZY4Ck%2BW%2BTrOmQp7ZyWN9e%2BUWrcG%2BXx%2FGZnS%2Bff4OHh%2BahOg%2FCzUTmslA04%2BnqekHZkW5gLu9KIh3XvyvUJK9PSAJd%2F7SZOH%2FBt8yOng9XN%2BrdD9e9w1aoViZBYlEKr1n%2FQe2NpoHc9JZE8ErKr9R%2FzNv2eB29fCjvwZEqs0LxGD2VflQXRsHatHTNvNpzBTzvVmEHYATzSVGxlv3qn020pkWdk0ZaiFA8lE5y5%2FDwrcVXNkCB4z9UwJ9mkXMLxoxzOAXq0Lxt5GU3HN8K41L4fZN6nja5vFbaS0TAS1uqseu2fhMA0y25jeN10nGTg3Y5D0ZyGNWZky3KNkzG2sUdJpX%2BSobKVN57Aj9oQO2MUI%3D .

name: State Democrats HQ
subject: We’re in a bit of a situation right now…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
Democrats have momentum. The GOP wants to crush it before 2026.
#
We’re in a bit of a situation right now, Peter. Here’s the deal:
**FIRST –** Democrats won major elections across the United States earlier this month, building on the momentum we’ve seen in down-ballot races in red, blue, and purple states since Donald Trump was elected last year.
**THEN –** Donald Trump’s approval rating hit a _record low_ while Democrats in Congress worked to release the Epstein files.
**NOW –** Trump is lashing out. He’s threatening Democratic leaders for simply doing their jobs. He’s causing even more chaos + uncertainty for the American people. And it’s not a big surprise why...
**Right now, Democrats have the upper hand. _But we urgently need your support to keep it, Peter._ That’s why we’re asking:**
**[Can you chip in $15 or whatever works best for your budget today to help us keep building on the nationwide momentum we’re seeing for Democrats right now? subject: This is a two point race:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GET OUT THE VOTE PAC NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR ANY CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09042025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09042025&amount=25]
Peter ,
A new Emerson College Poll just dropped, and it confirms what organizers on the ground have been feeling for weeks: Tennessee’s 7th District special election is closer than anyone expected.
If Democrat Aftyn Behn is going to flip this “deep-red” congressional seat blue on December 2 and put us one step closer to taking back the majority, it’s going to come down to turnout. Nothing else. Not vibes, not Twitter, not yard signs. Turnout.
And that’s exactly what we're working on -- sending the texts and making the calls, that mobilize the voters who decide close races. But with just days left we need your help to see this race through.
Can you rush $15 to help us turn this Emerson poll into a real upset on Election Day? https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email11262025 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email11262025]
-GOTV PAC
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09212025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09212025&amount=25]
Get Out the Vote PAC mobilizes voters often overlooked by mainstream campaigns to help Democratic candidates win in the most competitive districts.
Our professional phone bankers specialize in long- and short-term GOTV campaigns, event registration, voting assistance in heavily gerrymandered states, fundraising, and call time management. Our mission is to flip red districts blue, any elected position from dog walker to Congress member.
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email11292025]
Learn more at: gotv.vote [https://www.gotv.vote/]

Washington, DC 20002
United States

name: exclusive MSNBC viewership poll attached (Fight For Reform)
subject: goodbye MSNBC….
disclaimer_text: paid for and provided by End Citizens United Nonfederal, P
body:
| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=23675%2E4449941%2E9_X0ZY) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=23675%2E4449941%2E9_X0ZY) **BREAKING from _Deadline:_
[_“MSNBC_ Makes The Shift To _MS NOW_ As Part Of Split From _Comcast_ ”](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70475?t=3&akid=23675%2E4449941%2E9_X0ZY)** []() [**Please confirm: Will you still watch _MSNBC_ after becoming _MS NOW?_ >>**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70475?t=4&akid=23675%2E4449941%2E9_X0ZY) | | | [YES ➞](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70475?t=5&akid=23675%2E4449941%2E9_X0ZY)
---
| [NO ➞](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70475?t=6&akid=23675%2E4449941%2E9_X0ZY)
---
[UNSURE ➞](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70475?t=7&akid=23675%2E4449941%2E9_X0ZY)
---
_** Please, your response is critical. We need to ensure that Democrats across the country still intend to tune into_ MS NOW! **_
We’re still in SHOCK team... this news comes after multiple other networks have bent the knee to Trump and his MAGA allies this past year!

**REMEMBER:** _CBS_ caved and fired Stephen Colbert for being outspoken about the Trump administration.

**REMEMBER:** _ABC_ sidelined Jimmy Kimmel for making comments that MAGA disagreed with.

**AND REMEMBER:** _NBC_ is now scrubbing _MSNBC_ from its brand – despite _MSNBC_ being a critical network millions trust to hold Republicans accountable.

We can’t afford to lose one of the few remaining progressive voices on national television, but we’re nervous that Democrats like you, team, are going to tune out after this shakeup.
[**So we’re launching a rapid response poll to [50] of our most informed Democrats in your area to gauge their support for _MS NOW._ _Please respond before 11:59 PM to validate our data >>_**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70475?t=8&akid=23675%2E4449941%2E9_X0ZY)
[**Please confirm: Will you still watch _MSNBC_ after becoming _MS NOW?_ >>**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70475?t=9&akid=23675%2E4449941%2E9_X0ZY)
[]()
| | [YES ➞](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70475?t=10&akid=23675%2E4449941%2E9_X0ZY)

| **MAJOR BREAKING:** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/97110?t=6&akid=22016%2E878179%2EAz4z5T) _Trump had Stephen Colbert cancelled. He had Jimmy Kimmel suspended. Now, Seth Meyers is his next target!!_

The American people banded together to save Kimmel, **so we need a SURGE of that same momentum to defend Seth Meyers before NBC CAVES!**

[**By adding your name, we’ll show that MILLIONS of Democrats have Seth’s back! Please: Chip in $3 to sign now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/97110?t=7&akid=22016%2E878179%2EAz4z5T) | [**Donate $3 to sign now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/97110?t=8&akid=22016%2E878179%2EAz4z5T)

TO: Seth Meyers
FROM: A grateful Democrat
Subject: I have your back. Dear Seth Meyers,

**Thank you.** Your commitment to journalistic integrity and the truth over the years has been truly inspirational and has kept us all laughing through the MAGA madness.

Trump knows that you’re right — but he would rather silence you and PULL THE PLUG on NBC than have his fragile ego hurt!

**This isn’t just an attack on you, it’s an attack on the free press and our very democracy. I won’t stand for it, not now and not EVER.**

[**So I’m signing this letter today by chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to thank you for exposing Trump’s lies and stand with you in the fight ahead. It is _absolutely critical_ that Democrats get up off the sidelines at this moment! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/97110?t=9&akid=22016%2E878179%2EAz4z5T) | [**Donate $3 to sign now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/97110?t=10&akid=22016%2E878179%2EAz4z5T)

name: The Real Texas PAC
subject: MAGA’s bounty hunters are coming. The time to act is NOW!!
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-stopfascism?refcode=112925_4 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-stopfascism?refcode=112925_4]
We’re asking right up front — please rush $10 to help stop Trump’s allies from turning cruelty into law. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-stopfascism?refcode=112925_4]
Here’s what’s happening:
ICE is falling behind on deportation quotas. So MAGA Republicans want to “fix” that by paying private bounty hunters with taxpayer money to track, detain, and deliver immigrants for cash.
It’s being pushed by Donald Trump and Kristi Noem, and as always... the cruelty is the point.

subject: Asking you to chip in for 3 important reasons
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
I'm running for Senate to fight for working families

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=1499%2E49239%2EhRF_ON)
| | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/9554?t=2&akid=1499%2E49239%2EhRF_ON)
---
Null, with our crucial end-of-month fundraising deadline coming up tomorrow, I'm emailing again to ask you to **[chip in $5 today for three important reasons:](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/9555?t=3&akid=1499%2E49239%2EhRF_ON)**
| | | | **We have to stop the chaos.** Between Trump's chaotic policies causing prices to skyrocket, cuts to SNAP, and surging health care costs – working families deserve strong, stable leadership. |
---|---|---|---
| | | | **The GOP megadonors are circling.** Outside spending groups and billionaires are zeroing in on Michigan, trying to buy this seat for Republican Mike Rogers. |
---|---|---|---
| | | | **We must win in Michigan to flip the Senate blue.****** Polls show I’m the strongest Democrat running – I’m leading in the primary and polling the best against Mike Rogers in the general. |
---|---|---|---
**I'm running for Senate to do what I’ve always done: fight for working families. But the ONLY way I can win this tough battleground race is with the grassroots support of folks like you – and with time running out, I'm still way short of my $350,000 end-of-month goal. Can I count on you to come through right away?**
**[Please rush $5 or more right now to help us close this gap, win in Michigan, and take back the Senate for Democrats.](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/9555?t=4&akid=1499%2E49239%2EhRF_ON)**
_Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue._ | | | [Donate $5](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/9555?t=5&akid=1499%2E49239%2EhRF_ON)
---
| | [Donate $25](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/9556?t=6&akid=1499%2E49239%2EhRF_ON)
---
| | [Donate $50](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/9557?t=7&akid=1499%2E49239%2EhRF_ON)
---
| | [Donate Another Amount](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/9558?t=8&akid=1499%2E49239%2EhRF_ON)
---
With grit and gratitude,

Haley Stevens
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/9901?t=9&akid=1499%2E49239%2EhRF_ON) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/9554?t=10&akid=1499%2E49239%2EhRF_ON)
---
You can also text “JOIN” to 80242 to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive, real-time updates from my campaign.
Thank you,
Haley

clean_body: UPDATE: didn’t expect this | = | We hope you had a good Thanksgiving! We’re reaching out because tomorrow is our first End of Month deadline since Proposition 50 passed. And we are still pretty far off from our goal. We’ve been emailing less this month because we know TONS of people stepped up big time to pass Prop 50. We are so grateful. But we didn’t expect contributions to drop as much as they have. And we need to refill our coffers to prepare for the fight for the U.S. House Majority next year. = = = = = = Here’s a big update that you might not know : Following the success of Prop 50, we’re keeping a talented team of organizers in the field to build on that momentum. We aren’t winding down our organizing efforts only to restart later next year, we are continuing full speed ahead. Why? Because we want to keep organizing straight through the 2026 midterms. That’s how we build the type of movement that will flip seats and take the Speaker’s gavel from Mike Johnson. This isn’t cheap. But we think that flipping the House and putting a “check” on Donald Trump is worth the investment. After all, we’ve proven time and time again that when we organize, we win. But our grassroots movement has to be powered by grassroots donors. We don’t take big corporate checks or special interest cash, so we rely on small dollar donations of 35 or 55 from people like you. = = Thank you so much, \- The California Democratic Party | | = Our Democratic leaders are working hard to make California a better place to live. From fighting for good-paying jobs, combating climate change, to expanding healthcare access so all Californians can lead safe, healthy, prosperous lives — California’s Democratic leaders turn progressive ideas into meaningful action. name: Troy Downing
subject: This is the email I've waited all my life to send.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
I hoped & prayed for a huge response, but it wasn't enough.

[](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTUwJmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MTEzMF9GVS1WQi4xMTAxMTdfdDE3NjE4MDQtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTExMzBfRlUtVkIuMTEwMTE3X3QxNzYxODA0LTI4OTkifQ/L-gn086V4adbc75l2cXMxg)**This is the email I've waited all my life to send.**
I put so much hope into my last message - but it didn't work.
I hoped & prayed for a huge response, but it wasn't enough.
**Peter, I'm Troy Downing.** I bet you've never heard of me, but that's OK. I never thought in a million years I'd be sending you this final message pleading for your help.
I'm a combat veteran. A God-fearing Christian. A husband & a proud dad.

**[I'm also the conservative Republican running for re-election for Congress in Montana in the biggest race on the map.](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTUwJmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MTEzMF9GVS1WQi4xMTAxMTdfdDE3NjE4MDQtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTExMzBfRlUtVkIuMTEwMTE3X3QxNzYxODA0LTI4OTkifQ/mBjEIx51-RfmDZFDGcY_Wg)**

Phony Republicans & the DC swamp have sold you out. That's NOT me. I'm making a simple promise to everyone reading this message:******I'll always tell the truth. ****
****I'll always put America First. ****
****I'll always have a backbone.** This is exactly why the lefties in Washington will smear me in the media, lie about me & end my run. They already have a $40 million in cash on hand to destroy every Republican like me.
I am swallowing my pride & pleading for your help. I'm not used to asking like this, so here it goes: [Do you have the heart to chip in just a few bucks to help me?](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTUwJmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MTEzMF9GVS1WQi4xMTAxMTdfdDE3NjE4MDQtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTExMzBfRlUtVkIuMTEwMTE3X3QxNzYxODA0LTI4OTkifQ/txbRQaz12-er4h9HKpftnA)****[ENLIST TODAY
](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTUwJmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MTEzMF9GVS1WQi4xMTAxMTdfdDE3NjE4MDQtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTExMzBfRlUtVkIuMTEwMTE3X3QxNzYxODA0LTI4OTkifQ/qO6NCp9wbbMD7ZFvDNFvMQ) I don't have the flashy campaign slogans or the high-tech stuff - I'm taking a leap of faith & praying that a few people read this message & are willing to stand with me.

Most people will count me out, but if we WIN this race it will bring the Radical Left to its knees.

I'm praying for a comeback, Peter - [will you help a combat vet like me?](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTUwJmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MTEzMF9GVS1WQi4xMTAxMTdfdDE3NjE4MDQtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTExMzBfRlUtVkIuMTEwMTE3X3QxNzYxODA0LTI4OTkifQ/cRqsfWChN4P1l---TpZr1g)****[ENLIST TODAY
](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTUwJmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MTEzMF9GVS1WQi4xMTAxMTdfdDE3NjE4MDQtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTExMzBfRlUtVkIuMTEwMTE3X3QxNzYxODA0LTI4OTkifQ/xwq1GpFTQ-1yDstFno026A) I'll never forget you helping me today.
Thank you & God bless.
Troy Downing****| |

name: The PreBorn! Team
subject: She came looking for help You gave her hope
body:
Every day, women across America search online for answers.

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2r74e7fcqt1mvloi18da8d46mnocttnlhpmvs8o_rp22sh2s8i6eor1clg68pj2cph2bs)
---
Hi Advocate for Life, Every day, women across America search online for answers. They are scared, uncertain, and convinced abortion is their only option. That’s where **PreBorn!** steps in. Our Network Clinics across the nation provide **free ultrasounds** , **holistic** **compassionate care** , and the **gospel of Jesus Christ** to women in crisis. Because when a mother sees her baby for the first time, when she hears that heartbeat, everything changes. In fact, 81% of women who receive an ultrasound, can see their baby and hear the heartbeat, will choose life for their babies. And your **$28 gift provides one life-saving ultrasound** and gives her the chance to meet her baby and hear of God’s love for her. As our thank-you, we’ll send you PreBorn!’s [**_Tiny Miracles, Mighty Futures_ 2026**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zk5ippgu91a14l3bi9rcksvhj6ssa4j962t16gk8_rp22sh2s8i6eor1clg68pj2cph2bs) Calendar — a celebration of the lives your gift helps save and the futures your faith helps build. Inside, you’ll also find a **monthly prayer guide** to keep you connected to this mission all year long.
---

---
Supplies are limited so give today to help reach the next mother before she’s too late to hear her baby’s heartbeat.

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Bring wholesome messaging back to children’sentertainment
body:
Please – for the sake of all our families

| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith,Please – for the sake of all our families – take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with “entertainment” that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue’s Clues_...
---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zuvog8lfgus34lpvs637feuorv7uvtbarr6r6uoo_rp22sh2s8i6eor1clg6cp32c5h2bs)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to “educate” YOU about your “old-fashioned” and “mean” ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. **[Today, I’m inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zd2r4rgcmone6bcqj9pgpf6u8gctq736gi509n48_rp22sh2s8i6eor1clg6cp32c5h2bs)** Introducing: _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I’m making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you’ve seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we’ve already countered those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic “Story Hours” of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It’s encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we’re working to have that same impact in television.
---
>> Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we’ve already completed and released the first ten character-building episodes of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_! We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone – including folks just like you – who worked so hard to get us that far. But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we’ve made the first five episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE. That’s the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can’t get the word out. And the Left will try to bury _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 – and with the recent launch, we need to raise the funds immediately.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $250,000 for post production.**_
---
I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won’t work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That’s why I’m asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $250,000 for Season 2.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zcf7s6b799me55hqt2v108i12a58i225e6oj1550_rp22sh2s8i6eor1clg6cp32c5h2bs) ** As our special “Thank You” for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we’ll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ FREE on DVD.This exclusive _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won’t be available for sale anywhere. So with **[**your gift of $50**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zhruf63o02vtdif08ba74gjmbt0k5hvuo04l98lo_rp22sh2s8i6eor1clg6cp32c5h2bs)** , you’ll be part of a small select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You’ll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor’s office. So many children have no way of hearing God’s message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child’s life. **[So please – whether you can send $50, $5,000, $25,000, or anything higher or lower, please respond quickly and know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zl1pp0jh4t3cn9an7sn08tlm8n6isb1c6n9slmj0_rp22sh2s8i6eor1clg6cp32c5h2bs)** There’s no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a **Founding Supporter** of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.

Sincerely,

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: My recovery after the car crash
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
Because you’ve been a loyal supporter, I wanted you to hear this directly from me.

Because you’ve been a loyal supporter, I wanted you to hear this directly from me.
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z7jp0785lc31cv3plitoduatsfu47ptpe3pj6bj8_rp22sh2s8i6eor1clg62o34cph2bs)
---
Friend,
---
So many kind souls like you have asked how I’m doing, so I wanted to personally update you on my recovery.
---
I was hospitalized after a devastating car crash. We were struck by a vehicle going what felt like 70-80 miles per hour. Had I not been wearing a seatbelt, I would’ve been killed.
---
Right now, a back brace is holding my fractured spine together.**
---
But if I could survive being arrested in the most violent jail in America, I know I can survive **__ANYTHING!__**
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z048503l235h23h3k2tsc7vh02asfg7cdl5t47i0_rp22sh2s8i6eor1clg62o34cph2bs)
__
---
One thing especially helped take the pain away...
---
...**President Trump has announced that he will award me with the Presidential Medal of Freedom – _the highest civilian honor in America._**
---
**President Trump knows I’m in a dire situation right now. His pardon powers only apply to _federal_ cases, which means he _legally_ _cannot_ save me from the bogus _state-level_ charges brought against me by a radical Democrat Attorney General who is trying to imprison me for 20 YEARS.**
---
**Left with no pardon, no safety net, and no lifeline, my _ONLY_ chance at walking free is to secure a top-notch defense team.**
---
But the reality is, the Left had already forced me to the point of **BANKRUPTCY**.
---
**And now, this car crash has set me back even more...**
---
And so, my last remaining hope of assembling the quality of defense required to BEAT the Left’s sham charges and WIN the trial of my life is patriots like _YOU_.
---
That’s why I’m making a final plea to humbly ask that you contribute whatever amount you can to my Legal Defense Trust as I continue fighting for my _FREEDOM_ and my _JUSTICE_.
---
__Because when President Trump places the Medal of Freedom around my neck, I want history to always remember that I FOUGHT for my freedom and justice until the VERY END!__
---
[**So, if you can, please make a contribution to the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund to ensure I have the resources needed to retain a top-notch defense team in what is now the FINAL BATTLE for my freedom and justice.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zk7mv4g40dcqhgijclbr9obaencs3sf4pek8ts98_rp22sh2s8i6eor1clg62o34cph2bs)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $25](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zrhq6kj8g7en3qtgdq1u0nqsu7eiph69jotl6l6o_rp22sh2s8i6eor1clg62o34cph2bs)
---

---

---

---

[CONTRIBUTE $500](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z97v1mu3m9ehjge4634cc01uotbcdnb5c99drch8_rp22sh2s8i6eor1clg62o34cph2bs)

[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z3iaqftprbq7hv9bv5s9b49opecmvjmfq0va63go_rp22sh2s8i6eor1clg62o34cph2bs)

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: My recovery after the car crash
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
Because you’ve been a loyal supporter, I wanted you to hear this directly from me.

Because you’ve been a loyal supporter, I wanted you to hear this directly from me.
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6e59hirikd4e61kl65fsclgpcgavb8krcqmsajo_rp22sh2s8i6eor1clg61pb4chh2bs)
---
Friend,
---
So many kind souls like you have asked how I’m doing, so I wanted to personally update you on my recovery.
---
I was hospitalized after a devastating car crash. We were struck by a vehicle going what felt like 70-80 miles per hour. Had I not been wearing a seatbelt, I would’ve been killed.
---
Right now, a back brace is holding my fractured spine together.**
---
But if I could survive being arrested in the most violent jail in America, I know I can survive **__ANYTHING!__**
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2za8oqjmtovukdblt4otc0i9u25vgpg1aksslhcc8_rp22sh2s8i6eor1clg61pb4chh2bs)
__
---
One thing especially helped take the pain away...
---
...**President Trump has announced that he will award me with the Presidential Medal of Freedom – _the highest civilian honor in America._**
---
**President Trump knows I’m in a dire situation right now. His pardon powers only apply to _federal_ cases, which means he _legally_ _cannot_ save me from the bogus _state-level_ charges brought against me by a radical Democrat Attorney General who is trying to imprison me for 20 YEARS.**
---
**Left with no pardon, no safety net, and no lifeline, my _ONLY_ chance at walking free is to secure a top-notch defense team.**
---
But the reality is, the Left had already forced me to the point of **BANKRUPTCY**.
---
**And now, this car crash has set me back even more...**
---
And so, my last remaining hope of assembling the quality of defense required to BEAT the Left’s sham charges and WIN the trial of my life is patriots like _YOU_.
---
That’s why I’m making a final plea to humbly ask that you contribute whatever amount you can to my Legal Defense Trust as I continue fighting for my _FREEDOM_ and my _JUSTICE_.
---
__Because when President Trump places the Medal of Freedom around my neck, I want history to always remember that I FOUGHT for my freedom and justice until the VERY END!__
---
[**So, if you can, please make a contribution to the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund to ensure I have the resources needed to retain a top-notch defense team in what is now the FINAL BATTLE for my freedom and justice.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrs154prq3nl3sh3vlfq5mvanmpe9houiq6hc598_rp22sh2s8i6eor1clg61pb4chh2bs)

Now I'm back to finish the job in 2026.

This is shaping up to be a massive year, the kind where a district like Colorado's 4th can finally turn the page on Boebert's chaos and elect a representative who actually delivers for working people.

name: Suzanne Beecher
subject: Asking for your prayers
body:
She’s fighting censorship at the Supreme Court

| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zqhr064fo8007iivkhlcb10r7u1biijhh7na13uo_rp22sh2s8i6eor1cli68oj2c3h2bs)

## **[Sign Your Name to Commit to Pray for Kaley's Supreme Court Case](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zt8rgukjlv7hun9uib3j2a44a194dk1fg3qra8to_rp22sh2s8i6eor1cli68oj2c3h2bs)**
Dear Fellow American, We're less than a month away from one of the biggest free speech cases at the U.S. Supreme Court!

Kaley Chiles will stand alongside her ADF attorneys to challenge a Colorado law that censors her speech in counseling conversations. It forbids licensed counselors like Kaley from having conversations that could help clients regain comfort with their sex--_even if that 's the client's goal._

It's a clear violation of the First Amendment. But this case also points to a much deeper, spiritual battle.

Laws like this one allow lies to spread--lies like one's sex can be changed and God makes mistakes with His creation. And these laws suppress truth from going forward by forbidding people like Kaley from speaking it.

Kaley is stepping up to challenge this law. And a win in her case could help roll back similar laws in 22 other states.

**I want you to think about that for a moment. One young woman 's courageous stand could reach countless lives with the truth.**

I've had the privilege of getting to know Kaley over the last few months, and I have been so encouraged by her unwavering hope in the Lord and commitment to the truth.

It's not been an easy road. The law threatens exorbitant fines and even loss of her license if she follows her convictions in the counseling room. She's also facing tremendous backlash for choosing to push back on this law--and more is sure to come. Our enemy, the father of lies, will work to oppose the truth and those who speak it at every turn.

But your prayers can make a difference. As we prepare for oral argument in Kaley's case on October 7th, will you please pray...
* **For Kaley** -- that God would strengthen and encourage her in the weeks leading up to her case, and that she would sense His peace in the months to come as we await the Court's decision
* **For her ADF attorneys** --that they would have clarity of mind and speech as they go to the Supreme Court, and that they would represent the Lord and our clients well
* **For our culture** --that God would use this case to open more eyes to the harms of gender ideology, and that hearts would turn toward the truth of knowing Him

**__**
[ Commit to Pray](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zcsgqg2hkr4oi51mvn6bk96r3p2t29g44ghuctso_rp22sh2s8i6eor1cli68oj2c3h2bs)

Thank you for your prayers--it's such an encouragement to know that friends like you are going to the Lord on our behalf!

In Christ, **Suzanne Beecher**
Legal Counsel
Alliance Defending Freedom

P.S. [Please sign your name to let Kaley and our ADF team know that you're praying for them as we prepare for this case at the U.S. Supreme Court!](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1p4prd8qnrhiftrpg1aapi74hn3o30cdei9mhr0_rp22sh2s8i6eor1cli68oj2c3h2bs)

---
Alliance Defending Freedom 15100 N. 90th Street, Scottsdale, Arizona 85260

---

Pop Acta Media | GOP Presidential
---
_PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zghkphmqltcrnr2rc9gmc2p4at5kf78ouneoteqo_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjksrr0s3iekr79c9l6eon9d1hmej3fddnklprctbi6pr34t5i6krqfp9ls4o7et5hm6qbcsr7c0bjbd1km6pqcdtlmcibbp35cpi60pj4s8gq48bi4bh28pr3c5im8p32c9ge49fg)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zt32np65fdt1djsqabrcc6o9opa2vpq0qi1vfjlg_rp22sh2s8i6eor1cli68oj2c3h2bs)_

subject: Tax Refunds, Bigfoot Files, and Travelers Stranded

# Sunday, November 30, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1876, the first Thanksgiving Day [game between Princeton and Yale](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0D1uhDAUBODTQGfkH8CkcJGGbtOmRMZ-hpcYe2W_LOH20Ua5QepPGs3M-225WYyYtjd7gKGQlwRnjUAEZSH7XSB8JV9X3ELOFDBCtckvksuBCcEUX7zFeC19600AkKBaMEKP_cD5pHS7m2EdghOKcx28dsINbpIvmofg9TCufGrRPNOEUFwIrsXYud5KrdUI_RBG1dum5-CRcuk-MibaIcQrP6B0Lh9tNDvRvTbqtZFzI-fzPLsdK-VyPb2RM-1YmbcXw8T-pJFzwFKJ0W7TZ93wgWljLscIG7Dn0tXGyDZ7QGWXjcDuBZMDyomJSY9tMf5-YoxYR930fDssxt869K8PH0b-BAAA__9FUoht) took place. Yale won 2-0 in a contest that resembled rugby more than modern football. Have you ever wondered why people [don’t return their shopping carts](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD2OpDAUhE9jMiP_gSFwsAlZb7ohcsMzvJWxkf262d7Tj3o00hxgwk8qlaq-P7f55jFi2n77AxyFPCe4agQiKDP5fwXCI631jlvImQJGqD6tsxKq41JyLebVY3zNplldAFCgG3DS9qYTYtC22d2oOgvGjP3gvR6CGEAoaXs_DuI-Doto0L3bpNRCSmFl3y7GK2t1D6YLvTaeGQErUi7t34yJdgjxlZ9Q2iUfTXQ70VmZ_sXUxNR0XVf7_4C6IKQF3hGmpi9ianq_49947S--5kT8hHxG4AXoURKnHbDwuufzxLTxxReqTE1Ncet5YYxYe8uM2A6P8XMF_Ujd06mPAAAA__9_LIQj)? Today’s _Flyover_ spotlights new research that breaks down the excuses and expectations behind one of America’s most relatable tiny dilemmas. Do you return your shopping carts? Hit reply, we’re curious. This edition is a bit shorter than usual as our team takes time to enjoy the holiday with their families. We’ll be back with the full-length version on Monday. Today’s sponsor is [flowkey](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykz71OwzAUxfGnsbdGvv4MgweWbmVltNz4OrngxFViGvL2KCw8APP56yed91u4RSq0jG9xRt9yDQvuW8HWcA0tfq-Yv5a03WnMtbZMBbe4pCCFNBeAixIhRSpH0Dz5jChRcfTgrDZC9MrxyaPD3mAPg4gKerASlVGDsXeJZ_HCyZ8agBIAwoHtBh2lc8qiNtkqHZkWmKjVtfuotLQJcznqE9duqDMvfmrtsTH1yuSVyetYu1zq_onHOTN5_ev56tNjp1Jos45pMc6Ryi_S_vX86eVPAAAA___rImyF), the app that makes learning piano simple, intuitive, and actually fun. Our founder has been testing it and was amazed at how quickly he was able to start playing real songs, even as a beginner. Currently, [their Black Friday sale is live, offering 70% off](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykz71OwzAUxfGnsbdGvv4MgweWbmVltNz4OrngxFViGvL2KCw8APP56yed91u4RSq0jG9xRt9yDQvuW8HWcA0tfq-Yv5a03WnMtbZMBbe4pCCFNBeAixIhRSpH0Dz5jChRcfTgrDZC9MrxyaPD3mAPg4gKerASlVGDsXeJZ_HCyZ8agBIAwoHtBh2lc8qiNtkqHZkWmKjVtfuotLQJcznqE9duqDMvfmrtsTH1yuSVyetYu1zq_onHOTN5_ev56tNjp1Jos45pMc6Ryi_S_vX86eVPAAAA___rImyF), so if you’ve ever wanted to learn, this is the perfect moment.

## Tax Refunds Could Jump by $1,000 in 2026
A new analysis projects that the average [tax refund could rise by about $1,000](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L9u9CAQBPCnwR0WLBjuKyi-xt2lTWmtzXImwnCy9_69fXTJI6Qfzeg3n-fpjLnkevnAjQKnNlV6HIWYaZ8YnzulW43HnC-pNU650IE1TqBgkFpLo6aIubwm28WQiIBMR0F7ZwelTsZ3a5ijIaBTBGe9R41-JjvMGmaH8Z9x1OXwbtPaKK2V165fLIL3xpEdkjMWhVUUM7e9_2q58kqpvNqd9n5pW1fCynw9hPkvYBQwplyxLtS_cG3tnRAwvkkCRsan_PXIpd1KlFoqpSQoawfr4NSvvJVuD_H6yKXkw3lh1WXDXH6W-E_33AN8BwAA__9AKnfb) next year, thanks to retroactive cuts in a sweeping tax law signed by President Trump in July. The average refund is expected to hit $4,151, up from $3,151 in the 2025 filing season. The law eliminates taxes on some overtime and tipped income and raises the SALT deduction cap from $10,000 to $40,000, driving what could be one of the largest refund seasons on record. Most benefits will go to [middle- and upper-middle-income](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2O3CAUhZ8Gd1hw-ZstKNK427QprevxxUOEwQJ2PM7TR5M8wpZHOjo63_frc_7EmGLefuJOvocyZzpbot6pzh1flcJXXtsSt1BKDzFRw7zOIMBwKbkS84oxXbMeVh-IgNRAXjqrjRA35YaHN2hQLeTIIHwYpRap6SYlEpmwKGuH6N9rUiohpXDSjneN4JyypE2wSiPTgtbYSx1_l5j7g0K6ypPqeC_7kPyj96Mx9YPBxGA6z3NcKP-JecN3gcF0UG0lY-IhZsx3YjB1fDGYwDCYpGQw6Q_hbiDEOwsh-BK3jSr_T89j5iDA8l6_9oM3vBq_qA3Vr8cZU4rNOqbFtmNM_z71b4l8evgbAAD__wCrhNE) earners, with the biggest gains for households making $60,000 to $400,000.
## FBI's Bigfoot File Goes Public
The FBI quietly investigated a [possible Bigfoot sighting](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2ypCAUhJ8GMy3-BAkINjGbTTe0EA7j2UKwhBl33n7LW_cNbtZBV1d_35_H8nCYMD9_ux1si2XJcNUErcG5NPfvhPjKoa74jKW0iAmqy2HhlI89Y72gS3CYPovsgo0AHEQHlmklR0onobvNGulWZlYDyjMRjAgjUDNqrc20hsmvHdp7jTFBGaOaqcFLx7UWCuQYlZCOSAoBWzmHvwVz2yCmT3nDOfiyd8lurR2ViF-Ez4TP13UNRzleyZ07-M1l9PUuEj5Xj5A9ED67jLtL9U7KjNyoiRI-xxX7b9D-Ju1PSOAqBMLn7rThuDAlrEoTSZ-7w_R1oP3I2tvy_wEAAP__xYqA5g) in the 1970s, according to a newly spotlighted 22-page file in its Freedom of Information Act Vault. In 1976, Peter Byrne of Oregon’s Bigfoot Information Center sent about 15 hairs attached to a piece of skin to the Bureau, claiming it was the most promising sample in years. Although the FBI initially declined, the media coverage prompted the agency to conduct tests. By mid-1977, the FBI concluded the hairs belonged to a deer, not Sasquatch, putting an end to that particular mystery. The file, primarily consisting of correspondence between Byrne and the FBI’s Scientific and Technical Services Division, is now available alongside records on notable figures such as Al Capone and Marilyn Monroe. [Read the file here](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykzz9uwyAUgPHTwBaLf4Z4YOjiLV07ood52K_CJrKJ09y-atUb9AI_fd_HLdyACm3zO6zoW65hw-dRsDXcQ4OvHfNjS0ekOdfaMhU8YEtBCdVfpLxoERJQeQXDk8-ICjVHL501vRBX7fjiUx6S0aDNMKQcbXYALk5GxEnANZrEyf9oUmohpXDSdpMB5Zy2aPpstQFmBCZqde8-K21twVxe9cS9m-rKi19aux9MvzE1MjWe8City5G6uZ5MjX_lfPfp_qRS6LCOGTGvQOUXaP-6Pr36DgAA__9KDWw0).
## Middle-Class Life in 1980 vs 2025
A new report shows how [rising costs have outpaced income](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL3OozAQAJ_GdCD_gAmFi2vocu2VaONdhz0tOMK-cLz9p3yv8NUjjUbz577cgYX352_YKNSUl53OIlQrHUuF_welfzuWBz9TzjWxUIEdF6vt0BrTOr0gsFxL32BIRJZcQ8GMvh-0vrmxWcNkwZsHTknr28NbRDSTc9GDRx-Tw4bDx2aM08bo0fgu9mDH0Xnqh-RdD6rXhFzz0f3NvNeVklz5TUcX89ZIWGt9FeV-KTsrO5_n2V2w5vyhys7CiUq9hJSd4agchYqy88aIQm0UKKXlPeaNWjPddBvz9oKDSqu1tXoYzNStdZPmCPg6WYSLH1WvnxuwfAfUH117B_sVAAD___tFgO4) growth for American middle-class families over the past 45 years, based on data from the Pew Research Center and federal agencies. In 1980, the median household earned $21,020—enough to buy a $64,600 home even with mortgage rates at 13.8%, cover a car, and take a vacation, often on one income. By 2025, the median income is $80,610, but the typical home now costs $410,000—nearly five times that amount—and a new car averages over $47,000. While modern wages are higher, the report finds today’s middle class faces far greater financial strain, with two incomes often required just to match the modest security one used to provide. [Read the full report here](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0D2OpDAQxfHTmMyo_AF0Bw42IetNN0QFLkPtGLuFPc307UfMFSb_6-mn9-8xPZAjp_Uv7uRqyFOis0SqlY6p4tdB4TP5MvMacq6BIxVMftKgO6mUNDB55PiebONdINJkGnJq6G0HcDNDs7n-rnpAb_QcrLIdaOPvZiboFj1AIGjYXWtKGVAKBtW3i0U9DKYn24XeWBQWyHPNR_s_c6obhfjOLzraJe9NdFutzyLMH6FHocfzPNs1z5g-OK0HVipXJvS450TvKyCMdRN63PIpd_Y-klwiliI5LXknqe43kEven3hQkZdN6LE5nH-eHCOXfhAW1h05_gDqr157Of0dAAD__19qgIY).

**Whatever happened to mincemeat pie?** As you enjoy a slice of pumpkin pie this Thanksgiving weekend, consider the forgotten history of its neighbor on the dessert plate: [the mincemeat pie](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL0OmzAURp_GbCD_gcngoQtbunZEN_g6vpWxEb4JzdtX6St0-r7pHOn8uq93oEzl-RN29BzrWvBqGZnxXBn-nBhfJbQHPWOtHCljgxJWLfXYK9UbuQag_FltF3xE1Gg69MpNdpRyNq5LXs_G3dw2b3Jz-hasijcFo56lBZgkTB35L00pI5WSTk3DZkE7Zya0Y5yMBWElBuJ6Dr8rFU4Y86e-8Ry2unfZJ-ajCfND6EXo5bquAY4DMmyJoCRqXM_PUJCFXrRUs9CL0kIvnLA_CPvvPk5iaqmHF6f6_dj6B5SCYUi85-704bgoZ2qTE1Y-d6D8z87_lezt9d8AAAD__-l0gE0).

Today, the small, spiced pastry we know as mince pie is purely sweet. Yet its original form was a substantial, savory-sweet marvel containing minced mutton, veal, or venison, a true "mince meat" pie. Dating back to medieval times, these pies were a critical method of food preservation. The thick crust encased meat, spices (like cloves and nutmeg), and fruit—a perfect sealed container to survive the long winter. This hearty dish embodied the spirit of the fall feast: using and preserving every bit of the harvest, including the meat. The meat began its slow vanishing act from the pie for two main reasons. First, a cultural shift in the 17th century drove a wedge between savory and sweet dishes, relegating the mince pie to the dessert course. Secondly, as refrigeration improved and sugar became cheaper, the pie’s role as a meat preserver became obsolete. The mince pie of today, made with fruits, spices, and sugar—but no meat—is a sweet ghost of its former self, a historical relic that survived the test of time, politics, and changing tastes. It’s a delicious, spiced reminder of a time when the holiday table was less about distinct courses and more of a robust, all-in-one feast. **Recipe Link:** [Old-Fashioned Mincemeat Pie Recipe from 1798](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDFuhDAQAF8DnZHXgA2FizR0lzYl2sNr2MjYyPiO3O-jyxfSj2ak-brNN-TAcf3EnWzxaY50nYFKoTwX_MnkH9Gdd159SsVzoBOjm5VUvQAQrZwdcnjNXe2sJ1LU1mTB6K6XcmhNvVl0ZtEjgNHgx7sfh35cjNY0aJRgEGq2bxtAKwGkAd0sHSpjWk1d73XbYdVJclxSbr4Tx7KRD6_0pNwsaa-D3Uo5zqr9qNRUqem6riY98kaZC66U_EYYyvZmKzWl4ITHc-MUyYmd40I7YREHk8i08EHC57QLMONQqanO1h0Xh8CnNlUn1x05_GXLv149rfoNAAD__0Gdfoc) _Have you ever had a full-fledged mincemeat pie? clean_body: A new analysis projects that the average next year, thanks to retroactive cuts in a sweeping tax law signed by President Trump in July. | | | | | | Sunday, November 30, 2025 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1876, the first Thanksgiving Day took place. Yale won 2-0 in a contest that resembled rugby more than modern football. Have you ever wondered why people ? Today’s Flyover spotlights new research that breaks down the excuses and expectations behind one of America’s most relatable tiny dilemmas. Do you return your shopping carts? Hit reply, we’re curious. This edition is a bit shorter than usual as our team takes time to enjoy the holiday with their families. We’ll be back with the full-length version on Monday. Today’s sponsor is , the app that makes learning piano simple, intuitive, and actually fun. Our founder has been testing it and was amazed at how quickly he was able to start playing real songs, even as a beginner. Currently, , so if you’ve ever wanted to learn, this is the perfect moment. | Tax Refunds Could Jump by $1,000 in 2026 A new analysis projects that the average next year, thanks to retroactive cuts in a sweeping tax law signed by President Trump in July. The average refund is expected to hit $4,151, up from $3,151 in the 2025 filing season. The law eliminates taxes on some overtime and tipped income and raises the SALT deduction cap from $10,000 to $40,000, driving what could be one of the largest refund seasons on record. Most benefits will go to earners, with the biggest gains for households making $60,000 to $400,000. FBI's Bigfoot File Goes Public The FBI quietly investigated a in the 1970s, according to a newly spotlighted 22-page file in its Freedom of Information Act Vault. In 1976, Peter Byrne of Oregon’s Bigfoot Information Center sent about 15 hairs attached to a piece of skin to the Bureau, claiming it was the most promising sample in years. Although the FBI initially declined, the media coverage prompted the agency to conduct tests. By mid-1977, the FBI concluded the hairs belonged to a deer, not Sasquatch, putting an end to that particular mystery. The file, primarily consisting of correspondence between Byrne and the FBI’s Scientific and Technical Services Division, is now available alongside records on notable figures such as Al Capone and Marilyn Monroe. . Middle-Class Life in 1980 vs 2025 A new report shows how growth for American middle-class families over the past 45 years, based on data from the Pew Research Center and federal agencies. In 1980, the median household earned $21,020—enough to buy a $64,600 home even with mortgage rates at 13.8%, cover a car, and take a vacation, often on one income. By 2025, the median income is $80,610, but the typical home now costs $410,000—nearly five times that amount—and a new car averages over $47,000. While modern wages are higher, the report finds today’s middle class faces far greater financial strain, with two incomes often required just to match the modest security one used to provide. . () Flying together with our sponsor ➤A quick, 10-second at-home test using just your toothbrush and can reveal whether your saliva contains toxins that may be damaging your teeth and putting you at risk of tooth loss. —and rejuvenate—your teeth and gums starting today. | Romania opened Europe’s largest Christmas market, a holiday event that surpasses traditional markets in Austria, France, and Germany. | Whatever happened to mincemeat pie? As you enjoy a slice of pumpkin pie this Thanksgiving weekend, consider the forgotten history of its neighbor on the dessert plate: . Today, the small, spiced pastry we know as mince pie is purely sweet. Yet its original form was a substantial, savory-sweet marvel containing minced mutton, veal, or venison, a true "mince meat" pie. Dating back to medieval times, these pies were a critical method of food preservation. The thick crust encased meat, spices (like cloves and nutmeg), and fruit—a perfect sealed container to survive the long winter. This hearty dish embodied the spirit of the fall feast: using and preserving every bit of the harvest, including the meat. The meat began its slow vanishing act from the pie for two main reasons. First, a cultural shift in the 17th century drove a wedge between savory and sweet dishes, relegating the mince pie to the dessert course. Secondly, as refrigeration improved and sugar became cheaper, the pie’s role as a meat preserver became obsolete. The mince pie of today, made with fruits, spices, and sugar—but no meat—is a sweet ghost of its former self, a historical relic that survived the test of time, politics, and changing tastes. It’s a delicious, spiced reminder of a time when the holiday table was less about distinct courses and more of a robust, all-in-one feast. Recipe Link: Have you ever had a full-fledged mincemeat pie?
