| | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw
---
Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18]

He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. I'm the ONLY Democrat in this race who has polling that shows we can win, and with your help, we can build the grassroots campaign that finally flips Texas blue:](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8a1e1c92-6c25-4103-a5fc-c902deaefa82/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| Last cycle, we outran the presidential campaign by almost 200,000 votes – more than any other Senate campaign in the country. That's proof that your support has the power to reach across party lines and build the kind of coalition it takes to win tough races here in Texas. Republicans like Ken Paxton and John Cornyn are putting the interests of their wealthy donors ahead of hardworking families, and Texans are fed up and ready for real change. Which is why the political forecasters at The Hill are saying this Senate seat is one of the top five most likely to flip. But here's the reality: Those wealthy mega donors my opponents are beholden to poured over $117 million into the 2024 election to keep their grip on power in Texas – and they're already gearing up to spend whatever it takes to win in 2026. The only way we can keep up is if grassroots donors like you are in this with me, Peter. [So, I have to ask: Will you chip in $5 or more today between my campaign and Blue Amp Action to help me hit my $50,000 fundraising and keep building on the historic grassroots movement we've been building?](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc3e744b6-876e-48e8-80d0-ad515a31e887/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade, it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in a democracy, not a dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T27efc6dc-6188-4f36-8dc2-482c9bc56b9f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

Which is why the political forecasters at The Hill are saying this Senate seat is one of the top five most likely to flip. But here's the reality: Those wealthy mega donors my opponents are beholden to poured over $117 million into the 2024 election to keep their grip on power in Texas – and they're already gearing up to spend whatever it takes to win in 2026. The only way we can keep up is if grassroots donors like you are in this with me, Peter. | | | | | | | This team has already changed the game in Texas. With your help, we can finish the job. Thank you, Colin | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good ---|--- | | | | | | Blue Amp Action PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208 | Having trouble viewing this email? | | | | | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade, it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect: after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t. When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families. Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in a democracy, not a dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can. | Paid for by Blue Amp Action | | or

# Sunday, November 30, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1864, Confederate General [Hiram B. Granbury](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFugzAQxvGnMRvIZ8Amg4cubOnaEZ3rA6waO7IvIXn7Kn2Fzj_p-6T_13W5YoghbZ94kOXnmpdEZ43ETGWpXO7b9mbOhdw9RP9WxkVJNbYAbS8XjyG-lqHx1kl_gYYsGD2McpBmanZ7mUhqh0oDAUgDBrQZV91PhvrR0dAE-x4D6CUoCTB2OMG0ksaR-kGryyoGST5wLh3vxPTEusZXflDpvvPRRLsz36roP4SahZrP8-y47phTDIm6XDah5h2Tdzn_CDVT4hKoCjVvBZO7l1e7h4JH60pONaemWH87Q4yhaiMGuR0Y4t8T_6_Pw6rfAAAA___1JHuE)--the namesake of Hood County's seat of government--was killed in the Battle of Franklin. We hope you've had a wonderful Thanksgiving weekend so far. Today's edition will be a bit shorter than usual while we spend time with our families. We'll be back with a full edition tomorrow. If you love supporting Texas-made products, you'll want to see how today's sponsor, [Chill Country](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0L2O5CAQBOCnsTNGgH_GDggumWwuvdBqoMEtYTOC9vy8_cmr3SfY-CtVSfXvvtyBEu3xL2xo-B3ysuOrJmTGslQuR4wncy5oD0r-VIZFSz0IpUQnFw-UPkvfemOln1WLRl3HfpC9vE7tapyevR8CgFUASlo3O9uFblCTtN00QUvmLFOqk0pLpYYLTGoKOMKAXT_qOTS9RE-cy4VXZHxDDemTn1guLm9tMivzozbdn0bfGn1zK6Xk8rFz-ZyBRt8eJfvDcf1R8c1VBKgswDHtUeQSYScn0JNNWEU8to2wtsX4x4tSojpem17GDSh9LfPv_noa_T8AAP__uF2DcA), is crafting some of the cleanest, most effective edibles in the Lone Star State--now with a can't-miss Black Friday BOGO deal.
* * *
**Take ****_The Flyover_**** with you. **Busy day? Listen to our daily 15-minute podcast while commuting, cooking, or walking the dog--your _Flyover _fix, anywhere.

## Communities Hit by Floods Struggling to Rebuild
Months after this summer's flash floods in the Hill Country and Central Texas, home and business owners are [struggling to rebuild](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0L-upSAQBvCnwY4TQPxzCopt7O62WxqEUcmOcAKjXt9-w77C7b7kl8z3Zf58zV82YIjbb3uAoe81zRHugkAEeS6Uz22rTCnDcgb0VcnOSqiOS8lbMXsb8Jl1480i_Fs2YOTQ605oMYzNbuSywHt1rh3FqLsFFt3bQcLirdNu1K4Jph6TshVSCSm7lx3luEJvO2h1r94r0wJ8oJRftAPBty0rPumC_HLpaNDsRJ_C2l9MTUxN932__hZLFZma6l6mJkzOIlNTrWJqkrLmmvaAyF06I-WHr5iS5-XMV7hSLrxQ1ZiIh8g_kA8bIRLf0wHcnznEjdMOfE8YvH1qT5ON_9wBMZR-YFpshw34fyf97LuXUf8CAAD__5s4kQM), with some [opting to relocate](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2O6yAQhZ8Gd1jMYGO7oLiNu9x2SwuHwUaLQwSTv7dfJdo32PrTOUfn-zotJxdTvGz_3UGWnyEvF3rURMxUlsrltm1vzLnQeovJvym7BRX2EkBqtXgX02vpGm9X5SdoyMJgul51ahib3Rql13E1SqswniEYXNFNk4Eeez1pGJpo32UAWgEqgL51I4yBjOtJdwanIDpFPnIuLe_E9HQ1pFe-U2nP-WiS3ZmvVeh_AmeB81Zi5TaXTeBMTy50kHyQ452KwPkTlyHl7KvcbxeW31TKPaZE8vehwLkp1l8fMaVYzSA6tR0ups8a_83R3eJPAAAA__-e5HyE). According to property data firm Cotality, over 38,600 homes were [in the flood zone](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGuozAQRb_GdEYeYwyvcLENXbbdEjnMGCwNOLKdkPz9ivzC60Y6o3Ov7r_bfPOR47H-9Tu5-g5pPugsTLVSnkvNz3W9cE2Z7s_IeNHqZ610LwFkp2b0kT-zadDdFf5AQw4Ga3pl1DA2mxuXYEFhbxc1gleayCJ2xiIsYbCATXSXDKBToBVA3_oRxkDW99QZq3-CMIow1pTbulGlty-BP-lFuV3S3rDban0U0f0RehJ6Os-zzeT5-l_SLvR0VRZ6qpkO_B6XQgb2ZZOBU0Lpmekjt7RTkfGQ6I-VstBTkx0-zsgcix2EUevuI39T6--2ejn9PwAA__9TvX_H) of the affected counties, and the storm caused $1.1 billion in [damage to residences](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOhCAQhp8GOw0gihYU19jttVcahEG5zMoGZtf17S_uK1w3yTf5_vz_z22-2YhxX7_tHQy9Q5p3OAoCEeS5UH6u64UpZVieEf1Fyc6Sy64Wom757G3Ec1aVNwv3o6jACN2rjiuuh2ozw-L6sVNOaWtDqxatYRBygTF03CkdqmgumRAtF5IL0TV2EEOA3nbQql6OgSkOPlLKDW1A8LYl4JlekBuX7hWajehRWPvF5MTkdBxH4xJZjHReD0xOcS9x3agwOdlM0SFc5-8Tz_rTw8FO2WL9cdcBU_KlysY_jogYS6-Z4uvdRvwE0v9mehn5FwAA___1wH4p). In Kerr County, where more than 2,000 structures were damaged, only 2% of homeowners had flood insurance policies. FEMA's National Flood Insurance Program could pay up to $135 million in claims, and the Community Foundation of the Texas Hill Country has [raised $100 million](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGypCAQRb8Gs7YAFWcCgk3I3qYbWiiNUg9lCtrn-PdbzH7CZl11um6fvn--pi8bYjjW33ZHTW-fpgOvEpEI81Qon-taMaWM8xmiq5TsJLkcQAjo-ORsiPfUN07P3D1Fg1qMqh94z8dHs2kvZ89FP3KBStnBqaEb0XWjHFSH_smboGuYEB0XkgsxtPYhHh6VHbDrlXx61nN0gVJuaUPCty0-3ukHc7ukvYl6I3oV1v1i0jBprutqv4ulCpk01ZdJE9NiI5OmnmLSCFFnxaTxMSUHGZcaeEOJ6YJwwDfmDEs6D7rBYXkFQhCc75BtKOhgvuFjAluI8d9ivsGn83CWQjogYwkODypQ7M2kabJ2ryvEGIoaWc_X3Yb4eYD-r_YfLf8GAAD__094mJ0) for flood victims. About $42 million has yet to be distributed. Many victims have [encountered challenges](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD0SmzAQhU8jOjHS8l-oSKPOaVMya7SCTQTywNrYt8_gJgdIs803b9-b79dtvCEn3uafuJKTd8zjRueRSIT28ZD9Oc8XlrzT_ckpXFRwBAONtlZXZgzI6TPWRXB3EwZbkLNdWzemNl1fLG6A1piqqqPBabDDNAWgvosBqxabfjIFu-uZtZWxYKxtSuxtH6nFhqq6hSGq2lBgyXspCwm98Yjpk1-0l1Nei-QWkcehqh8KvAJ_nmf550C5oAJ_7VXgvzEF_qpS4K25TqvAv3gSXg-do_79TB8dU86Bt1nzpr8h_U-ClqxnEh15w21iTHqh9NBxz6uOtKICX-wuPE5OiY-2U7WZV-T03Sn_Z_fl4G8AAAD__y8Uj4Y) securing FEMA aid. Over 100 volunteers showed up for a work day in Travis County's Sandy Creek community this month to [continue cleanup efforts](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkT2P3CAQQH8N7ljxYYNduEjj7tKmtAYYvOhYs4Lx-vbfR76kSZ3yzZOeZjS_PtYPSDnt20944Exfsaw7ni0jEda1UT227dJUKroj5XBZglUJNXApuRZrgJTfa9-F2YkwyQ5naU0_iF7YsbvPYLUxRlttBj3ZqMzkrPXWxhDN2Efo0nzFpNRCKiHlcINRjhENDKh7o6bIeoEhUak3uiPhF7SY3-WF9ebLo8vznejZmP7B1MLUcp7n7fN14CWZWqBS8hmZWq7NmVoaAV34HeJ_h38g5lICU4tLG2-whzf3FfGT-4yw8-PJfdkp7Qc2_ir52AmxNg4p8IotBdyp8X9LykxcBqcCeMd1GD3vg1PcDUbxMIHUEbwx2nV1Ds8z5ZyasawX2wNS_j6P_u8pr1n9DgAA__-H16Jz). Some residents have asked Gov. Greg Abbott to [create a $500 million fund](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0L2u3CAQhuGrwR0rGDDYBUUadydtSoufYRcd1hwBttd3Hzm3kPqRZl59f77WL5ty2p6_7RtN_8Sybni2jL1jXVuv-_N5cy8V3Z5yuLXbFRiMlHMq2Bpsytcqh2AcCzMf0HCt5Mgk09PwMg7V7Jh2OLlRa68tsGnSwSnhhQ7KD8ncxzgXjAPjfHzYiU8RlR1RSAVzJJJhSL3UR39hx49tMV_lwPrw5T1k8-r9pxHxi8BCYDnP8_F97HgjgcXWnnxGAstdTmDJxdtMYGl2Cxf1FfGbtr0e6Si10WpzvmgslYbUbOtYady3QHuhFf39lMACaqbeMfDjLClGAVROGKjj0VHPHNrRCyc4DtWEnzPlnJrSRLLn26b8L7r_39SHgb8BAAD__36Fk80) to provide assistance to flood victims. Business owners like Steve Edelstein, whose Ingram Dam Shopping Center was destroyed, are without a source of income while they rebuild. "_I had to deal with the reality of the flood, and now I have to deal with the reality of the finances_ ," [he said](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkc2umzAQhZ_G7Bz5B0hYsKgUsbvddokGPIB1Bzuyh3Dz9pXTVn2Au7O-T_KcOfPrY_wATz6sP2HHnr-WOAY8MyEzpjFzOta1aI4Jp8OTK5ZhNMo0Umtp1ejA02usK9dPynW6wl5f27pRtbreqq1XrTI3hNp1yjYdWu26Vrtlgmszzaaxle_LZ1pbpY3SurnATd8WbKFBW7emW0St0HmO6cIbMn5BXugVn5guc9wr6jfmRxb2hzCDMMN5npfPDFykMEPJK8xAcQYSZiijhBm0fr-FGTZPJOd4BE4vuVCMLktCeKL8xJT-mJecjuwD5oxZ_u9EcpR_W5F7DLxlScCYSg47HLyPOR5pRmHvfHp-m7bgHZ0_dmHvOc6-xHrTGfYH-DUUHtw_GANjYGHvZSdtqtS7x-mJfG6volbrDp7ePfD3rvfsze8AAAD__9ppsow).
## Religious Liberty Commission Coming to Texas
In May, President Trump announced the creation of the Religious Liberty Commission, with Texas Lt. Gov. Dan Patrick [as its chair](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0L-KhDAQx_GniV0kifFfkWIb4Yo92OpKiWbU4aJZknFd3_5wX-G6gS8MH34_9_5u0eM2f9sVDL2n0G9wJA9EEPtEcZ_nK1OIMOzo3VXJ9kqokkvJC9E7i_7sdebMIFwrMzCyrnQptKibbDFyHKpWS22hKu0kxwlcUzeldgJU26gqQ3M9k7IQUgkpy9w2spmgsiUUulLtxLQAhxRiTgsQvG2a_BleEPMxrJk3C9EzseLGVMdUdxxHvqbtakx1sPE9MdVdbKa6z-3sxp-WIo6_3IPjETzOGPbEPQ4Q6eRjWFdMCcPGMfEUPDp_8hgCgeO48Q-Cqc5GfrvJx8N-LVk07nmg95iqmmkxrxb9B0j_m_Vl1F8AAAD__9Fejv4). The 17-member commission has held each of its three previous hearings at the Museum of the Bible in the nation's capital, but its fourth is scheduled for next month [in Dallas](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGOrCAUxvGnwU4DCDpTUNzGbm67pQE54NmgTOA4zrz9xn2FrX_J9yX_r8f8sJhwj__tBobeIc87nDUBEZS5UjlivJhyAXdg8peSnSWXuhWi7fnsLabPrBpvHPd30YAR46A0V3y8NauxQdy18M5zq50agh0X7pz2WlgdeA8NmmtMiJ4LyYXQnb2JW4DBaujVIO-BKQ4eKZeOViB42xrSJ7-gdEvemmRWomdl_T8mJyan8zy776MSLtDF_GJyKpAwYj5qm9BBoU-75G3DWjHvTE7Hc8kb7rFdwRbcY22K8c8TU8I6jEzxuFlMv1_0t0IvI38CAAD__6DPfkQ). In addition to Patrick, several members of the [unpaid commission](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0MHq3CAQx_GnMTcXNSZmDx72klP_LYVCj8GNYzJgNOhks_v2JX2F_23gA8OX39-v6cthxLT8dBtYeoc8JThrBCIoU6VyLMvFlAs8D4z-UnKTEqrjUvJWTN5h_Ey68fYp_F02YKXpdSe0MEOzWt2bILTXba8GHwbjw6y890YFI-7aDA3a65mUrZBKSNnd3CCHAL3roNW9ugemBXikXG60AsHb1RA_-QXlNuetiXYl2itrH0yNTI3ned62mi5jaoTEj8rUeGUzNe45IuF8neeaeYXygspz4nuBih4ScZ-Ti55TObadV14g4oL5qDziEwp9-Jy3DWvFnJgaXeGPh_z958fxqynW7yfGiLU3TItlcxj_J9L3hn1Z9S8AAP__FZyQIw) have ties to Texas, including Dr. Phil McGraw, Kelly Shackelford of the Plano-based First Liberty Institute, and Ryan Anderson, a professor at the University of Dallas and the president of the Ethics and Public Policy Center. "_If there's any place that would probably be associated with independence and freedom and the ability to believe what you believe, I think Texas is at the top of that list_ ," Shackelford said. The commission has discussed perceived attacks on religious liberty, particularly [in education](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL3OnDAQRZ_GdEb-w0DhIg3dlzYlGuwBLBm8smeX5e0j8grpRnOuro7un5_5B2KK5_YbDnT0XfN84lUTEmGZK5X3tj2YcsHlHVN4KMGshOq4lFyLOUBM92ya4BYRRtmgk701nTCiH5rd6VEb6K0KFnBcjUS9dLpbfCelEKB8E91TJqUWUgkpuxYGOaxooUNtrBpXZgSGSLm0tCPhF-qa7vzB0vp8NMntRK_K9C-mJqam67paD7TnFP0jCxue_n6iTE3Pg6lJWTsYzdRUMMUt5nflKS5Y6OY-H0esNeaT7wil8rXkgxOC37FU7vNzVF79nnPiCSFgqU1x4XXFlGK1PTNiOyCmf3b0f5t-nPobAAD__2mhjuk), and will issue a report with recommendations to the White House next summer.

On this day in 1864, Confederate General namesake of Hood County's seat of government--was killed in the Battle of Franklin. We hope you've had a wonderful Thanksgiving weekend so far. Today's edition will be a bit shorter than usual while we spend time with our families. We'll be back with a full edition tomorrow. If you love supporting Texas-made products, you'll want to see how today's sponsor, , is crafting some of the cleanest, most effective edibles in the Lone Star State--now with a can't-miss Black Friday BOGO deal. Take **The Flyover with you. Busy day? Listen to our daily 15-minute podcast while commuting, cooking, or walking the dog--your Flyover fix, anywhere. | | | Communities Hit by Floods Struggling to Rebuild Months after this summer's flash floods in the Hill Country and Central Texas, home and business owners are , with some . According to property data firm Cotality, over 38,600 homes were of the affected counties, and the storm caused $1.1 billion in . In Kerr County, where more than 2,000 structures were damaged, only 2% of homeowners had flood insurance policies. FEMA's National Flood Insurance Program could pay up to $135 million in claims, and the Community Foundation of the Texas Hill Country has for flood victims. About $42 million has yet to be distributed. Many victims have securing FEMA aid. Over 100 volunteers showed up for a work day in Travis County's Sandy Creek community this month to . Some residents have asked Gov. Greg Abbott to to provide assistance to flood victims. Business owners like Steve Edelstein, whose Ingram Dam Shopping Center was destroyed, are without a source of income while they rebuild. "I had to deal with the reality of the flood, and now I have to deal with the reality of the finances ," . Religious Liberty Commission Coming to Texas In May, President Trump announced the creation of the Religious Liberty Commission, with Texas Lt. Gov. Dan Patrick . The 17-member commission has held each of its three previous hearings at the Museum of the Bible in the nation's capital, but its fourth is scheduled for next month . In addition to Patrick, several members of the have ties to Texas, including Dr. Phil McGraw, Kelly Shackelford of the Plano-based First Liberty Institute, and Ryan Anderson, a professor at the University of Dallas and the president of the Ethics and Public Policy Center. "If there's any place that would probably be associated with independence and freedom and the ability to believe what you believe, I think Texas is at the top of that list ," Shackelford said. The commission has discussed perceived attacks on religious liberty, particularly , and will issue a report with recommendations to the White House next summer. | Flying together with our sponsor Legal Edibles Made Right Here in Texas While other states were getting all the glory, Texas quietly got to work. isn't just another edibles company--we're your Hill Country neighbors crafting the cleanest, tastiest, most effective edibles in the Lone Star State. name: Suzanne Beecher
subject: Kaley could use your prayers
body:
She's fighting censorship at the Supreme Court

| | | [](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyckc2O3CAQhJ8G3zyiAXs9Bx9WsSzlsFFOm6PVA20PCgbEj6N5-8iZnRfIDVGfqrq6f30sH2id9dsP3GnUh11SXn6jo4cO1Zma6RFqigkflPIiuOhagFbyE_MBzbpAY0ZteikaGuGtVx3vBhia-6jWq1xvCBxpGNYOeqUFUne94g1v2KvGjqcfgOQgJAd1Ub0Bo4kLQDV03ZUpXqPBQvmig8-UDiz2IOt9OF_BX3TYGzfeS4mZyXcmZiZmNKujDd0lpI2JOdcYQypMzBr3iHbz7bPOScs5h5o06WCIyQmAy4EryURfy748NSanmEKOpIv125e0k7F1Z3KiHa37-nwFMDnpu3WUn0FLpGLPcV9Y8IV8YXL6hOXne_vt83v72kSTRhP_WOds7t-Y4ttp_69m-c_rHKP4GwAA__-WLKLn)
**[Sign Your Name to Commit to Pray for Kaley's Supreme Court Case](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyckc2O3CAQhJ8G3zyiAXs9Bx9WsSzlsFFOm6PVA20PCgbEj6N5-8iZnRfIDVGfqrq6f30sH2id9dsP3GnUh11SXn6jo4cO1Zma6RFqigkflPIiuOhagFbyE_MBzbpAY0ZteikaGuGtVx3vBhia-6jWq1xvCBxpGNYOeqUFUne94g1v2KvGjqcfgOQgJAd1Ub0Bo4kLQDV03ZUpXqPBQvmig8-UDiz2IOt9OF_BX3TYGzfeS4mZyXcmZiZmNKujDd0lpI2JOdcYQypMzBr3iHbz7bPOScs5h5o06WCIyQmAy4EryURfy748NSanmEKOpIv125e0k7F1Z3KiHa37-nwFMDnpu3WUn0FLpGLPcV9Y8IV8YXL6hOXne_vt83v72kSTRhP_WOds7t-Y4ttp_69m-c_rHKP4GwAA__-WLKLn)** Dear Fellow American, We're less than a month away from one of the biggest free speech cases at the U.S. Supreme Court!

Kaley Chiles will stand alongside her ADF attorneys to challenge a Colorado law that censors her speech in counseling conversations. It forbids licensed counselors like Kaley from having conversations that could help clients regain comfort with their sex--_even if that 's the client's goal._

It's a clear violation of the First Amendment. But this case also points to a much deeper, spiritual battle.

Laws like this one allow lies to spread--lies like one's sex can be changed and God makes mistakes with His creation. And these laws suppress truth from going forward by forbidding people like Kaley from speaking it.

Kaley is stepping up to challenge this law. And a win in her case could help roll back similar laws in 22 other states.

**I want you to think about that for a moment. One young woman 's courageous stand could reach countless lives with the truth.**

I've had the privilege of getting to know Kaley over the last few months, and I have been so encouraged by her unwavering hope in the Lord and commitment to the truth.

It's not been an easy road. The law threatens exorbitant fines and even loss of her license if she follows her convictions in the counseling room. She's also facing tremendous backlash for choosing to push back on this law--and more is sure to come. Our enemy, the father of lies, will work to oppose the truth and those who speak it at every turn.

But your prayers can make a difference. As we prepare for oral argument in Kaley's case on October 7th, will you please pray...
* **For Kaley** -- that God would strengthen and encourage her in the weeks leading up to her case, and that she would sense His peace in the months to come as we await the Court's decision
* **For her ADF attorneys** --that they would have clarity of mind and speech as they go to the Supreme Court, and that they would represent the Lord and our clients well
* **For our culture** --that God would use this case to open more eyes to the harms of gender ideology, and that hearts would turn toward the truth of knowing Him

[ Commit to Pray](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyckc2O3CAQhJ8G3zyiAXs9Bx9WsSzlsFFOm6PVA20PCgbEj6N5-8iZnRfIDVGfqrq6f30sH2id9dsP3GnUh11SXn6jo4cO1Zma6RFqigkflPIiuOhagFbyE_MBzbpAY0ZteikaGuGtVx3vBhia-6jWq1xvCBxpGNYOeqUFUne94g1v2KvGjqcfgOQgJAd1Ub0Bo4kLQDV03ZUpXqPBQvmig8-UDiz2IOt9OF_BX3TYGzfeS4mZyXcmZiZmNKujDd0lpI2JOdcYQypMzBr3iHbz7bPOScs5h5o06WCIyQmAy4EryURfy748NSanmEKOpIv125e0k7F1Z3KiHa37-nwFMDnpu3WUn0FLpGLPcV9Y8IV8YXL6hOXne_vt83v72kSTRhP_WOds7t-Y4ttp_69m-c_rHKP4GwAA__-WLKLn) Thank you for your prayers--it's such an encouragement to know that friends like you are going to the Lord on our behalf!

In Christ, **Suzanne Beecher**
Legal Counsel
Alliance Defending Freedom

P.S. [Please sign your name to let Kaley and our ADF team know that you're praying for them as we prepare for this case at the U.S. Supreme Court!](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyckc2O3CAQhJ8G3zyiAXs9Bx9WsSzlsFFOm6PVA20PCgbEj6N5-8iZnRfIDVGfqrq6f30sH2id9dsP3GnUh11SXn6jo4cO1Zma6RFqigkflPIiuOhagFbyE_MBzbpAY0ZteikaGuGtVx3vBhia-6jWq1xvCBxpGNYOeqUFUne94g1v2KvGjqcfgOQgJAd1Ub0Bo4kLQDV03ZUpXqPBQvmig8-UDiz2IOt9OF_BX3TYGzfeS4mZyXcmZiZmNKujDd0lpI2JOdcYQypMzBr3iHbz7bPOScs5h5o06WCIyQmAy4EryURfy748NSanmEKOpIv125e0k7F1Z3KiHa37-nwFMDnpu3WUn0FLpGLPcV9Y8IV8YXL6hOXne_vt83v72kSTRhP_WOds7t-Y4ttp_69m-c_rHKP4GwAA__-WLKLn)

---
Alliance Defending Freedom 15100 N. 90th Street, Scottsdale, Arizona 85260

---

Pop Acta Media | Conservative Innovation
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

name: Katie Porter
subject: The power to protect our progress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=40480%2E3422442%2E0dvaZR)
Peter,
Often I’m asked why I’m running for governor. The answer is simple: **I feel the same call to serve now that I did when I first ran for office in 2018.**
Right now, so many of our fundamental freedoms are under attack from the Trump Administration. Immigrants are being targeted in their homes and schools. Critics are being silenced in the media. Women’s reproductive freedom is at risk nationwide. And our economy is only working for the rich and well-connected—not working families.
I’m running to stand up to these attacks, but with a self-funding billionaire jumping into our race, I’m counting on your support. **[Can you chip in $5 to help us hit our $45,000 goal before our midnight deadline?](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20251130_1_ak.SaDS2M&refcode=em20251130-40480&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=40480%2E3422442%2E0dvaZR)**
**The governor of California holds immense power to protect our progress.** As the world’s 4th largest economy and the nation’s most populous state, California can’t be ignored. If we work together, we can resist Trump’s agenda and defend our freedoms.
**As governor, I won’t let that power go to waste.** I’m ready with bold ideas to lower costs, tackle our housing crisis, and help every Californian thrive free from Trump’s authoritarian tactics.
But this race is highly competitive, and we can’t afford to fall behind. The only way we win is by proving the size and strength of our movement. That’s where you come in.
**[Please donate $5 to our campaign to help us close our budget gap before we close the books on the month. We’re counting on you to help us reach our $45,000 goal.](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20251130_1_ak.SaDS2M&refcode=em20251130-40480&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=40480%2E3422442%2E0dvaZR)**
[Donate ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20251130_1_ak.SaDS2M&refcode=em20251130-40480&t=23&akid=40480%2E3422442%2E0dvaZR)
Thank you so much for all you do,
Katie

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20251130-40480&amounts=&t=24&refcode2=40480_3422442_0dvaZR&akid=40480%2E3422442%2E0dvaZR)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4g-emails?source=40480&t=25&akid=40480%2E3422442%2E0dvaZR)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4g-em-update-info-footer?source=40480)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4g-unsubscribe?source=40480&t=26&akid=40480%2E3422442%2E0dvaZR)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Governor 2026
PO Box 5176, Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)

name: Haley Stevens
subject: No choice but to ask again
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
Coming up short isn't an option

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=1511%2E49239%2Ebh9zAZ)
| Null, I promise I wouldn't follow up like this if it wasn't important.
---
Our crucial end-of-month fundraising deadline is coming up at midnight, but we're still short of our $350,000 goal. Each and every dollar matters in this battleground Senate race, which experts say could decide Senate control. **With so much at stake, falling short tonight simply isn't an option, but I need your immediate help to close the gap.**
**[Please, can I count on you to donate $5 or more right away to help us reach our end-of-month goal, win in Michigan, and flip the Senate blue?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/9888?t=2&akid=1511%2E49239%2Ebh9zAZ)**
| | [Donate Now](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/9888?t=3&akid=1511%2E49239%2Ebh9zAZ)
---
Thank you so much,
Haley
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Haley Stevens**
Subject: Got to ask...
| | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/9890?t=4&akid=1511%2E49239%2Ebh9zAZ)
---
Hi null, it's Haley writing to you with a very straightforward question:

**[Is there anything I can say to convince you to donate $5 – before my crucial end-of-month fundraising deadline – to help me win Michigan's battleground Senate race?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/9900?t=5&akid=1511%2E49239%2Ebh9zAZ)**
What if I told you that there is no path to flipping the Senate blue unless we protect Michigan's Senate seat?
What if I told you that I'm statistically tied with my Trump-backed opponent, Mike Rogers, among independent voters – and that your gift could help me surge ahead in the polls?

What if I told you I was born and raised in Michigan, and I’m in this fight for the Michiganders I know and love, not billionaire donors like the ones backing my GOP opponent?

What if I told you that national Republicans and their dark money super PACs have already started pouring money into Michigan, and that the worst is yet to come?

What if I told you Trump and his MAGA Republicans could eclipse $80 million in spending, which is what they spent last time trying to flip Michigan red?
Null, I can win this race. But only with committed grassroots supporters like you fighting alongside me. That's why hitting my $350,000 end-of-month fundraising goal – one donation at a time – is absolutely crucial.

**[So will you please chip in $5 to help me win in Michigan, take back the Senate for Democrats, and put a stop to Trump's chaos agenda?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/9900?t=6&akid=1511%2E49239%2Ebh9zAZ)**

Haley

name: Jon Ossoff
subject: This message is different
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
body:
Normally when I write to you via email, I like them to be different from the other messages you get from most elected officials.
[](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251130_1_ossoff.qhJBsz&refcode=em20251130-1&t=1&akid=3780%2E582294%2E_h03-E)
Normally when you see my name in your inbox, I like the messages to be different from the other emails you get from most elected officials.
I've written to you in detail about the depth of corruption and self-enrichment of the Trump Administration, the President's thirst for political retribution and intimidation, along with other things I am seeing or working on in Washington, D.C. and at home in Georgia.
This message is different. It's more direct.
I am reaching out today with a last-ditch request for a contribution to my campaign before our end-of-month fundraising drive comes to a close. Here's why:
This race will be one of the most competitive and expensive in the nation. I am the only Democratic Senator up for re-election in a state Trump won in 2024 and that makes me MAGA’s #1 target.
In 2020, the pundits said flipping a Republican Senate seat in Georgia couldn’t be done. But we built one of the strongest voter mobilization programs in Senate campaign history — and we won. That victory won the Senate majority.
Now we must win again. And we will win again.
Just like last time, I can’t do it alone.
So I’m asking:
**[Please split a contribution between my re-election campaign and Chris Pappas today before our end-of-month fundraising drive comes to a close.](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251130_1_ossoff.qhJBsz&refcode=em20251130-1&t=2&akid=3780%2E582294%2E_h03-E)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251130_1_ossoff.qhJBsz&amount=5&refcode=em20251130-1&t=21&akid=3780%2E582294%2E_h03-E)**
The average online donation to our campaign is around $30. Many give less. Some give more.
All that matters is that lots and lots of people are contributing what they can before our deadline. **[Please, contribute today.](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251130_1_ossoff.qhJBsz&refcode=em20251130-1&t=22&akid=3780%2E582294%2E_h03-E)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251130_1_ossoff.qhJBsz&amount=5&refcode=em20251130-1&t=23&akid=3780%2E582294%2E_h03-E)**
Thank you,
Jon Ossoff
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.chrispappas.org/signup/cps_receive_fewer_emails/?t=24&akid=3780%2E582294%2E_h03-E)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.chrispappas.org/signup/cps_update_your_information/?t=25&akid=3780%2E582294%2E_h03-E)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.chrispappas.org/unsubscribe/cps_unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=3780%2E582294%2E_h03-E)

Email us: [teampappas@chrispappas.org](mailto:teampappas@chrispappas.org)
Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
Chris Pappas for Senate
PO Box 313
Manchester, NH 03105
United States

subject: The $2,000 Tax Season Secret the IRS Hopes You Don’t Discover ∕ Sunday, November 30, 2025
body:
Every tax season, millions of Americans unknowingly leave money on the table. | | | [-](https://links.research.firstinvestmentupdates.com/u/click?_t=6c5e8d0087884bb7b7cd2e3abb0e6b5f&_m=43d9110d3d334ac7b2533525b12c48aa&_e=aMrVG7mKeu96OJmOuqh4Dy5ZcgVUcJ96cvAELk20bDJAaYoEU9ddf9qc_nVOVBFrR2Yc07c5lVk8B8qNUO0dSmRnpumCT2AgzYopqgMWonv0YUiqfiBFV1v-uX0X6Rshc7MhwJK4kuTV2OJ_89e1yymPSHRr3j-2_vRWkqP3wBUcuGjRO6Ap5SyEI01Mkgjxbg4OgmkgyuQII7_Yen3CkT1cZUJZds1K6lrqqzsp50F7kwm56Ibf3eZCN5xvWP9mr54Pk-p_h9vt4rVad0k2FnOsclexyHXnoUUz1DacMUe2fgObM_vMptPn7FL2APTq-FVMPeb7JwUQJk--SWOtf5ofh3zYOrud3yM97jqNk0qWWEaEWiaHa_XKRmUGKFRx)

---
|
---
| | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw
---
Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18]

He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. clean_body: Help us unlock a REAL 600% MATCH... | Peter, In just a few short days, my grassroots campaign to FIRE Kathy Hochul will be forced to close the books once and for all on our very FIRST month of fundraising. But this is no ordinary deadline... It’s a golden opportunity to deal the FINAL BLOW to the most vulnerable governor in America’s struggling reelection campaign! You see, the State of New York unlocks matching funds at a rate of 6-to-1 once a candidate hits the fundraising benchmarks written into state law. By CRUSHING this goal, we can take a massive step towards unlocking the LEGAL MAXIMUM amount of matching funds to FIRE Hochul from office. I can’t overstate how critical these matching funds are. Kathy Hochul’s whole campaign strategy revolves around massively outspending us on the airwaves with her and her Democrat allies’ multimillion-dollar ad buys. If we unlock these matching funds, we’ll have the resources we need to cut straight through her lying attacks and put our winning message in front of every New Yorker. With Hochul’s approval rating already at a RECORD LOW and the polls showing the governor’s race is already within the margin of error, that would be nothing short of catastrophic for the worst governor in America! Our path to victory has never been clearer, Peter. But it all depends on unlocking these vital matching funds. Thank you, Elise Stefanik Paid for by Elise for Governor PO Box 500 Glens Falls, NY 12801

body:
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34844?t=1011&refcode=email-20251130_v&akid=9907%2E5885482%2ETqs58v ]Our Revolution logo

Peter Willis,

This is urgent: with just hours left in November, we’re staring down a
$12,357 shortfall on our monthly fundraising goal.

We have BIG plans for the coming months: mobilizing our Citizen Action
Team across the country to stand up to Trump, getting dark money out of
our politics, defunding the oligarchy, and so much more. But Our
Revolution doesn’t take corporate PAC money. No billionaire checks – just
people-power, and NONE of our work is possible without your support.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34844?t=1057&amount=22&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&refcode=email-20251130nd&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9907%2E5885482%2ETqs58v ]So we have to ask, can you chip in right now to help us close the gap?
Even $5 makes a difference, and if everyone reading this gives today,
we’ll smash our goal:

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation to Our Revolution will process immediately.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34844?t=1042&express_lane=true&amount=9&refcode=email-20251130nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9907%2E5885482%2ETqs58v ]CHIP IN $9 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34844?t=1043&express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-20251130nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9907%2E5885482%2ETqs58v ]CHIP IN $22

One thing is clear: the ONLY way we’re going to stop the worst of Trump’s
cruel agenda is with strategic grassroots opposition.

Trump and his oligarchs want us tired, broke, and defeated. But when we
come together to fight back, we send them a message they can’t ignore:
real power lies with the people.

That’s why we’re out in the streets, deploying our team of top-notch
organizers to coordinate volunteer-led Citizen Action Teams across the
country. We’re mobilizing a massive GOTV turnout machine in one race after
the next – with half a MILLION voter contacts to elect Mamdani alone.
We’re Fighting Oligarchy by exposing the corruption at the heart of
Trump's authoritarian capitalism with strategic and high impact campaigns
led by local volunteers and supported by our paid organizers.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34845?source=email-20251130&t=1060&akid=9907%2E5885482%2ETqs58v ]Image of recent Our Revolution actions

Just imagine what we could do if we not only reached our fundraising goal,
but surpassed it. Because we’re not letting up. We’re escalating. With

clean_body: [ ]Our Revolution logo Peter Willis, This is urgent: with just hours left in November, we’re staring down a $12,357 shortfall on our monthly fundraising goal. We have BIG plans for the coming months: mobilizing our Citizen Action Team across the country to stand up to Trump, getting dark money out of our politics, defunding the oligarchy, and so much more. But Our Revolution doesn’t take corporate PAC money. No billionaire checks – just people-power, and NONE of our work is possible without your support. [ ]So we have to ask, can you chip in right now to help us close the gap? Even $5 makes a difference, and if everyone reading this gives today, we’ll smash our goal: If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Our Revolution will process immediately. name: Roy Cooper
subject: I need your help to get us back on track
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
Can I count on you?
I’ll get right to the point, Peter —
My team sets finance metrics that we have to hit each month to keep our campaign on track. **Our goal is to raise $825,000 online in November, and with less than a day left, we’re not where we need to be.**
**[Is there any amount you can split a contribution between our campaign and Heartland Patriots right now to get us on track to meet this goal?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98308?refcode=em20251130-9766&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9766%2E614464%2EOrFzZX)**
Now, I know that fundraising isn’t what’s going to be the only thing that will win this campaign, Peter.
The real success comes from connecting with people and sharing our vision for this state — a vision that can get us back on track.
But your support _now_ is what will let us make those critical connections here in North Carolina. You see, we’re facing unified GOP efforts to defeat us — they’re already spending heavily against me, and experts expect that this race could become the first Senate election to ever cost a billion dollars or more.
That’s why the earlier your support comes in, the more of a difference you can make. A donation right here, right now — _today_ — will go further than at any other point from here on out. Our team can plan our expenses more effectively with more time, putting your donation to the best use.
**[Peter, can I count on you today? I’m personally asking you to split whatever fits in your budget between our campaign and Heartland Patriots to help meet this goal and flip this toss-up seat.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98308?refcode=em20251130-9766&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9766%2E614464%2EOrFzZX)**

The arrogance and incompetence of the Trump administration is stunning. How we respond will decide the fate of everything Democrats have worked to protect. If you don’t have time to read my entire message, can I count on you to split $10 between me and Shontel Brown? >> **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120248415/585726517/-1910430278?refcode=EM_F_251130Jefferies2_N_HJ_90DO_6_G_N_L1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNzk3ODNlNS1mNGNkLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LA4sYiyzJIowSpreIAJZvHmQiSGNEO4YsTrusp9ZMN0=)

We cannot let them get away with it. That’s why I’m marshaling grassroots supporters from coast to coast to help us have a historic fundraising day that Republicans will never see coming. Every donation helps defend democracy from extremists who are determined to dismantle it.
And this is a pivotal moment for our fight — because we’re up against a potential Supreme Court ruling that could enable Republicans to draw unfair political maps across the country.
By striking down a key plank of the Voting Rights Act, the Court could hand 19 new safe House seats to the GOP through racially discriminatory redistricting — enough to cement one-party rule for a generation.
We’re conducting a massive communications and mobilization effort to push the Court to uphold the Voting Rights Act.
We’re also preparing for the whole South to be drawing new maps in early 2026, getting ready to fight for fair representation, and building long-term momentum to outlaw extreme gerrymandering and restore federal voting protections.
**[But we’re counting on people like you to power this work. Please make one of the nine donations we’re looking for from your state before midnight to help hit November's goal and help us stop extremists from ending free and fair elections.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120250394/585733878/-1185130066?refcode=emm_ffa_20251129_T1_EOM1_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmM2M3YmM5Ni1mNWNkLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K92hxAajBf-FRYkpJVsqgFPiqYBprRLuERPKeBYwKVk=)**
In solidarity,
The Fair Fight Action Team

By striking down a key plank of the Voting Rights Act, the Court could hand 19 new safe House seats to the GOP through racially discriminatory redistricting — enough to cement one-party rule for a generation. We’re conducting a massive communications and mobilization effort to push the Court to uphold the Voting Rights Act. We’re also preparing for the whole South to be drawing new maps in early 2026, getting ready to fight for fair representation, and building long-term momentum to outlaw extreme gerrymandering and restore federal voting protections. = In solidarity, The Fair Fight Action Team * = = | 1270 Caroline Street | Suite D120-430 | Atlanta, GA 30307 ©2025 Fair Fight Action - All rights reserved. Emails like this one are the best way to communicate updates with voting rights activists like you. Thank you for being in the fight to ensure access to democracy for all. If you would like to receive fewer emails from us, please click . If you would like to no longer receive emails, please . | | PAID FOR BY FAIR FIGHT ACTION

name: Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: I wanted to inform you of some news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Peter - I wanted to inform you sooner rather than later.
I've come to truly appreciate your consistent record.
With everything you've given to our movement, there was no question in my mind that I needed to send you this message ASAP.
I'd hate to see this opportunity pass you by.
That's why as soon as the House GOP Platinum committee flagged your profile, I knew I had to extend both a message of gratitude and of urgency!

1. **THANK YOU! I am so proud of everything we have accomplished and how far you 've come in your support for the House GOP, Peter. We would not be able to deliver on our America First agenda without you!**
2. **You 're now eligible for PLATINUM STATUS! Will you please accept this status and add this critical accomplishment to your GOP legacy?**

I'm not at all worried about your continued commitment. The last thing I would ever do is question your loyalty. But I'd hate for you to miss out on your chance to upgrade today with this limited time offer!

body:

Patriot, we are on pace for a historic victory!
I am so thankful for all of the support I have already received from across the Empire State and the nation from patriots like you that are committed to saving America from Radical Leftists like Zohran Mamdani and Kathy Hochul.
Thanks to you this race in a traditionally Democrat stronghold is already within the margin of error.
**New York is now a toss-up state!**
Our message of delivering a safer and more affordable state for all is resonating with New Yorkers who are tired of nearly two decades of single party Democrat rule currently led by the embattled and deeply unpopular Governor Kathy Hochul.
**[Kathy Hochul is the _WORST_ governor in America.](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e1204349/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9ob3VzZS1nb3AtYmF0dGxlZ3JvdW5kLWZ1bmQvaGdiZl9kb25fb21fZXJfZWwtbmFkX3JzXzIwMjUxMTI1/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTExMzA/LbmNsbDRHRmQwWQ/qP3JlY3VycmluZz10cnVlJnV0bV90ZXJtPTIxOTc2X3dyMg/gaSxTIg/s3i06e65f92)**

[SAVE NEW YORK](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e1204349/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9ob3VzZS1nb3AtYmF0dGxlZ3JvdW5kLWZ1bmQvaGdiZl9kb25fb21fZXJfZWwtbmFkX3JzXzIwMjUxMTI1/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTExMzA/LbmNsbDRHRmQwWQ/qP3JlY3VycmluZz10cnVlJnV0bV90ZXJtPTIxOTc2X3dyMg/gaSxTIg/s3i06e65f92)
Under her abysmal leadership New York has implemented** _failed bail reform_** and was** _cemented as a sanctuary state_**. The results of these decisions have been devastating as violent criminals are routinely put back on our streets to recommit violent crimes and we are seeing a rise in crime from illegal immigrants.
Her record on handling the state’s economy is even worse. She has** _raised taxes_** and pushed failed policies that** _raised the cost of living_**. With Kathy Hochul at the helm New York has some of the highest taxes, rent, energy prices, utility bills, and cost of groceries in the country.
And when New Yorkers looked to Governor Hochul to rein in the extremism emerging from her own party she decided to bend the knee. She** _helped elect Zohran Mamdani_** , who is a communist and jihadist sympathizer, as Mayor of NYC.
To borrow a phrase from Governor Hochul herself: **"This bullsh*t has to stop"**.
It is clear that Hochul is out of touch and New Yorkers are ready for new leadership. But now it is up to us to lay the groundwork for victory next year.
Every major Democrat donor in the country is being called upon to save Kathy Hochul from her coming reckoning at the ballot box in a last-ditch effort to keep New York blue.
**Firing Hochul and flipping New York red is going to be a team effort** and I need every one of my patriotic supporters right now to help me deliver my message to every voter across the Empire State.

[FIRE KATHY HOCHUL](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e1204349/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9ob3VzZS1nb3AtYmF0dGxlZ3JvdW5kLWZ1bmQvaGdiZl9kb25fb21fZXJfZWwtbmFkX3JzXzIwMjUxMTI1/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTExMzA/LbmNsbDRHRmQwWQ/qP3JlY3VycmluZz10cnVlJnV0bV90ZXJtPTIxOTc2X3dyMg/gaSxTIg/s3i06e65f92)
Patriot, here is how you can help today.
My team just dropped a new ad that I want every New Yorker to see:

[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e1204349/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9ob3VzZS1nb3AtYmF0dGxlZ3JvdW5kLWZ1bmQvaGdiZl9kb25fb21fZXJfZWwtbmFkX3JzXzIwMjUxMTI1/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTExMzA/LbmNsbDRHRmQwWQ/qP3JlY3VycmluZz10cnVlJnV0bV90ZXJtPTIxOTc2X3dyMg/gaSxTIg/s3i06e65f92)
_NEW AD: Kathy’s Own Words: This Bullsh*t has to stop._

[WATCH ELISE’S NEW AD](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e1204349/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9ob3VzZS1nb3AtYmF0dGxlZ3JvdW5kLWZ1bmQvaGdiZl9kb25fb21fZXJfZWwtbmFkX3JzXzIwMjUxMTI1/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTExMzA/LbmNsbDRHRmQwWQ/qP3JlY3VycmluZz10cnVlJnV0bV90ZXJtPTIxOTc2X3dyMg/gaSxTIg/s3i06e65f92)
To defeat Hochul we need to expose her failed record and provide voters with an alternative vision for the state. This ad helps with that mission.
**_[So please, take a minute to watch my new ad, send it to every New Yorker you know, and make a contribution of whatever you can so we can keep it running](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e1204349/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9ob3VzZS1nb3AtYmF0dGxlZ3JvdW5kLWZ1bmQvaGdiZl9kb25fb21fZXJfZWwtbmFkX3JzXzIwMjUxMTI1/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTExMzA/LbmNsbDRHRmQwWQ/qP3JlY3VycmluZz10cnVlJnV0bV90ZXJtPTIxOTc2X3dyMg/gaSxTIg/s3i06e65f92)_****.**
This is our opportunity to SAVE NEW YORK!
I am grateful for all of the support I am receiving to win this fight. Thank you for continuing to stand by my side.
**Let’s finish the fight to make New York affordable and safe again.**

_Your fellow patriot,_
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e1204349/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9ob3VzZS1nb3AtYmF0dGxlZ3JvdW5kLWZ1bmQvaGdiZl9kb25fb21fZXJfZWwtbmFkX3JzXzIwMjUxMTI1/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTExMzA/LbmNsbDRHRmQwWQ/qP3JlY3VycmluZz10cnVlJnV0bV90ZXJtPTIxOTc2X3dyMg/gaSxTIg/s3i06e65f92)

name: Jon Ossoff for U.S. Senate
subject: We made a mistake
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
body:
#

We messed up, Peter.
We thought we were on track to reach our November fundraising goals before midnight tonight, but with less than 24 hours to go, it looks like we were wrong.
Look, these things happen, and it’s not the end of the world. But to be honest, **falling behind in a race this competitive could spell trouble.**
Republicans are hammering Jon with attacks. Just this month, one of Jon’s MAGA opponents created an AI deepfake of Jon to spread disinformation.
And the attacks are only going to get worse from here...
Jon has been ranked the most vulnerable Senator on the map. This race is a true toss-up.
Meeting the moment, every single deadline, is going to be crucial.
It’s important that we get back on track ASAP, and your support is our best chance to turn things around.
[**So, will you chip in $15 to help get our fundraising back on track before midnight tonight?**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-nov25.fw0_9v&refcode=em251130-1-full-a&t=1&akid=1181%2E5691347%2EMXNCpv)

body:
With just a few hours to go until our end-of-month deadline, we have just one question for you:

Derek, with just a few hours to go until our end-of-month deadline, we have just one question for you: [**Is there anything we can say to convince you to chip in and help defend Chris Deluzio, the ONLY Democrat defending a battleground seat in Pennsylvania?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120258385/585753903/320240526?refcode=email_113025_eom1&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYWRhODQxMy1mOWNkLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y9H3rzCrYwa93D62Ccsvsqp-rKLTUfNCo4Vx7FASf9I=) | | [Donate →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120258389/585753912/320240526?refcode=email_113025_eom1&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYWRhODQxMy1mOWNkLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y9H3rzCrYwa93D62Ccsvsqp-rKLTUfNCo4Vx7FASf9I=)

**What if we told you that Donald Trump ATTACKED Chris, and called for his death and hanging, all because Chris said basic truths about the oath to the Constitution?** No service member is ever forced to follow an illegal order. | | Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him.
---

The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him.
