**Behind the Markets**
Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675*, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671.

clean_body: One executive order from Trump could reshape the nation overnight.| | | | November 30 | | | | | Trump’s Closing Message to America | | | Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. clean_body: Our November fundraising deadline is at MIDNIGHT and we need to close the gap. | | | Peter, It is Sunday morning and we are down to the final hours. Our November fundraising deadline is at MIDNIGHT and we need to close the gap. Anthony D’Esposito is showing every sign he wants his old seat back and national Republicans are watching this toss-up race closely. We need to send a clear message that this team is ready to protect this seat and keep the path to taking back the House alive. = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you for doing what you can. Team Laura * | | = Paid for and authorized by Gillen for NY. name: Kristen McDonald Rivet
subject: Here’s what I want you to know…
body:
Hi there,
I know you’ve received quite a few emails from us this week (sorry about that!), but our November fundraising deadline is tonight, and we can’t afford to fall short of our goal.
MI-08 has now been named the tipping-point district – the seat that could decide whether Democrats win back the House next year. That puts our race at the center of the national fight, and it raises the stakes for everything we’ve worked so hard to build.
We’re already feeling the impact. Outside groups have launched a steady stream of attack ads to distort my record and mislead voters. And the truth is, those attacks are only going to escalate.
Here’s what I want you to know: I’m not intimidated by any of it. I’ve taken on tough fights my entire life, and I’m not backing down now. But I also know that I can’t do this alone.
**That’s why I’m hoping you’ll pitch in $3 or whatever you can spare tonight to help us reach our goal. **
Here’s a link for you to donate: [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kmr-q4-2025**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120261385/585762735/-185804085?refcode=em-11.30.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZDc5Njc0Ny1mZGNkLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_EMVWQefLj1vBhtoPhLMuxHeLeSLEQFDS7yFe3N5BBM=)
Thank you,
Kristen

Kristen for Michigan
P.O. Box 854
Bay City, MI 48707
United States
We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to [unsubscribe](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/wIbGWuvzGU-Lj2kxieOm2g2?unsubscribedata=7SIZ0kW3RDQ2SmN4qu47TprQB094Od8IV3Cqf42vv58AqaA%2FmCqF8JK%2FfGgKEMUgjBrbV9elVJG75ca77Nfvdlj7W22LoygPZhXHYUxsGxS%2Bnl%2Bi%2FcmS%2FnVU3hat9d5sR%2Bx8QGL5fck2H082lE1dv9usjY1K7L6gVBHUf73YlwmOYTC%2FHZk7%2BXtIBenMiQRnJk75CyLoiBdxmXmdpGQh0c9Ony7G%2FTH15TiUUXPJNbGhVUAhoNJgUUkDwuAhORwdgaHlx9ZusgS5vOn%2FuDaXeNF5%2B3VObt8aTi%2FWVX5981cRhsCLkXVBYGY9tRSFsAKIUEq4U622G5H%2FCCWqPgdZRoYyPiX11%2F2mvCxvOQAGveeWtLzvJ6SPmhR30v9wTbT1H%2Bo27b7N13atf7C73bMb5BmqqbaFEmg4So4W7H%2FxUVVIYR4uYvAkcGmt9ZEils9W).

body:
Republicans think their Senate majority is safe. They’re wrong.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120261784/585764052/-510661250?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.11.30_Cory-Booker_B1_F1_S1_C1_90AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDc5Njc0Ny1mZGNkLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=48UV4bO3KZaerv8SfjzF8V7ZF60OMd5mkbggGRNfwFY=) Hey there, it's Cory Booker. Republicans think their Senate majority is safe. _They’re wrong._ Right now, Kirsten Gillibrand is fighting to flip the Senate and our government to one that stands up for working families, protects health care and public benefits, and defends our basic freedoms. _That work takes all of us — that's why I’m asking: _[**_Will you chip in $10 or more to DSCC Chair Kirsten Gillibrand before midnight to make sure Senate Democrats have what they need to flip the Senate and take back the majority?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120261786/585764057/-510661250?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.11.30_Cory-Booker_B1_F1_S1_C1_90AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDc5Njc0Ny1mZGNkLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=48UV4bO3KZaerv8SfjzF8V7ZF60OMd5mkbggGRNfwFY=) | | [ DONATE $10 >> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120261788/585764067/-1797184696?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.11.30_Cory-Booker_B1_F1_S1_C1_90AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDc5Njc0Ny1mZGNkLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=48UV4bO3KZaerv8SfjzF8V7ZF60OMd5mkbggGRNfwFY=)

While working families are fighting to afford groceries, rent and medicine, Republicans are fighting for their own power. Instead of lowering costs, they’ve voted to slash crucial public and health care benefits, refused to stop Affordable Care Act premiums from spiking and sided with billionaires and corporate lobbyists at every turn.
**Despite the chaos, Kirsten Gillibrand isn’t backing down.** She’s leading Democrats as the chair of the DSCC to flip the Senate and deliver relief for working families during Trump’s reign of chaos.
When grassroots supporters step up early, we out-organize and out-vote the GOP at every turn. Your support will ensure that Democrats nationwide have the funds to reach more voters, organize more volunteers and keep crucial ads on the air in battleground states.
[**_Will you chip in $10 or whatever you can before midnight to Kirsten Gillibrand to help take back the Senate and build a government that puts people first?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120261790/585764096/-510661250?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.11.30_Cory-Booker_B1_F1_S1_C1_90AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDc5Njc0Ny1mZGNkLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=48UV4bO3KZaerv8SfjzF8V7ZF60OMd5mkbggGRNfwFY=)

name: Trump TAKEOVER! via Fight for Reform
subject: (re: Electoral College) your signature is needed...
disclaimer_text: paid for and provided by End Citizens United Nonfederal, P
body:
| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=23669%2E4449941%2EVzj-Qy) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=23669%2E4449941%2EVzj-Qy) **BREAKING via _NBC_ :** "Trump just realigned the entire political map. Democrats have 'no easy path' to fix it." [**Elizabeth Warren is calling for an END to the Electoral College now. Without 125,OOO signatures, ****we won 't be able to show Democrats in Congress there's a critical mass. Please sign the petition now:**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70308?t=3&akid=23669%2E4449941%2EVzj-Qy) | [SIGN NOW >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70308?t=4&akid=23669%2E4449941%2EVzj-Qy)
---
This petition is registered to you only.

Donald Trump only became President in 2016 because of the outdated Electoral College.

_Hillary Clinton won the popular vote by nearly 2.9 million. But the Electoral College overruled her popular vote victory._

**Now, Sen. Elizabeth Warren is urgently pleading with Democrats:**
We couldn't agree more. But now that Trump is in office, he and his Republican cronies will do everything in their power to uphold the Electoral College.

**So we need to act now -- because we must prevent unpopular, unqualified candidates from EVER becoming President again.**

[**_If every Democrat reading this signs our petition, we will reach our 125,OOO signature goal within minutes and gain traction for this urgent legislation in Congress. Please add your name immediately:_**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70308?t=5&akid=23669%2E4449941%2EVzj-Qy)
[SIGN NOW >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70308?t=6&akid=23669%2E4449941%2EVzj-Qy)
---
Thank you,

_Fight for Reform_

This movement is powered by the people — supporters like you, Peter
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120262339/585765812/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjMyNzk2NzQ3LWZkY2QtZjAxMS04MTk1LTAwMGQzYTFkNThhYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ifBocP_BkL2ouHktKI-_C6N0wo9cC3riMvdwaz4ZFHc=&emci=1ec3e0a5-caca-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=32796747-fdcd-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=8431045)

Peter, This month, voters made their voices heard at the ballot box and the message is clear: Americans are craving fairness in our democracy. Voters in California decisively approved the redistricting ballot measure in response to Texas’s power grab. In Virginia, voters elected Democracy Defenders up and down the ticket to establish a Democratic trifecta that will protect fundamental freedoms in the state. Pennsylvania voters retained all three pro-democracy justices — protecting the state supreme court’s independent, fair-minded majority. We cannot overstate the importance of these gains, but we must be clear-eyed about how we got here in the first place and the fight ahead. Republicans, at the behest of Donald Trump, launched a gerrymandering scheme because they’re terrified of losing the House. And right now, these map manipulators are actively trying to raise millions to fund the next phase of the redistricting crisis they’ve foisted on the country — gearing up for redraws in states like Florida, New Hampshire, and others. You can guarantee that the NDRC will be doing everything in our power to stop them. [**If you want to help fund our rapid-response efforts, please make a donation today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120262342/585765826/-1263916904?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_SavingDemocracyShortTerm_email_20251130-NDRC-Tier1-SavingDemocracyShortTerm_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20251130-NDRC-Tier1-SavingDemocracyShortTerm_&utm_campaign=SavingDemocracyShortTerm&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjMyNzk2NzQ3LWZkY2QtZjAxMS04MTk1LTAwMGQzYTFkNThhYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ifBocP_BkL2ouHktKI-_C6N0wo9cC3riMvdwaz4ZFHc=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

But we shouldn’t have to play a game of Whac-a-Mole, beating back redraws in state after state, to preserve a representative democracy. We need a permanent fix in federal law to make sure this crisis can never happen again. The Redistricting Reform Act would require every state to establish independent commissions to draw maps. Mid-decade redraws would be banned, and every state would be held to the same standards to achieve fair maps.
Here’s how we see it: To defend our democracy, we need a multi-pronged approach. And the NDRC is fighting on many fronts. In the short term, our teams are making investments to preserve our democracy through the 2026 midterms. In the long term, we’re working to pass legislation like the Redistricting Reform Act to ensure fairness for decades to come.
**The intensity and severity of this fight are unprecedented, and the resources required to wage it are, too. This movement is powered by supporters like you, Peter.[When you give, you’re not only helping us play tough defense in the short-term — you’re going on offense to put in the critical legwork that will preserve our democracy for the long haul. Can you make a donation to support this critical work?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120262362/585765907/-1263916904?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_SavingDemocracyShortTerm_email_20251130-NDRC-Tier1-SavingDemocracyShortTerm_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20251130-NDRC-Tier1-SavingDemocracyShortTerm_&utm_campaign=SavingDemocracyShortTerm&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjMyNzk2NzQ3LWZkY2QtZjAxMS04MTk1LTAwMGQzYTFkNThhYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ifBocP_BkL2ouHktKI-_C6N0wo9cC3riMvdwaz4ZFHc=)**

Pennsylvania voters retained all three pro-democracy justices — protecting the state supreme court’s independent, fair-minded majority. We cannot overstate the importance of these gains, but we must be clear-eyed about how we got here in the first place and the fight ahead. Republicans, at the behest of Donald Trump, launched a gerrymandering scheme because they’re terrified of losing the House. And right now, these map manipulators are actively trying to raise millions to fund the next phase of the redistricting crisis they’ve foisted on the country — gearing up for redraws in states like Florida, New Hampshire, and others. You can guarantee that the NDRC will be doing everything in our power to stop them. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = But we shouldn’t have to play a game of Whac-a-Mole, beating back redraws in state after state, to preserve a representative democracy. We need a permanent fix in federal law to make sure this crisis can never happen again. The Redistricting Reform Act would require every state to establish independent commissions to draw maps. Mid-decade redraws would be banned, and every state would be held to the same standards to achieve fair maps. Here’s how we see it: To defend our democracy, we need a multi-pronged approach. And the NDRC is fighting on many fronts. In the short term, our teams are making investments to preserve our democracy through the 2026 midterms. In the long term, we’re working to pass legislation like the Redistricting Reform Act to ensure fairness for decades to come. The intensity and severity of this fight are unprecedented, and the resources required to wage it are, too. This movement is powered by supporters like you, Peter.= Thanks so much, The NDRC Team = = | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 712 H St NE, #25 Washington, DC 20002 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC. Text MAPS to 36787, STOP to end. Msg and Data rates may apply

name: StateDemocrats.com
subject: Democrats are fighting relentlessly to make life better for working families like yours
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
And we’ve got real results to prove it.
#
**Housing. Health care. Groceries.**
None of these things should be a luxury in the United States. In fact, being able to access + afford these essentials should be the _bare minimum._
That’s not the reality right now, though – and the GOP, which has full control in DC, is doing absolutely nothing about it.
**Now, voters are holding them accountable.**
Voters across the country – in red and blue and purple states alike – can see that Republicans are doing nothing to address the cost-of-living crisis so many Americans are experiencing right now. They see how Donald Trump + the GOP work almost exclusively for billionaires, special interests, and themselves.
**At the same time, they can see Democrats fighting relentlessly to make life better for working families like yours._And we’ve got real results to prove it._**
Earlier this month, Democrats won major elections in states like Virginia and New Jersey – signaling serious strength behind affordability-focused Democrats heading into the 2026 elections.
**[Will you help us keep showing voters how Democrats will fight for them by chipping in $15 or whatever you can right now? name: Cate (Team Walz)
subject: There’s no stopping now
disclaimer_text: paid for by Walz for Governor
body:
#
Peter, it’s Cate from Team Walz.
I want to give you one final update from the finance team and on our November goal.
We have just under $4,000 to go, and are truly within striking distance! We need to close this final gap to continue building the campaign we need to win and keep Donald Trump’s MAGA agenda out of Minnesota.
**This team has stepped up and hit every single goal we’ve set. We can’t stop now — not when we’re this close.**
**[Will you pitch in $5 right now and make sure we’re able to close the final gap and hit our November goal?](https://act.timwalz.com/go/73?c0=em_tw_20251130_1.VudoV4&amount=5&refcode=em20251130-199&t=1&akid=199%2E34582%2EAh2tTk)**

Hey there, Ilhan here.
I had just a few minutes this morning to write you this message from my phone.
Long story short, our November fundraising deadline is at midnight, and I really need you today.
Grassroots donations from people like you make everything we do possible, from taking on Trump’s corruption, to fighting to protect Americans’ health care, to organizing our working-class neighbors in Minneapolis.
I’m asking if you can make your very first donation today and help us get ahead of our midnight deadline.
It’s been a tough month across the board, and our fundraising shows it. Being honest, we are **way, way** behind where we hoped to be by the end of November.
But a donation from you and just a few other people who believe in the progressive movement we are building could turn things around. Really.

| | Earlier this year, we launched our Next Generation of Leaders Training program because I've seen firsthand how many people across New Jersey want to step up, serve their communities, and rebuild trust in our democracy. clean_body: This was the single worst month of Trump’s presidency. | November 2025 will be remembered as the month everything changed for Donald Trump ⤵️ → Democrats won MAJOR victories across the country. We flipped Virginia's governorship with Abigail Spanberger's historic win. We held New Jersey with Mikie Sherrill. We elected a progressive mayor in New York City. We won critical redistricting fights in California that could help Democrats flip the House. → Trump signed his OWN SURRENDER on the Epstein files after Republican members of Congress — especially Marjorie Taylor Greene, Lauren Boebert, Nancy Mace — almost unanimously turned on him and forced a vote he knew he'd lose. → Trump's approval has CRATERED to historic lows. Fox News found that even among their own respondents, 76% of Americans have a negative view of the economy under Trump. It’s almost like his tariffs are raising prices for working families. Peter — THIS is the momentum we've been building toward. Voters are rejecting Trump's failing, billionaire-first agenda. Now, we need to take this energy straight into 2026 and finish what we started by flipping the House and ending Trump’s agenda. So... = = = = Every dollar helps us identify winnable districts, support strong Democrats, and turn this month’s historic victories into the political power we need to stop Trump. Let’s get it done, Unite the Country | Unite the Country is dedicated to electing Democrats who support common sense policies, champion middle class values and are willing to engage Americans regardless of where they live — but we can’t do it without you! At this critical moment in American history, we’re calling on you to join Unite the Country in this fight. = = = Follow along: | Paid for by Unite the Country, , and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. body:
# [#] Our November end-of-month deadline is less than a day away, and we are still a few supporters short of reaching our goal. Josh is counting on grassroots supporters like you to stand with our campaign, and right now we need your help to stay on track.

Can you chip in a few dollars to help us get back on track? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jg-fr-2511?amount=]

CHIP IN >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jg-fr-2511?amount=]

Josh is just as tired as you are of right-wing extremists putting petty partisan politics ahead of bipartisan solutions. We cannot afford another 2 years held hostage by extremism in the House, especially while our families are facing rising costs for groceries, healthcare, utility bills, clothing for the winter, and more.

As we approach 2026, it is important that we gear up now.

Will you stand with Josh and make a donation of any amount before our deadline TONIGHT so we can take back the House? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jg-fr-2511?amount=]

– Team Gottheimer
Josh Gottheimer represents New Jersey’s Fifth Congressional District. Josh is in Congress to fight for lower taxes and Jersey Values. He’s working across the aisle to find real solutions for New Jersey families and is actively fighting against the ideological gridlock in Washington. name: James Talarico
subject: I hate to ask
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Talarico for Texas
body:
#
Peter —
Today is our November fundraising deadline, and I want to be honest. The worst part of running for office is asking people for money.
I wish I could spend every second of this campaign meeting with voters and sharing our ideas for how to unrig our economy and democracy.
But I can’t knock every door or call every voter in Texas myself. Even with a big social media following, there are a lot of voters I simply can’t reach on my own.
The only way we can win is by building the largest grassroots campaign Texas has ever seen. I can’t physically be everywhere in Texas in the same day. Nobody can, but we can build a campaign that does reach everyone.
We need organizers and volunteers in every corner of the state. We need significant resources to get our message on as many screens as possible. And yes, we’ll have to run ads to counter the lies and smears that super PACs funded by billionaires and corporations are going to run about me.
So this is why we have to raise money. I wish the money we’ve already raised would be enough. But we can’t allow those at the top to buy this seat for another puppet politician.
[**I’m respectfully asking you to make a contribution to our campaign before our November fundraising deadline. Please know I wouldn’t ask if your $5 didn’t truly make a difference.**](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-launch.bF5RK3&refcode=em251130-1-ak&t=1&akid=281%2E1347274%2EqpxOHm)

name: Elizabeth Guzman
subject: 🚨End of the month & Virginia is on the frontline.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Elizabeth Guzman
clean_body: | | | Friend — I’ll make this quick. Thanks to your help, we just flipped a VA House of Delegates seat that Donald Trump lost by just one point. VA-HD 22 _is a frontline swing district \- and I’m a top Republican target for defeat. If we want to stop Trump’s agenda nationally, we have to start by stopping it here — in the states, in Virginia, and in districts just like mine. This seat has flipped time and time again, from Democrat to Republican, so these MAGA extremists are not content to sit back and accept the drubbing they just received. They are pouring in dark money because they know if they can revive the MAGA base, they can get one step closer to rolling back reproductive freedom, workers’ rights, and our democracy — state by state. But we cannot give them an inch. We are closing in on our end-of-month fundraising gap — and what we do tonight decides whether we stay on track. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. Thank you so much for your support. Virginia is where we hold the line — and win the future. ****. 💙******** — Elizabeth Guzman | Democrat is running for Delegate in Virginia's 22nd District. She came to America as a single mother, becoming a union leader and one of the first Latinas in the Virginia General Assembly. She passed stronger gun safety laws, expanded collective bargaining rights and paid sick leave, and protected reproductive rights. To donate by check, send to: Friends of Elizabeth Guzman PO Box 74, Nokesville VA, 20182 \- \- Paid for by Friends of Elizabeth Guzman. Contributions or gifts to Guzman for Congress are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. | | Sent via . name: Chris Taylor for Justice
subject: A big update in our race for Wisconsin Supreme Court:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Taylor for Justice
body:
Tomorrow morning, nomination papers officially begin circulating — the very first step to getting Judge Chris Taylor on the ballot.
# [](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/18?refcode=em20251130-854&t=1&akid=869%2E294397%2EmauzNf)
This is urgent.
**Tomorrow morning, nomination papers officially begin circulating — the very first step to getting Judge Chris Taylor on the ballot.**
Our team is ready to hit the ground running, but first, we have to ask:
[**Can you chip in $10 to fuel our organizing efforts before nomination papers go live tomorrow?**](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/31?c0=em_ms_jct_20251130_1_ak.BefMTl&amount=10&refcode=em20251130-854&t=3&akid=869%2E294397%2EmauzNf)

To gather thousands of signatures quickly, we need to scale up our campaign operations _fast._
That means printing materials, equipping volunteers, and launching the early field effort that will make or break our momentum heading into 2026.
Judge Chris Taylor has spent her entire career fighting for fairness, protecting people’s rights, and standing up to the same far-right special interests backing our opponent, Maria Lazar.
Now, it’s our turn to show Judge Chris Taylor we’re ready to fight for her.
[**Please, contribute whatever you can before nomination papers begin circulating tomorrow.**](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/31?c0=em_ms_jct_20251130_1_ak.BefMTl&amount=10&refcode=em20251130-854&t=23&akid=869%2E294397%2EmauzNf)

name: Abdul El-Sayed
subject: Something I hate about politics
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abdul for U
body:
Peter,
There’s something I hate about politics.
It’s that you can have the best message in the world, but if you don’t have the money to get it out, _it doesn’t matter._
It’s unfair and frustrating, but it’s the reality of campaigning in an environment where money is a make-or-break factor for victory.
We’ve built a campaign with real ideas to make life better for working people: Passing Medicare for All, tackling corporate greed, pushing for a foreign policy rooted in human dignity, and building a government that fights for working people.
We’re offering what so many folks tell me they’ve been waiting for: Moral clarity and a plan to actually fix what’s broken — without compromising our values by taking money from corporate PACs or AIPAC.
**But none of it means a damn thing if people never hear it.**
Peter, the reason why we’re a real contender in this competitive primary is because people like you have stepped up.
However, if we fall behind on fundraising, we can’t run the ads, hire the organizers, or counter the attacks our opponents are preparing. And that affects whether we can win this thing.
So even though I don’t love asking for money, I have to ask: **Can you chip in $5 or whatever you can to make sure our message reaches every voter who needs to hear it?**
[**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-ms-aes-20251130-1-ak**](https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/614?amount=5&refcode=em20251130-1370&t=2&akid=1370%2E251025%2E1AYXIP)
Every single donation is part of how we build the kind of campaign that can take on would-be oligarchs, corporate PACs, and AIPAC — and win.
In solidarity,
Abdul

* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with supporters like you, so thank you for reading this message. To contribute via check, please address it to Abdul for U.S. Senate, PO Box 126, St. Clair Shores, MI 48080.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.abdulformichigan.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails?t=3&akid=1370%2E251025%2E1AYXIP)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.abdulformichigan.com/signup/update-your-information)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.abdulformichigan.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=4&akid=1370%2E251025%2E1AYXIP)

Email us: [info@abdulformichigan.com](info@abdulformichigan.com)
Paid for by Abdul for U.S. Senate.

• Continued disinformation about voting systems and mail-in ballots
• New federal uncertainty about election security partnerships

Over the past few weeks, I’ve talked about the responsibility of preparing Minnesota for the 2026 elections, not out of fear, not out of speculation, but out of duty. My job has always been to hope for the best and plan for the worst. That doesn’t change, no matter who is in the White House. Minnesotans deserve stability. They deserve honesty. They deserve elections that are fair, accurate, honest, and secure. Full stop. Fellow patriot,

We’ve been in this race for **one full month** — and the response across Arizona’s East Valley has been incredible.

People show up at events. They stop me in grocery stores. They share their stories about the border, fentanyl, crime, rising costs, and the feeling that America is slipping away.

**And they all say the same thing:**

_“We need someone who’s actually been in the fight.”_
That’s why I stepped back into the arena. After years on the front lines as Pinal County Sheriff — working with Border Patrol, taking on cartels, securing communities — I know exactly what Washington isn’t doing. And I know how badly it needs to change.

[**But we’re coming up on our November end-of-month deadline. And you better believe everyone will be watching to see whether this campaign is the real deal.**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=66d2298a97ff4b62a27bbb47d275fb19&_e=AIsP0b-99lkBbCrw2RkMrACEaQ_DPajV36vV0dZ9-c2oKRFbz0NsuRz7wND3LrCm7z63VFNJTBMWOcMrQwCHC31awKGFvSW2STnd5raWiwCCWnr2-FA9n50698IaJHIP6iyeNL5SkWCsc3iNjQpIUYRKHzSVcZalnKBBvhFzLP5evgqSHJJDLmjKDMGAvhNgJCnF9-Oa4Ki5XZGkqkQRgYD7If7AhpWpHUbsS6lgGsfvnudBsrIlvQmBIA7PWPE4BVtp614NCRtkzsE6yez6DlO1x47RdSyLeZrbtzQu5u2U5NQFBaLoUbp1YFLnyld9a-soCb6JPK78MQ1SGCZd_DoCceWDbRD_Uv5FsOGB-XTj3t-w8QvfKXubODeF_M7hKc0ZM-9LCfsQjOyBxO7e1s7XrtNaxO0Cxr5nGcg5r8Guwk-puEHS_zsaZS-yhLsMKkdFZg76Mjw9Rsb4Cm7HDUy78C52Y7HftRmUtZlafBCN55Ms1kcyAYRomU0HSLf9PgFnrSzVOO4-oit2EU6MeZuASqMHL6H8QZEJ8iyUUrANaqTTspPYE1g4wF82ksVe78OO7b-MWEiVfGgNBL1v3T3ai7uwocYSuz-n7vsv6ZRDwl8OKppWvg9SiMpYCjGCFW-FvNU60t1lu6YV54GGaQbjbdyuTXpFhmHGwqREoN0%3D)

clean_body: | Fellow patriot, We’ve been in this race for one full month — and the response across Arizona’s East Valley has been incredible. People show up at events. They stop me in grocery stores. They share their stories about the border, fentanyl, crime, rising costs, and the feeling that America is slipping away. And they all say the same thing: “We need someone who’s actually been in the fight.” That’s why I stepped back into the arena. After years on the front lines as Pinal County Sheriff — working with Border Patrol, taking on cartels, securing communities — I know exactly what Washington isn’t doing. And I know how badly it needs to change. A strong showing proves that Arizona is ready for a true America First conservative who stands with President Trump. A weak showing gives our opponents ammunition before we ever get a chance to vote. Thank you for standing with me. Mark Lamb Join Mark Lamb on social media! | | PAID FOR BY MARK LAMB FOR CONGRESS Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go: -.

Peter,
We absolutely do not expect you to donate $50,000 dollars to our campaign.
We don't have donors who can make donations like that. But our opponent Lauren Boebert does.
To reach her end of month goal today all she has to do is call up a healthcare executive, a cryptocurrency trader, or Elon Musk himself, and cite her vote to cut medicare or her vote on making Bitcoin the national currency of America, and she can meet her goal from one phone call.
To get our campaign the firepower we need to defeat Lauren Boebert in 2026, we'll never be able to collect $50,000 from one donor, instead, we are trying to collect $5 from 10,000 donors
[Tonight at midnight is our end of month fundraising deadline and we need to meet our goal if we hope to outraise Boebert again this quarter. clean_body: | | | | | == | Peter, We absolutely do not expect you to donate $50,000 dollars to our campaign. We don't have donors who can make donations like that. But our opponent Lauren Boebert does. To reach her end of month goal today all she has to do is call up a healthcare executive, a cryptocurrency trader, or Elon Musk himself, and cite her vote to cut medicare or her vote on making Bitcoin the national currency of America, and she can meet her goal from one phone call. To get our campaign the firepower we need to defeat Lauren Boebert in 2026, we'll never be able to collect $50,000 from one donor, instead, we are trying to collect $5 from 10,000 donors == If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | == | == | == | | == | == | == | == Beating Boebert requires a movement of thousands of people from every corner of this country stepping up and doing what they can with what they've got. name: Team Cooper for North Carolina
subject: Need you to read this email, Peter
body:
Only asking for 30 seconds of your attention.
|
# [](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1898?t=1&akid=71%2E124072%2E9D4UNd)
_Peter — we’ve already been in your inbox a lot this week, so we’ll keep this very short:_ **[MIDNIGHT DEADLINE: Roy Cooper needs your help to meet his $825,000 online fundraising goal by tonight’s deadline. He’s in a TOSS-UP race against the GOP’s handpicked candidate, and Republicans are ready to throw everything they’ve got at this race. We can only overcome the far-right GOP and their mega-donor machine with your grassroots support. Your contribution will help Roy win this crucial Senate seat and get to work fighting for our health care access, our public schools, and our fundamental rights. Pitch in before time runs out>>>](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2069?t=6&akid=71%2E124072%2E9D4UNd)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [DONATE $5](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2070?t=7&akid=71%2E124072%2E9D4UNd)
---
[DONATE $10](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2071?t=8&akid=71%2E124072%2E9D4UNd)
---
[DONATE $25](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2072?t=9&akid=71%2E124072%2E9D4UNd)
---
[DONATE $50](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2073?t=10&akid=71%2E124072%2E9D4UNd)
---
[DONATE $100](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2074?t=11&akid=71%2E124072%2E9D4UNd)
---
[DONATE ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2075?t=12&akid=71%2E124072%2E9D4UNd)
---
– Team Cooper
* * *
Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy.

**[Donate today to help win this seat and flip the Senate blue.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?t=2&akid=71%2E124072%2E9D4UNd)**
[DONATE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?t=3&akid=71%2E124072%2E9D4UNd)
---
[DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1915?t=4&akid=71%2E124072%2E9D4UNd)
[info@roycooper.com](mailto:info@roycooper.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.roycooper.com/go/825?t=5&akid=71%2E124072%2E9D4UNd)
Cooper Victory Fund
PO Box 1190
Raleigh, NC 27602
Paid for by Cooper Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Cooper for North Carolina, DSCC, and North Carolina Democratic Party — Federal.
---
Contributions or gifts to Cooper Victory Fund are not tax deductible.
The first $7,000 of each contribution from a person and the first $10,000 from a multicandidate committee (“PAC”) will be allocated to Cooper for North Carolina. The first $3,500 of a person’s contribution and the first $5,000 of a PAC’s contribution will be designated for the primary election; the next $3,500/$5,000 will be designated for the general election. The next $10,000 from a person and $5,000 from a PAC will be allocated to North Carolina Democratic Party – Federal. The next $44,300 of a contribution from a person and the next $15,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC General Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Headquarters Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Legal Fund. A contributor may designate his or her contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if following it would result in an excessive contribution.
Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email address, with a check, or with a spouse — thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.
By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

[You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time.](http://act.roycooper.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=71%2E124072%2E9D4UNd)
If you wish to receive fewer messages from us, [submit this form to let us know.](https://act.roycooper.com/signup/i-want-less-emails-cooper-north-carolina/?t=13&akid=71%2E124072%2E9D4UNd)

body:
| | | Y'all...Ohio and Florida.**Ohio and freakin' Florida!**

As pissed as I am that Trump and his followers are back in charge, they could be giving us two HUGE chances to take back the Senate.

Putting JD Vance's and Marco Rubio's seats up for grabs in special elections? I mean, they might as well be handing us a personalized invitation to get right back in this!

And you know what? We've gotta reply HELL YES! If you agree, **[chip in $5 today to fight for every seat and say "sorry Donald Trump, but we're gonna win back the Senate!!" Your gift will even be TRIPLED to $15 until the deadline >>](https://go.dscc.org/go/22278?amount=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20251130-JamesCarville-CarvilleSpecialElectionsFR-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20251130-JamesCarville-CarvilleSpecialElectionsFR-Pros-sl1&akid=21862%2E9716520%2Eb1NzHq)**

JD Vance and Marco Rubio are now out of the Senate. And that means two seats are back on the ballot YEARS before anyone expected. **If you want to be one of the FIRST people to take a stand to win seats like those, you've got to do it NOW!**

**So are we gonna do this or what?!** We could be looking at a once-in-a-presidency chance to STOP Trump, but it'll ONLY work if we take advantage. **We need all hands on deck, so don't wait another moment:**

**[If we pull this off, it could be LIGHTS OUT for the GOP. So please, my friends at the DSCC and I are counting on you: Chip in $5 (becomes $15) to help Democrats win and _take back the Senate majority from Donald Trump's allies!_](https://go.dscc.org/go/22278?amount=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20251130-JamesCarville-CarvilleSpecialElectionsFR-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20251130-JamesCarville-CarvilleSpecialElectionsFR-Pros-sl1&akid=21862%2E9716520%2Eb1NzHq)**

We could be looking at a once-in-a-presidency chance to STOP Trump, but it'll ONLY work if we take advantage. clean_body: | | | | | == | Peter, We absolutely do not expect you to donate $50,000 dollars to our campaign. We don't have donors who can make donations like that. But our opponent Lauren Boebert does. To reach her end of month goal today all she has to do is call up a healthcare executive, a cryptocurrency trader, or Elon Musk himself, and cite her vote to cut medicare or her vote on making Bitcoin the national currency of America, and she can meet her goal from one phone call. To get our campaign the firepower we need to defeat Lauren Boebert in 2026, we'll never be able to collect $50,000 from one donor, instead, we are trying to collect $5 from 10,000 donors == If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | == | == | == | | == | == | == | == Beating Boebert requires a movement of thousands of people from every corner of this country stepping up and doing what they can with what they've got. Thank you for being one of them. name: Aruna Miller
subject: Because of you, Peter, this work is possible
body:
# [](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/8?t=1&akid=997%2E1086043%2EACEkLJ)
Peter, it’s Lieutenant Governor Aruna Miller.
I hope you and your family had a joyful holiday. As I spent time with mine, we reflected on how we are living in a whole new world right now. Every day brings a new challenge as national politics have been flipped upside down.
Maryland is home to federal workers, world-class health institutions, and a deep commitment to democracy. The egregious decisions from Washington hit especially close to home. There’s no doubt, we are in Trump’s direct line of sight.
I have spent my entire career in public service, I know this much: the price of doing nothing isn’t nothing, _it’s everything._
That’s why I’m in this fight: **to stand up to the chaos.**
Wes and I are taking action every day to protect Marylanders and the progress that we have already made in our great state.
**[If you believe in our team, please chip in $5 or $10 to help us on our mission.](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251130-1.lTMZGq&refcode=em-20251130-1&t=2&akid=997%2E1086043%2EACEkLJ)**
We’ve created good jobs. We’ve raised wages. We’ve invested in our public schools. We’ve lifted children and families out of poverty. We’ve built a cabinet that reflects the fullness and diversity of our state.
But our work is far from done.
Wes and I are on the ground making sure that we are connecting with Marylanders from mountain Maryland to the eastern shore to understand what you need and Maryland needs. We know that the best way to serve is by working together.
Here’s the thing: we rely on grassroots supporters like you to help us accomplish our goals. The progress we make is only possible thanks to you.
**[Please, if you can, chip in any amount to our reelection campaign so we can keep focusing on the work that matters.](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251130-1.lTMZGq&refcode=em-20251130-1&t=3&akid=997%2E1086043%2EACEkLJ)**
**[Donate $5 ››](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251130-1.lTMZGq&amount=5&refcode=em-20251130-1&t=22&akid=997%2E1086043%2EACEkLJ)**
With gratitude,
Aruna Miller
Lieutenant Governor, Maryland
[](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251130-1.lTMZGq&refcode=em-20251130-1&t=23&akid=997%2E1086043%2EACEkLJ)

* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-footer?refcode=em-20251130-1&t=24&refcode2=997_1086043_ACEkLJ&akid=997%2E1086043%2EACEkLJ)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=25&akid=997%2E1086043%2EACEkLJ)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.wesmoore.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=997%2E1086043%2EACEkLJ)

Email us: [info@wesmoore.com](mailto:info@wesmoore.com)
BY AUTHORITY: WES MOORE FOR MARYLAND, MARY TYDINGS, TREASURER

name: Rep. Joe Sweeney
subject: Major fundraising deadline tonight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Granite Solutions, Joe Sweeney Chairman
body:
I need you with me before midnight.

| | | | |
---
| | Derek,

**I’ll get right to it.**
We’re staring down a major fundraising deadline tonight, and every number we report will be scrutinized by the media, by the Democrats, and by anyone wondering whether conservatives in New Hampshire are serious about holding the line.
I intend to prove that we are.
But I can’t do it alone.
By midnight, I need to show we’ve got the resources to:
* Protect our conservative majority
* Back our candidates with real ground game and advertising
* Push back when the left tries to raise taxes, grow government, and undermine parents

[To do that, we’ve set an aggressive goal of $4000 before midnight. As of this email, we’re still $2300 short.](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fgranitesolutions%2Fdonate/1/0100019ad56b6f1d-df542ff8-b0ff-401e-b539-94127f564932-000000/ghOB3eB4KdsJVnAwlz9UG5QdUJw=454)
That’s why I’m asking you – personally – to step up right now.

Democrats will spin their numbers, flood their campaigns with out-of-state money, and claim the “momentum” is on their side.I want our report to send a different message: New Hampshire conservatives are organized, disciplined, and ready to win.
[When this deadline hits, there’s no going back. The total we file is the total we live with and it will shape how seriously we’re taken heading into the next fights.](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fgranitesolutions%2Fdonate/3/0100019ad56b6f1d-df542ff8-b0ff-401e-b539-94127f564932-000000/bSVQkgimz_WwLiV3esoNWRaw7RY=454)

[**Please make your most generous contribution before midnight and help us hit this major deadline with strength.**](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fgranitesolutions%2Fdonate/4/0100019ad56b6f1d-df542ff8-b0ff-401e-b539-94127f564932-000000/4M3nmgjuuAYP3EjiC_P8Jr53Vfg=454)

I couldn’t be prouder to endorse Valerie for re-election, because she is the kind of leader North Carolina can count on.
Valerie and I grew up in the same town, went to the same high school, and served together in the State Senate. I’ve seen firsthand her dedication, her compassion, and her commitment to doing what’s right for our communities.
She has spent her life in public service, from advocating for North Carolina families on the Chapel Hill–Carrboro City Schools Board, to leading on the Orange County Board of Commissioners, and representing her neighbors in the North Carolina State House and State Senate.
Now, in Washington, she never stops working to make our state and our country a better place. She fights every day for the issues that matter most to our families: quality education, accessible health care, and our fundamental rights.
She has proven time and again that she won’t back down from these important fights. She leads with integrity, determination, and a clear focus on serving the people of North Carolina.
**Valerie Foushee has always put the needs of North Carolinians first, and she will continue to do so every single day in Congress.** We need her continued leadership in the House and for the 4th District.
[I’m with Valerie all the way, and I’m personally asking you to join me. Your support — whatever you can give — will help ensure she can continue delivering results for North Carolina families. I want to take a moment to tell you why I’m standing with Valerie Foushee — and why I hope you will too. Before I go any further, I need to ask you one question.= | | = I couldn’t be prouder to endorse Valerie for re-election, because she is the kind of leader North Carolina can count on. Valerie and I grew up in the same town, went to the same high school, and served together in the State Senate. I’ve seen firsthand her dedication, her compassion, and her commitment to doing what’s right for our communities. She has spent her life in public service, from advocating for North Carolina families on the Chapel Hill–Carrboro City Schools Board, to leading on the Orange County Board of Commissioners, and representing her neighbors in the North Carolina State House and State Senate. Now, in Washington, she never stops working to make our state and our country a better place. She fights every day for the issues that matter most to our families: quality education, accessible health care, and our fundamental rights. She has proven time and again that she won’t back down from these important fights. She leads with integrity, determination, and a clear focus on serving the people of North Carolina. Valerie Foushee has always put the needs of North Carolinians first, and she will continue to do so every single day in Congress. We need her continued leadership in the House and for the 4th District. = If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Josh Stein Governor of North Carolina * | | | ---|---|--- = Valerie is fighting to protect access to health care, working families, and to reform our criminal justice system. But she needs your help to continue to do this great work in Congress. # ⏰Don't Miss This: Our 75% Off Window Closes at Midnight
### The window closes at midnight -- don't wait.
| | | [Lawrence Winnerman](https://substack.com/@lwinner)
---
| Nov 30
---
| [](https://substack.com/@lwinner)

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/ff2a914f-f224-4583-80a8-528cf8c9a040?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Hey folks -- Cliff here.
I'll get right to it: **[today is the final day of this 75% off offer](https://substack.com/redirect/ff2a914f-f224-4583-80a8-528cf8c9a040?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).** At **11:59 PM** , this window shuts and we move into the next phase of what we're building.
If you've been reading our work, nodding along, getting fired up, yelling "YES!" or "holy hell, thank you" at your phone...
then today's the day to jump in.
You can become a full annual supporter for **[$19.99](https://substack.com/redirect/ff2a914f-f224-4583-80a8-528cf8c9a040?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[ -- ](https://substack.com/redirect/ff2a914f-f224-4583-80a8-528cf8c9a040?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[75% off](https://substack.com/redirect/ff2a914f-f224-4583-80a8-528cf8c9a040?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** -- and yeah, that's a ridiculous price. But this is the moment we need as many people as possible standing with us.
[Join Us Now For Just $19.99](https://substack.com/redirect/ff2a914f-f224-4583-80a8-528cf8c9a040?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Because everything we're doing -- the reporting, the videos, the analysis, the calling-out-the-corruption in real time -- is about building something powerful heading into **2026** , the most consequential election year in our lifetimes (and I know we've said that before, but this time it's actually true).
This project doesn't have billionaires backing it. It doesn't have corporate "brand partners." It has _you._
And honestly? That's exactly how we want it.
So if you've been thinking about upgrading...
or waiting for a sign...
or telling yourself "yeah, I'll do it later"...
**[do it today](https://substack.com/redirect/ff2a914f-f224-4583-80a8-528cf8c9a040?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).**
This offer window closes tonight.
👉 **[Join us for $19.99-- 75% off](https://substack.com/redirect/ff2a914f-f224-4583-80a8-528cf8c9a040?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
Thanks for being here.
We're just getting started.
_**-- Cliff**_

name: Voter Action Project Research
subject: Poll: Election Assistance Commission official

body:
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
DemocracyDocket: Dems ‘Need the Votes’ of ‘Illegal Citizens,’ Top Federal Election Official Claims in Unhinged Rant [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA007/1/89215/images/DD_IllegalVoterConspiracy.png]
Folks -- A top federal voting official is facing a call to step down after accusing Democrats of encouraging “ open borders ” and widespread voting by “ illegal citizens ,” because “ they need the votes .”
Christy McCormick, a Republican member of the U.S. Election Assistance Commission (EAC), made the " unhinged public rant " recently. Oregon Secretary of State Tobias Read, among others, says this raises serious questions about her ability to help states administer fair and impartial elections, and to retain public trust.
We want to know how you feel about this development. Will you take our one-click survey today?
Do you think members of the Election Assistance Commission (EAC) should be nonpartisan defenders of our right to vote?
By clicking a response below your answer will be automatically recorded:
YES [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-pollresponse?refcode=113025_1yes&amount=15] NO [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-pollresponse?refcode=113025_1no&amount=15]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=113025_1&amount=20]

name: Chris Pappas
subject: Our Senate race could come down to a few hundred votes
body:
[ https://act.chrispappas.org/go/126?t=1001&akid=3713%2E582294%2EbMi6Pe ]Chris Pappas for Senate[ https://act.chrispappas.org/go/126?t=1002&akid=3713%2E582294%2EbMi6Pe ]Chris Pappas for Senate

New Hampshire is one of the most competitive states in the country, and
our elections often come down to just a handful of votes.

I know that firsthand. I’ve run four tough, close races for Congress here.
And we’ve won every single time — because grassroots supporters like you
had my back.

Now I’m running for U.S. Senate. And this race is on a whole new level.

National Republicans have already lined up behind John Sununu — their
hand-picked candidate — and they’re prepared to spend millions to flip New
Hampshire red. The NRSC is watching this race closely, and they know
what’s at stake.

This is not a safe blue seat. A new poll shows me neck-and-neck with my
opponent, making New Hampshire a top target. And this is our moment to
show that we’re ready for this fight.

We’ve set a must-hit fundraising goal of $30,000 before November ends to
power our campaign into the final month of the year — and I’m counting on
your support.

[ https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251130_3_eom.Yy_tKw&refcode=em20251130-3&t=1003&akid=3713%2E582294%2EbMi6Pe ]Can I count on you to pitch in $5 or anything you can to
help us close the gap? Every dollar raised before midnight on Sunday helps
us build the operation we need to win and keep NH blue.

[ https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251130_3_eom.Yy_tKw&amount=5&refcode=em20251130-3&t=1022&akid=3713%2E582294%2EbMi6Pe ]Donate $5 »

I’m bringing the same fight, the same grit, and the same grassroots spirit
that’s powered every campaign I’ve run. But I can’t do it without you.

Let’s prove that when we come together, we can win even the toughest
fights.

With gratitude,

Chris

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.chrispappas.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=3713%2E582294%2EbMi6Pe

name: The Democratic Party
subject: Today is the day:
body:
---
Derek, We know that you’re likely tired of the never-ending news cycle, and the last thing you thought you would be doing is making a contribution to the DNC today. But today is the day we’re asking Democrats to step up and chip in if you're in a place to do so. Let us explain why: If this year has proven anything, it’s the danger of Trump in the White House with an emboldened Republican majority in Congress. Trump’s power is essentially unchecked, and he and his allies have wreaked havoc — tanking our economy, sending the National Guard into our cities, redrawing congressional maps in their favor, and attempting to silence those who disagree with them. The _only_ way we will be able to prevent more harm is if Democrats win back Congress in the midterms. We get that you may be tired or feeling tapped out. But we cannot afford to just sit back and hope for the best right now. So we have to ask one more time: [**Can you make a contribution to the DNC before our midnight fundraising deadline? It can be $5, $50, or whatever makes sense for you right now. It will all add up, and we will use those contributions to build the resources we’ll need to flip the House and Senate next year.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-november-2025?refcode=em_20251130_5392_fr&amount=7&refcode2=5392_22930333_FB0_5Z&akid=5392%2E22930333%2EFB0_5Z) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $7](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-november-2025?express_lane=true&amount=7&refcode=em_20251130_5392_fr&refcode2=5392_22930333_FB0_5Z&akid=5392%2E22930333%2EFB0_5Z)**

name: Sheriff Chad Bianco
subject: Replacing Newsom ⏰
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BIANCO FOR GOVERNOR 2026 FPPC # 1479095
body:
The clock is ticking on our November fundraising deadline. As the leading candidate to replace Gavin Newsom, we cannot give our opponents any reason to say our momentum is slowing down. We need your help to close the gap. | Peter, I hope you’re having a great Thanksgiving weekend. I’m going to keep this short because we are down to the wire. We are hours away from tonight’s **11:59 PM End-of-Month deadline** — and we’re just [$1,900 short of our November fundraising goal.](https://links.biancoforgovernor.com/s/c/jTvqPJBCkJjOAUunPR2x0_6TmvY-rFLqz4C3v4NU6oGWKyU-gt0bM53kadVlOUf7n96_NLdCTu7aig7cQNjD6LUKPh48InXjk85jKWgMMnfpPq5fpheaToQYeLzF8BnXqywthil37_8lvbyFdfeSyHmjUAq9P0K42EJDRxrTbKvI1P8vrUjJpW6dJ5HHwaVKsx3KCSUCDD0ZKKOmNeBR4yX4YPq8q44qV7ZAIBKaKf7BMoqaz9UVLdN8SxtilYg9jMmITwor35a5vd7aPuy14cVjKLuagOJarqZsEktRmqWNCJoiP5XdzmhgMD1AwbuVMPhSl_swYUzMK2fq0q5vNYDafEvjC986-a4cWgAbtN0VwMt5bFYOmYQQHZCZfNOAdUFUfI6D5qfoBlWjtQ-PMti0uWZA0y2Pz5xFaS1OrAS4m43lwrlJI0Tcv1YiDnrVDm2-P2u7bSNrWQTE8Mp-r9xuXs4ISkjX4-tuZSOClLSYrveKfjo5mrGnnujctdpkxJzXkq8-li0SmgNz4zbjQjkZnt3ACW_bGXAIlD1Y48idq70/C4rB_sV81kCGRZlO7niuMJfNQk12OrSK/15) The momentum we’ve seen over the last 48 hours has been incredible—thousands of patriots are stepping up—but we are **still short** of our goal. I cannot emphasize enough how important it is that we hit this goal before the clock strikes midnight. clean_body: The clock is ticking on our November fundraising deadline. As the leading candidate to replace Gavin Newsom, we cannot give our opponents any reason to say our momentum is slowing down. We need your help to close the gap. | Peter, I hope you’re having a great Thanksgiving weekend. I’m going to keep this short because we are down to the wire. We are hours away from tonight’s 11:59 PM End-of-Month deadline — and we’re just The momentum we’ve seen over the last 48 hours has been incredible—thousands of patriots are stepping up—but we are still short of our goal. I cannot emphasize enough how important it is that we hit this goal before the clock strikes midnight. As the leading candidate to replace Gavin Newsom, our opponents will look for any reason to say we’re losing momentum. We can’t give them a reason: Thank you so much, Sheriff Chad Bianco Republican Candidate for California Governor | PAID FOR BY BIANCO FOR GOVERNOR 2026 FPPC # 1479095 3649 Mission Inn Ave., 2nd Floor Rotunda, Riverside, CA 92501 If you want to opt-out of important updates like this one, you can unsubscribe .

body:
If you haven’t had the pleasure of eating a meal with mole sauce – it’s a spicy but also chocolatey flavor found in a lot of Mexican cooking... and it’s like nothing else.

| **_See Emily's note below —[ _Chip in to support our organizing before the end-of-month deadline at midnight (any amount), and we'll send you the recipe for delicious Sweet Potato Mole Chilli!_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120275210/585789386/1189991872?amount=25&refcode=RS_EM_FR_2025.11.30_Recipe_X2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMWExZjYyYy0wN2NlLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h52889ntpm-a-qS9ahu14GrBIF7JaU-5ozPGvPAwgKs=)_**
* * *
Peter, I want to take a quick break from the news and talk about chilli. Specifically, this perfect cool-weather mole chilli I love to make for friends. **If you chip in to my campaign today (any amount), I’ll send you my mole chilli recipe. Get this offer while it’s hot:** [GET THE RECIPE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120275211/585789387/1189991872?amount=25&refcode=RS_EM_FR_2025.11.30_Recipe_X2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMWExZjYyYy0wN2NlLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h52889ntpm-a-qS9ahu14GrBIF7JaU-5ozPGvPAwgKs=) If you haven’t had the pleasure of eating a meal with mole sauce – it’s a spicy but also chocolatey flavor found in a lot of Mexican cooking... and it’s like nothing else. With everything going on, I’ve been thinking about conversations at Thanksgivings with my Democrat mom and Republican dad. We didn’t always agree, but we didn’t resort to threats and insults. It was about finding solutions to the problems we faced, no matter where they came from. The silence of too many of my colleagues in Congress over the past week speaks volumes. No matter how low Trump goes, they still won’t perform their duty as a check and balance on him. That’s why together, we’re not only flipping the House – we’re bringing a wave of fresh leaders to Washington, D.C. _who will actually respect the Constitution!_ [_**So, please, make a donation to fuel our organizing efforts, and I’ll send you one of my favorite recipes →**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120275212/585789388/-43802086?amount=25&refcode=RS_EM_FR_2025.11.30_Recipe_X2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMWExZjYyYy0wN2NlLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h52889ntpm-a-qS9ahu14GrBIF7JaU-5ozPGvPAwgKs=) Thank you so much, and have a great Thanksgiving! – Emily | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120275213/585789389/131447847?refcode=RS_EM_FR_2025.11.30_Recipe_X2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMWExZjYyYy0wN2NlLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h52889ntpm-a-qS9ahu14GrBIF7JaU-5ozPGvPAwgKs=&emci=97b44ad1-86cd-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=21a1f62c-07ce-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=23483442) Emily Randall is proud to represent Washington’s 6th District in Congress. She grew up in a working-class Union household in Port Orchard and was the first in her family to attend college. After serving in the State Senate and passing nearly 200 bills, Emily made history in 2024 as the first queer Latina elected to Congress. Now, Emily is fighting for WA working families in D.C. and organizing to take back the House. _**Can you chip in $6 or any amount and join our team?**_ [DONATE NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120275214/585789390/1120488449?refcode2=footer&amount=6&refcode=RS_EM_FR_2025.11.30_Recipe_X2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMWExZjYyYy0wN2NlLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h52889ntpm-a-qS9ahu14GrBIF7JaU-5ozPGvPAwgKs=)

clean_body: If you haven’t had the pleasure of eating a meal with mole sauce – it’s a spicy but also chocolatey flavor found in a lot of Mexican cooking... and it’s like nothing else. | See Emily's note below —= Peter, I want to take a quick break from the news and talk about chilli. Specifically, this perfect cool-weather mole chilli I love to make for friends. If you chip in to my campaign today (any amount), I’ll send you my mole chilli recipe. Get this offer while it’s hot: = If you haven’t had the pleasure of eating a meal with mole sauce – it’s a spicy but also chocolatey flavor found in a lot of Mexican cooking... and it’s like nothing else. With everything going on, I’ve been thinking about conversations at Thanksgivings with my Democrat mom and Republican dad. We didn’t always agree, but we didn’t resort to threats and insults. It was about finding solutions to the problems we faced, no matter where they came from. The silence of too many of my colleagues in Congress over the past week speaks volumes. No matter how low Trump goes, they still won’t perform their duty as a check and balance on him. That’s why together, we’re not only flipping the House – we’re bringing a wave of fresh leaders to Washington, D.C. who will actually respect the Constitution! = Thank you so much, and have a great Thanksgiving! – Emily | | Emily Randall is proud to represent Washington’s 6th District in Congress. She grew up in a working-class Union household in Port Orchard and was the first in her family to attend college. After serving in the State Senate and passing nearly 200 bills, Emily made history in 2024 as the first queer Latina elected to Congress. Now, Emily is fighting for WA working families in D.C. and organizing to take back the House. Can you chip in $6 or any amount and join our team? = Want to maximize your impact?Become a monthly donor to help us flip the House from red to blue! = Follow on:** | | | | | | Paid for by Emily Randall for Congress Emily Randall for Congress P.O.
