[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..oF5khpbl93Icgwzh3l3bfaNHTnWOX27Xj03Cmo3BjVE?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=180323962)
* * *
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/1bdbd8d2-ef6c-465e-b237-cafc7b0edb9a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Earlier this month in the Little Village neighborhood in Chicago, which is a Latino-majority neighborhood, a father and son were killed during an armed robbery at their jewelry store. The killings took place not inside the store, but out in the street.
It turned out that despite people in the area hearing the gunshots and seeing their bodies in the street, they did not call 9-1-1 for several minutes. The reason? They blamed it on "fear" of Chicago police because they have been "collaborating" with federal immigration agents during operations in the metro area.
"The community doesn't trust the CPD -- even less now that we're being terrorized by ICE, and they seem to be protecting the agents instead of the community," Dolores Castañeda, a longtime resident and community leader, told the Chicago Tribune.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/c2bbf348-3437-49cd-bca1-5ac9a827a64a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
"The rate of 911 calls made in Chicago has dropped precipitously in the two months since the start of Operation Midway Blitz, a Tribune review of city data found...Neighborhood leaders acknowledge a sharp year-over-year decline in crime, but note that the wave of immigration enforcement has left many residents in fear of calling 911 for help during that stretch," the Tribune further reported.
This excuse to delay calling to report a serious crime is weird because as countless videos have shown during Operation Midway Blitz, Chicagoans, including in Little Village, have been going out of their way to directly confront federal agents and Chicago police during operations.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..oF5khpbl93Icgwzh3l3bfaNHTnWOX27Xj03Cmo3BjVE?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=180323962)
That "they seem to be protecting the agents instead of the community" line from Castañeda is based on the fact that because mobs form in an instant, Chicago police are needed to maintain order. That protection is only in response to when the "community" gathers to cause problems for the federal agents. It is a basic charge that any local police department has for its jurisdiction. If there are riots or rowdy protests, police are going to show up to maintain order, at least that's the expectation.
This is on top of the fact that Mayor Brandon Johnson has made it clear he is not allowing Chicago police from helping federal agents in arresting illegal aliens.
So while the stated "reason" for not calling 9-1-1 is asinine on its face, it is concerning that there could be truth to it at the same time because I am sure many people in the city have bought into the progressive lies about the Trump administration's deportation efforts.
That determination to confront federal agents, of course, extends beyond Chicago. On Saturday, agitators in New York City threw up barricades and trash in the street to prevent federal agents from carrying out an operation that was going to allegedly take place on Canal Street. Just like in Chicago, New York City police officers were needed to stop the crowd's inference. I have said it before, but the Democrats will continue and escalate their tactics to prevent the arrest of illegal aliens.
* * *
**[Together with Home Title Lock](https://substack.com/redirect/a7742f0a-9782-4117-851f-c32b0f2c9f84?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# **[Protect Your Home from Title Theft and Fraud](https://substack.com/redirect/a7742f0a-9782-4117-851f-c32b0f2c9f84?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/a7742f0a-9782-4117-851f-c32b0f2c9f84?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The FBI warns of **a rise in title fraud,** a crime where scammers use forged documents to steal a homeowner's ownership on records, often leaving victims unaware until it is too late.
**Criminals file fraudulent deeds, manipulate public records, and may even impersonate owners to gain control of a home.** If the stolen property is mortgaged or sold, it can create serious financial and legal consequences, including displacement, loss of property, emotional distress, and lengthy battles to reclaim it.
**Title fraud can affect anyone,** regardless of location, property type, or ownership duration. To protect your home and preventing irreversible damage, Homeowners are urged to monitor their records, check local filings, and watch for unexpected correspondence.
**[Beyond monitoring, Home Title Lock provides a comprehensive solution.](https://substack.com/redirect/06568a70-d37f-4b89-9e71-2185dcc69e0d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
Subscribers receive 24/7 monitoring of their title records, urgent alerts of any activity, access to a dedicated team of legal experts who act on their behalf, and full restoration services for properties that fall victim to fraud.
Backed by up to $1 million in restoration protection, Home Title Lock offers homeowners more than just awareness--they gain active protection, legal support, and the resources needed to reclaim and secure their property if title fraud occurs.
[Protect your home today](https://substack.com/redirect/06568a70-d37f-4b89-9e71-2185dcc69e0d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

Backed by up to $1 million in restoration protection, Home Title Lock offers homeowners more than just awareness--they gain active protection, legal support, and the resources needed to reclaim and secure their property if title fraud occurs. * | A guest post by| Reporter at MostlyPeaceful.media. subject: About the rabid dog thing…

body:
| [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/97463?t=6&akid=22088%2E878179%2EyIY9hO) My cousin RFK Jr. is a rabid dog, barking for Trump.

The White House is calling me ridiculous for saying so, but they're wrong.

Trump has my cousin spewing dangerous lies about vaccines, about Americans' health, and about science.

This is about the far-right agenda, not "making America healthy again," and I'm not afraid to say so.

The rest of Trump's cabinet is no better, either. They're all on his leash.

Congress should be a critical line of defense against Trump's radical agenda, but for checks and balances to work, we need leaders who are willing to stand up.

I promise I won't let any of his authoritarianism, lies, or corruption go unchecked.

[**If you're ready to go all in with me to win back the House next November, I need you to split a donation between my campaign and the Voter Protection Project of whatever you can now to build up our campaign's strength. name: Bernard Johnson 4 Congress
subject: Filing deadline: 8 days. Healthcare crisis: now.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bernard Johnson for Congress
body:
The healthcare plan Washington doesn't want you to see.

| | |
---
# Bernard Johnson for TX-19
Real Policies. Real Solutions. Real Representation. Last week, I shared our platform: Three Generational Acts, AI protection, IEP for America, and a 10-Year Sunset Clause. Today, I'm releasing the policy Washington has failed to deliver for decades: 🏥 The Universal Healthcare Security Act Every American covered. Lower costs. Your choice.
### Your Treasury Health Security Account
**$1,000-4,000/year** deposited directly into your account. Your money. Your healthcare decisions. Rolls over up to $10,000 and builds wealth while you stay healthy.
### Free Preventive Care
Annual comprehensive physical. Dental, vision, and hearing. 4 mental health sessions. Catches problems early when they're cheaper to treat.
### Affordable Catastrophic Insurance
Private companies compete for your business. **$25-500/month** target premiums. Pre-existing conditions protected—no lifetime limits. [Read Full Policy →](https://www.bernardjohnson4congress.com/universal_healthcare_security_act_uhsa?e=a7dc8436aef29fc41d8bccc6c574b323&utm_source=bernardjohnson4congress&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=november_2025_follow_up&n=1 "UHSA") What Makes This Different
### Republicans:
Still arguing about tweets. No unified plan. Eight million lose coverage if ACA subsidies expire.
### Democrats:
Medicare for All costs $3-4 trillion/year. Eliminates private insurance. Dead in Congress.
### UHSA:
**$1.3 trillion/year. 100% coverage. Preserves choice. Can actually pass.** [Compare Plans →](https://www.bernardjohnson4congress.com/healthcare_comparisons?e=a7dc8436aef29fc41d8bccc6c574b323&utm_source=bernardjohnson4congress&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=november_2025_follow_up&n=2 "Healthcare Comparisons") For TX-19, This Is Personal **Texas has 5 million uninsured—more than any state.** I've watched families here ration insulin, skip checkups, and go bankrupt from medical bills. Jodey Arrington voted to repeal the ACA without a replacement. Twice. **We can do better.**
### The Opportunity & The Deadline
Filing deadline: December 8th. Cost: $3,125. This is an **open seat** and our best chance to win in years. No 80% incumbent. No impossible odds. Just policy vs. empty promises. But I can't file without your help. [Choose your support amount →](https://www.bernardjohnson4congress.com/donate?e=a7dc8436aef29fc41d8bccc6c574b323&utm_source=bernardjohnson4congress&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=november_2025_follow_up&n=3 "Donate")
#### What Your Donation Does Right Now:
**$5:** Prints 10 UHSA policy cards for West Texas families **$25:** Funds Facebook ads reaching 500 TX-19 voters **$50:** Gas money to explain this plan at 3 rural town halls **$100:** Event booth materials—policy comparisons, handouts, signage **$3,125:** Gets us on the ballot. Gives TX-19 a real choice.
#### Your Investment Breaks Down Like This:
**• Filing fee:** $3,125 (due December 8th) **• Policy education materials:** Printing, digital ads **• Grassroots organizing:** Town halls, voter contact **• Zero consultants. Zero corporate money.** Just direct voter outreach. This Isn't Just About Healthcare It's about proving that substantive policy can win. That voters want solutions, not slogans that an open seat means an open opportunity. Land ownership for families. AI worker protection. Child safety. Government accountability. Universal healthcare. **These aren't dreams. They're detailed, ready-to-implement policies.** But they only matter if we're on the ballot. [Invest in Real Policy →](https://www.bernardjohnson4congress.com/donate?e=a7dc8436aef29fc41d8bccc6c574b323&utm_source=bernardjohnson4congress&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=november_2025_follow_up&n=4 "Donate") Comment. Challenge. Contribute. Every policy page includes comments. Tell me what you think. Ask hard questions. This campaign is built on conversation. 8 days until the filing deadline.
An open seat.
The best chance we've had. I need you with me. Thank you for believing that policy matters more than party. — Bernard Johnson **P.S.** Can't donate? Share the healthcare plan with 3 people who need it. That's just as valuable. [Twitter/X](https://www.bernardjohnson4congress.com/r?u=jV2O8dHWazmXFCw5z8vKLUqKp9e--PPhmszOmAsOMVs&e=a7dc8436aef29fc41d8bccc6c574b323&utm_source=bernardjohnson4congress&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=november_2025_follow_up&n=5 "Twitter-X") | [Website](https://www.bernardjohnson4congress.com?e=a7dc8436aef29fc41d8bccc6c574b323&utm_source=bernardjohnson4congress&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=november_2025_follow_up&n=6 "Home") | [Compare Healthcare Plans](https://www.bernardjohnson4congress.com/healthcare_comparisons?e=a7dc8436aef29fc41d8bccc6c574b323&utm_source=bernardjohnson4congress&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=november_2025_follow_up&n=7 "Healthcare Comparisons") | [Volunteer](https://www.bernardjohnson4congress.com/volunteer?e=a7dc8436aef29fc41d8bccc6c574b323&utm_source=bernardjohnson4congress&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=november_2025_follow_up&n=8 "Volunteer") Paid for by Bernard Johnson for Congress

Good morning, Peter. I'm sorry to bother you on a Sunday, but I had to reach out one more time before our midnight deadline. We're running out of time to hit our November fundraising goal, and I can't stress enough how important it is that we meet this target. In less than a year, Floridians will cast their votes in one of the most consequential elections our state has seen in decades. The Attorney General's race will determine whether we get a leader who fights corruption and stands up for working families — or whether James Uthmeier gets another term to serve Trump, DeSantis, and corporate special interests. We need to build the resources now to compete with Uthmeier's deep-pocketed donors and hit the ground running as we enter 2026. subject: I don’t love this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
Peter,
We’re just hours away from our critical end-of-month deadline. If you’re anything like me, you’ve probably gotten a lot of messages like this one asking for your support. And most will say the same thing: _this deadline matters._
But here’s why it _really,_ _really_ matters for this unique Senate race in Georgia, where I am the only Democratic incumbent Senator seeking reelection in a state Trump won:
1. **WE HAVE TO SHOW STRENGTH.** There are three Republican candidates running against me, and national Republicans have already spent millions of dollars on TV and digital ads attacking me. A strong showing in November proves to my opponents (and their Super PAC allies) — that our movement in Georgia is thriving and unstoppable.

2. **THERE’S NO TIME TO LOSE.** To win decisively, my team is already building a huge statewide campaign. That means more rallies. More organizers. More outreach — and early outreach — to voters in every corner of the state. That all takes resources right now. We’re building and we’ve got to keep building bigger and faster every day.

**[So please, if you can, use this link to contribute anything you can to Heartland Patriots and my reelection campaign in Georgia before our end-of-month deadline at midnight. I’d be grateful to have your support.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98276?refcode=em20251130-9764&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9764%2E614464%2EmWU6wK)**

---
I don’t love asking for money. I don’t think _anyone_ does.
But the reality is I have to. I can’t win without you.
_Citizens United_ opened the dam for limitless dark money to flood into elections.
_That’s a big part of why Congress is broken and corrupted. It’s why we have really expensive elections._
And also it’s why campaigns like mine have to build serious grassroots fundraising operations from Day One.
_I need your help, Peter!_
**I am literally MAGA’s #1 target.**
They will spare no expense and try every dirty trick.
Yes, this election will be tough.
But I know how to win tough fights. I’ve done it before.
Let’s do it again.

name: George Latimer
subject: Chaos caucus
disclaimer_text: Paid for by George Latimer for Congress
body:
What's happening in Washington right now is the exact opposite of results over rhetoric.

George Latimer is a lifelong Westchester resident who has built a career in public service by delivering unparalleled progressive results for local residents. Now, he's taking that work to the next level by serving as your Congressman, representing New York's 16th District. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/-Phg2RhDIEGJVPbb5vK87g2?unsubscribedata=p2nCcm1HY2FEzawkZod6zGXaCHh%2Bz7NYPVP1j%2BZ3WYRsuOXPuMQ1c6ulGpp0s%2F2Vg53Y9afuW%2BIYrPyVQZIMp%2F038JIXp84kpIZ%2FXcfFxzl1aH8TbKoPA13xCE3IqhpdzNeEoHKzoAyCpfCK%2B8eK66dBqzmO7mU4Gj%2F73chXuSfOCKxIXVjGcCr5BUhUGb9j2O5JncuvtFJ%2FHggvQQ2mtbbG79hJQ%2FelGdlCS4SsGOClW4P%2FWlziy50CGi3jgaLlVBkEYmmGKRUYXn%2F7e08mIzUl707ryt%2BpoqwH5Bu06x6%2FQV6O5%2BzUIK3Jnx00wSkQTd%2FpFC23OnF2iqSrjtmR9dcqnWdtlN009o70QmeOnqMNYFyITDo3h%2BHajBluEIwhLXPnyZpLFwZRtkN0SXfTRnMsA8JRDecOxGxpeFevKFgDApF%2BYqUrrWvLMsjeTU5p)

| |
---
Peter, When I decided to run for Congress, I wasn’t under any illusions. I knew Washington was broken, and I knew it would be hard. But I also knew the people in our district deserved someone who would show up, work hard for them, and stay focused on what actually matters, _**not the political drama that plays out on cable news every night.**_ **And now that I’m here, I can tell you: what’s happening in Washington right now is the exact opposite of results over rhetoric. **

House Republicans have spent the last few months proving just how out of touch and reckless their leadership has been — making cuts to health care, education, veterans’ benefits, and shutting down the government while giving more handouts to the wealthy and corporations.

It’s the same old playbook — and we’ve seen the consequences firsthand. Families are hurting, prices are going up, communities are being left behind, and the voices of everyday Americans are being ignored.

It’s abundantly clear that Donald Trump and his allies in Congress are focused on helping themselves, not the American people. _**Democrats need to take back the Majority, and that starts with preparing right now.**_ **[Can you chip in $10 or anything you can afford to stop Republican chaos and gridlock in Washington?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120278528/585794497/1087608061?amount=10&source=SBD_GL_EM_FR_113025_EOM03_180DO_D3_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQwMzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzQyZDJkYzgtMGNjZS1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=P8RE7rhJHSqLPEVIF-G5UehooL4TRq9EFaJiTGD9tIc=)** | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now.
---

clean_body: What's happening in Washington right now is the exact opposite of results over rhetoric. George Latimer is a lifelong Westchester resident who has built a career in public service by delivering unparalleled progressive results for local residents. Now, he's taking that work to the next level by serving as your Congressman, representing New York's 16th District. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Peter, When I decided to run for Congress, I wasn’t under any illusions. I knew Washington was broken, and I knew it would be hard. But I also knew the people in our district deserved someone who would show up, work hard for them, and stay focused on what actually matters, not the political drama that plays out on cable news every night. And now that I’m here, I can tell you: what’s happening in Washington right now is the exact opposite of results over rhetoric. House Republicans have spent the last few months proving just how out of touch and reckless their leadership has been — making cuts to health care, education, veterans’ benefits, and shutting down the government while giving more handouts to the wealthy and corporations. It’s the same old playbook — and we’ve seen the consequences firsthand. Families are hurting, prices are going up, communities are being left behind, and the voices of everyday Americans are being ignored. It’s abundantly clear that Donald Trump and his allies in Congress are focused on helping themselves, not the American people. Democrats need to take back the Majority, and that starts with preparing right now. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you for standing with me. – George Latimer * | | ---|--- = For over three decades, George Latimer has been a champion for progressive policies and leaders, helping lead the effort to make Westchester, a formerly solid Republican County, into a blue firewall that has withstood multiple red waves in recent years. George’s unparalleled track record in advancing Democratic goals includes successfully cutting regressive taxes, fighting for civil rights and racial equality, defending a woman’s right to choose, standing up to the NRA to keep guns off our streets, and voting for marriage equality. | = = Paid for by George Latimer for Congress George Latimer for Congress PO Box 789 White Plains, NY 10602 United States If you would like to unsubscribe, click here: You can also =.

| | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw
---
Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18]

The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18] | | | | | | See this tiny sheet in my hand? subject: I'll keep this quick
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO**
body:
I know this is a busy time of year, but this is important:

| | |

[](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/1134?t=1&akid=5902%2E400544%2EB1pGEV)
Hey, friend — Deb here. I know this is a busy time of year, so I'll keep this quick:
**With just hours until our November fundraising deadline, we're still $12,589 short of our $50,000 goal.**

Here's why this matters:
🟠 The governor's office in New Mexico has changed parties every eight years _for decades,_ which means that **Donald Trump and the GOP will do anything to flip this seat in 2026.**
**🟠 Grassroots support powers my campaign, not billionaire donors. **Every dollar that you give helps us fully fund the statewide organizing work, political outreach, and digital connection it’ll take to win this race.
**🟠 **I'm counting on your support, friend, to help us close our fundraising gap and show the GOP the strength of this grassroots team. **[So please, will you make a donation of $5 — or whatever you can spare — right now, ahead of tonight's important deadline?](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/1134?t=2&akid=5902%2E400544%2EB1pGEV)**
Thank you so much for your support.

Be fierce,

Deb

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:

Missing this goal would be a major setback — and a major win for Trump and his MAGA allies.](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/51821?c0=pj-email-20251130-1.0X4ekp&refcode=em20251130-5654&t=2&akid=5654%2E420207%2EDYT-jK)**

[**Will you chip in right now to help us cross the finish line before tomorrow’s midnight deadline?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/51821?c0=pj-email-20251130-1.0X4ekp&refcode=em20251130-5654&t=3&akid=5654%2E420207%2EDYT-jK)

It’s time to step up to the plate, be bold, and meet this moment with the energy it demands.
Thank you for your support,
Lauren Lalonde

Peter, you got a minute?

**Look, we’re less than 24 hours away from my end of month fundraising deadline and still $7,000 short of our goal.**

I gotta be blunt... If we fall short of our goals at _this_ critical point of the year, we’ll feel the consequences on E-day:

* **We won’t be able to ramp up our youth organizing efforts** on college campuses across Florida,
* **We’ll have to scale down the size of our outreach events,** bringing fewer young people into our movement to fight fascism across Florida,
* **And we’ll have to delay hiring more campaign staff** until we can afford to pay them what they deserve for pushing our movement forward.

[**_But I just talked to my team, and they told me if everyone reading this email could give just $27, $15, or even $10, we’d pass our goal by a few dollars. I hate having to ask for money, but it’s the only way we can do this work. name: Michael's iPhone
subject: Sorry to bother on a busy night
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Governor
body:
My finance director just let me know that at the rate gifts are coming in tonight, there's no shot we'll make it in time.
My finance director just let me know that at the rate gifts are coming in tonight, there's no shot we'll make it in time.
| | |
---
Hey, friend – it's Michael Bennet. Sorry to bother you on a busy night, but I'll keep it quick.
My team's working late to help me close the last 7% gap on my $30,000 end-of-month goal by 11:59 p.m. MT tonight – but my finance director just told me that at the rate gifts are coming in, there's no shot we'll make it in time.
I'm not the kind of guy who gives up that easily, though.
Instead, I'm reaching out to you in a last-ditch effort** because she also mentioned that if at least 161 grassroots supporters read this note and chip in $5 by midnight, it'd be _just enough_ to close the gap.**
**So while you're still up, can I please count on you to make** **your first gift of $5** , **or anything you can spare now, to get us back on track?**
If so, you can use this link to donate. I made it just for you: **[secure.actblue.com/donate/bfg-email-fr-2025/dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120280127/585799620/851209409?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk997-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMGVmYmNiYy0wZWNlLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WGTtIoIqVuXQXR64eZ2ZrPHaIXN-_jcLgr5pa1mz0-I=)**
Thanks for your help tonight, and for all you do – take care,

Michael
Sent from Michael's iPhone
| Bennet for Governor
PO Box 270117
Louisville, CO 80027
United States **Paid for by Bennet for Governor. Registered Agent: Tracie Moore.** By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution. name: Squad Victory HQ
subject: Can we count on you to step up?
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20251130-1666-foote&t=1001&akid=1666%2E342411%2ERoHsI7 ]Squad Victory Fund

We’re in the final stretch,
Peter.

This is the last chance to help us hit our end-of-month goal before our
deadline at midnight. What we do in these final hours will determine how
strong we’ll be in the fights ahead. [ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20251130-movement.HdJUWV&refcode=em20251130-1666&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1666%2E342411%2ERoHsI7 ]Can we count on you to chip in?

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20251130-movement.HdJUWV&refcode=em20251130-1666&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=1666%2E342411%2ERoHsI7 ]Contribute ››

The Squad Victory Fund is powered by people who refuse to let far-right
forces drown out working-class communities. We don’t rely on billionaire
donors or super PACs — our strength comes from this grassroots team, which
helps us amplify progressive voices and turns grassroots energy into
action.

Every ounce of support propels our movement to reach new heights and
proves that people power can outflank billionaire influence.

When we meet our goals, we expand our impact and can defend our democracy
and continue growing a movement that refuses to back down. When we fall
short, Trump and his MAGA allies gain ground — we can’t let that happen.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20251130-movement.HdJUWV&refcode=em20251130-1666&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1004&akid=1666%2E342411%2ERoHsI7 ]So, can you be one of the few more supporters needed from
Cresco to chip in $3 before midnight? Together,
we can push this movement forward and continue building the future we
deserve.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20251130-movement.HdJUWV&refcode=em20251130-1666&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=1666%2E342411%2ERoHsI7 ]Contribute ››

Thank you for standing with us.

In solidarity,

Squad Victory HQ

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.squadvictoryfund.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1666%2E342411%2ERoHsI7

Paid for by The Squad Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated equally among: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, and Rashida Tlaib for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003

Email us: info@squadvictoryfund.com

name: Leaders We Deserve
subject: 🚨TWO DAYS until Akbar’s election
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
Akbar’s election is on Tuesday. Can you help him cross the finish line?
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20251130-1&t=1&akid=2887%2E587540%2ElBtUv4)
Hi Peter. This is a make-or-break moment for our movement:
🚨 **Akbar Ali’s runoff is just two days away,** and this final 48-hour push _will_ determine whether a 21-year-old community leader becomes **the youngest member of the Georgia Assembly in history.**
🚨 And tonight at **midnight, we’re facing our first end-of-month deadline** since our big wins at the ballot box earlier this month — and with donations dropping off over the holiday, **we’re on track to miss it.**
We cannot let anyone believe our recent progress was a fluke or a finish line. It was just the _beginning_ — the moment young leaders like Akbar finally started breaking through and taking power.
[**Will you split $21 — for a 21-year-old candidate — or anything you can before midnight between Leaders We Deserve and Akbar’s campaign?**](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/3929?c0=em_ms_lwd_20251130_1_akbar.-woTgd&refcode=em20251130-2887&t=2&akid=2887%2E587540%2ElBtUv4)
**[Donate $21 »](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/3929?c0=em_ms_lwd_20251130_1_akbar.-woTgd&refcode=em20251130-2887&t=3&akid=2887%2E587540%2ElBtUv4)**
Akbar is a small‐business owner, Kennesaw State grad, and former First Vice Chair of the Gwinnett County Democratic Party who came _just 500 votes_ short of first place in the primary for Georgia’s 106th House District. He built that support the hard way: months of door knocking, one conversation at a time, even traveling with two interpreters so every community could be heard and included in his campaign.
And now **he’s _this_ close because of you, Peter:** Your support turned a long shot into a frontrunner and powered the organizing that moved voters — including people David met at the doors who _didn’t even know there was an election_ but committed to voting for Akbar after hearing about his platform.
And in a race like this, that kind of organizing is everything. Runoffs come down to turnout, often by just a few hundred votes — which is why your support _before midnight_ is so critical. We must win this race, hit our end-of-month deadline, and prove we aren’t slowing down or satisfied after this month’s wins — we’re just getting started.
[**⏰ Time is running out, Peter. Will you chip in $21 or anything you can before midnight to help close our gap, drive the final turnout push, and elect the youngest member of the Georgia Assembly ever?**](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/3929?c0=em_ms_lwd_20251130_1_akbar.-woTgd&refcode=em20251130-2887&t=4&akid=2887%2E587540%2ElBtUv4)
**[Donate $21 »](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/3929?c0=em_ms_lwd_20251130_1_akbar.-woTgd&refcode=em20251130-2887&t=23&akid=2887%2E587540%2ElBtUv4)**
Winning Tuesday won’t just be a single victory — it’ll be proof that when we bet on young organizers and grassroots power, we can change what’s possible, make history, and open the door to even bigger wins ahead.
Thank you for stepping up in a critical moment for our movement.
— Leaders We Deserve
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20251130-1&t=24&refcode2=2887_587540_lBtUv4&akid=2887%2E587540%2ElBtUv4)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=25&akid=2887%2E587540%2ElBtUv4)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=2887%2E587540%2ElBtUv4)

To give by check:
Leaders We Deserve
611 Pennsylvania Ave SE
#192
Washington, DC 20003
Email us: [info@leaderswedeserve.com](mailto:info@leaderswedeserve.com)
PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE.COM, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE

name: Team Marsha Blackburn
subject: I’m so sorry to email you on a Sunday
body:
Please respond before 11:59 PM!

| | | | Peter, we're so sorry to reach out like this, but your submission has been flagged as **[MISSING]** from our database! Senate Republicans released our brand-new [TRUMP SATISFACTION SURVEY](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MTEzMF9ITy1USC4xMTAxMTdfdDE3NjI1OTctMTA0MyZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTExMzBfSE8tVEguMTEwMTE3X3QxNzYyNTk3LTEwNDMifQ/Cu4VVLx126HI8i9Vl7c5DQ) with the goal to have 100 completed submissions.
**So far, only 99 have responded... _which means we’re just waiting on YOU!_**
[ Peter, all responses will be immediately flagged for President Trump’s team, so it’s important that you help us complete our survey before midnight.
](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MTEzMF9ITy1USC4xMTAxMTdfdDE3NjI1OTctMTA0MyZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTExMzBfSE8tVEguMTEwMTE3X3QxNzYyNTk3LTEwNDMifQ/tJLG8b3Er_ZNjhwhEfEZVw)**Trump Satisfaction Survey**
**Registered to:** Peter**Due:** 11:59 PM (ET)1.) Do you approve of the ICE deportations of illegal aliens?2.) Do you approve of banning men from women’s sports?3.) Do you approve of tapping into American energy resources?4.) Do you approve of using our military to address the border crisis?5.) Do you approve of ending taxes on tips?_*** Optional Question: Are there any questions, comments, or concerns you’d like to share with your Republican Senate Majority? ***_[ TAKE THE SURVEY →
](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MTEzMF9ITy1USC4xMTAxMTdfdDE3NjI1OTctMTA0MyZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTExMzBfSE8tVEguMTEwMTE3X3QxNzYyNTk3LTEwNDMifQ/pliRfKEd15f9j1Ux9bQGHw)MAGA Republicans and our entire team look forward to hearing from you. Please don’t delay and risk our survey going incomplete!

Thank you,
_
Team Marsha Blackburn_[ TAKE THE SURVEY →
](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MTEzMF9ITy1USC4xMTAxMTdfdDE3NjI1OTctMTA0MyZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTExMzBfSE8tVEguMTEwMTE3X3QxNzYyNTk3LTEwNDMifQ/VcJ8x4EbuvCiokiLiT_Pww)| | |

name: Senator John N. Kennedy
subject: Let me tell ya, this ain’t a typo
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
I’m told my reputation precedes me. So believe me when I say that I’m deeply concerned right now.

I hope that's a good thing.
I try not to sound like some stuffy politician - I like talking in plain English and speaking from the heart.
So believe me when I say that I'm deeply concerned right now.
My friend, Steve Scalise, just informed me that the top House Democrat Super PAC is already unloading $50,000,000.000 (and no, this ain't a typo) into key battleground districts. They're hitting us harder and earlier than ever before.
That's enough cash to completely overwhelm DOZENS of our most vulnerable Conservatives!
_And to make matters even worse, my buddies in the House have a HUGE deadline coming up, and I just got word they 're falling 15-20% behind their goal.__
_It 'll be a real disaster if they miss it.

body:
Trump’s attacks on the First Amendment are escalating!

| _**We have good news:**_ The Corporation for Public Broadcasting agreed to fulfill a multi-year contract with NPR after Trump pulled funding! **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120281334/585803958/-318400792?refcode=NDCAF_20251130_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNzJmMTAyMi0xMGNlLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nbDmISUh46AHcmOxIyAXbvO51ks7hfXPHVAB2ugL3YU=&emci=4dccc0ff-f3ca-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=c72f1022-10ce-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=48524772)** | [DEFEND PUBLIC BROADCASTING: ADD YOUR NAME NOW! »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120281335/585803959/-318400792?refcode=NDCAF_20251130_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNzJmMTAyMi0xMGNlLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nbDmISUh46AHcmOxIyAXbvO51ks7hfXPHVAB2ugL3YU=&emci=4dccc0ff-f3ca-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=c72f1022-10ce-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=48524772)
---
**_The bad news:_ This contract is only temporary. **Trump’s public broadcasting cuts are still under legal review and his attacks on the First Amendment are escalating!

He’s pressuring and threatening public outlets to silence all journalism that exposes the corruption of his administration and disagrees with it.

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: Meeting people where they’re at
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE
body:
[1]Powered By People

I’ve been all over Texas this past month, recruiting candidates across the
ballot, raising volunteers for our voter registration work, and working
with those volunteers to register and stay in touch with new voters across
the state.

Meeting folks who are stepping into the fight for the first time, joining
old friends who’ve been there from the beginning, and talking with new
voters to understand their perspectives and what it will take to bring
more of them into the next election – all of that makes me feel confident
that what we’re doing is key to winning big elections in Texas in 2026.

There’s a place for consultants, pollsters, social media, and TV (I
guess), but that’s not us. We’re focused on meeting people where they’re
at, showing them the respect they deserve, and working with them to
overcome the most intense voter suppression in the country so that we can
win power back for the people.

But (you knew this part was coming): we can’t do this without you. This
movement is going to take all of us, the organizer, the volunteer, the
voter, and you.

We’ve got an end-of-month fundraising deadline tonight, and I’d like to
show all those volunteers out there the kind of support we’ve built behind
them. Every dollar keeps us on the ground, helps us bring new voters onto
the rolls, and ensures that we can do the essential work needed for 2026
and beyond.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20251130.Wf6HW1&refcode=ema20251130-240494&amount=3&t=1002&akid=240494%2E444211%2El329dZ ]Will you chip in $3 ahead of tonight’s end-of-month
fundraising deadline to keep this movement moving?

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20251130.Wf6HW1&refcode=ema20251130-240494&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=3&t=1021&akid=240494%2E444211%2El329dZ ]DONATE $3

Beto

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1022&akid=240494%2E444211%2El329dZ

PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE

On 11/21, the Democrat Attorney General in Arizona had the chance to do the right thing and DROP her wrongful prosecution against me – an _innocent_ 80-year-old man facing 20 years in prison.

---
**She is now rushing to the __State__ Supreme Court for emergency assistance.**
---
It’s all viciously calculated. She knows the President has no pardon authority for __state__ crimes.
---
But let me be clear: **I will never give up the fight for my freedom**.
---
When President Trump and I were arrested in the most violent jail in America, we proclaimed, “ _NEVER_ SURRENDER!”
---
Two years later, President Trump is back in the White House.
---
_**But I’m still fighting for my freedom!** And Democrats have RIGGED the case so that a federal pardon from President Trump is **_POWERLESS_** in _state_ court._

Let me put it bluntly: _you_ truly are my final hope.

| | Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him.
---

Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675*, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671.

Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. name: Sen. Graham
subject: I need your support
body:
Fellow American, I want to ensure South Carolina delivers a Republican U.S. Senator who will help deliver a safer, more prosperous America. Do you agree? |
---
Fellow American, the only way we can keep our country on track is at the ballot box next November.

clean_body: Fellow American, I want to ensure South Carolina delivers a Republican U.S. Senator who will help deliver a safer, more prosperous America. Do you agree? | Fellow American, the only way we can keep our country on track is at the ballot box next November. If conservative-minded candidates don't win in November, we will fall back into the Left's failed policies and leadership. This is why I'm running for re-election, Fellow American. I want to ensure South Carolina delivers a Republican U.S. Senator who will help build a safer, more prosperous America. A Senator who will work hand in hand with President Trump to help you, not someone who will spend all their time fighting the President and bringing along liberal chaos. They'll stop at nothing to try to defeat me and flip South Carolina Blue. Fellow American, that's why I'm reaching out to you right now. When Team Graham rallies together, chips in a few dollars, and helps me in this battle, our country wins. Tonight at midnight is my end-of-month fundraising deadline, and I want everyone to see that Team Graham is ALL IN on keeping America safe, free, and WINNING. | Please, chip in before midnight tonight, and let's show the Left we are leaving their old liberal ideas behind. I just got back from an amazing hike in the foothills with my family, and it reminded me **why this campaign matters so much**. This district is our home. It’s where we’re raising our kids. And it deserves leadership that shows up and fights for people. Our **end of month deadline is tonight at midnight** , and we are **still coming up short**. I never want to take your support for granted, but if you’re able to chip in a few dollars, it would genuinely help us close the gap. Null,

It’s Steny Hoyer – former House Majority Leader. I’ll be direct, because this is urgent:
Haley Stevens is one of the toughest and most principled leaders I have ever served with, and right now, **she needs our help in her battleground Senate race in Michigan.**

She must reach her critical $350,000 end-of-month goal by midnight tonight. That’s why I’m personally asking: **[Will you rush $5 to help Haley win in Michigan and flip the Senate blue?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/9666?t=4&akid=1506%2E49239%2EEFPIUv)**
| | [Donate Now](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/9665?t=5&akid=1506%2E49239%2EEFPIUv)
---
Haley’s race in Michigan is one of the most competitive in the country – Trump and his billionaire megadonors are going all in to flip this seat red. We can’t let that happen.

**Because if we lose Michigan, we lose our shot at a Democratic Senate majority.**
Haley Stevens is exactly the kind of leader we need in the Senate. I’ve seen her fight relentlessly for working families, for Michigan jobs, and for our freedoms. I know she won’t back down. But she can’t do this alone.

**[Will you join me in supporting Haley? Rush $5 now to help Haley reach her critical goal, keep Michigan blue, and flip the Senate for Democrats.](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/9666?t=6&akid=1506%2E49239%2EEFPIUv)**

Thank you for supporting Haley,

Rep. Steny Hoyer
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. Haley

name: Laurel Viles
subject: Join us for OLCV’s Virtual Town Hall with Senator Wyden!
body:
https://secure.ngpvan.com/4E0z8mwxE0ahw93hgRTJ2w2?contactdata=gVchjQIOkkQpIuR/OI5S37G++UbYcxENeMjDnC6PLq4kMJtlGlhYwCzxvLKYEBs45hwGXELlWpC8zeadVMcTQiOO+gb49JkzJfJg0G8fb2JKlgbzGy9GMSB2QAnYEq0W [https://secure.ngpvan.com/4E0z8mwxE0ahw93hgRTJ2w2?contactdata=gVchjQIOkkQpIuR/OI5S37G++UbYcxENeMjDnC6PLq4kMJtlGlhYwCzxvLKYEBs45hwGXELlWpC8zeadVMcTQiOO+gb49JkzJfJg0G8fb2JKlgbzGy9GMSB2QAnYEq0W]
Hi Peter,
I wanted to reach out and see if you can join us on Friday, December 5th, from 3 - 4:15 pm PT for our Town Hall on the Environment with Senator Ron Wyden! After the longest federal government shutdown ever and ongoing federal threats against our environment, it’s more important than ever that we have climate champions to fight for the change we need. Senator Wyden has been a champion for clean energy tax credits, climate, and the environment, and we’re excited to give you the opportunity to get your questions answered by him. RSVP and send in your questions here! [https://secure.ngpvan.com/4E0z8mwxE0ahw93hgRTJ2w2]
OLCV’s Town Hall on the Environment with Senator Ron Wyden
WHEN: Friday, December 5th from 3:00 - 4:15 pm PT
Via Zoom
RSVP and submit your questions here! [https://secure.ngpvan.com/4E0z8mwxE0ahw93hgRTJ2w2?contactdata=gVchjQIOkkQpIuR/OI5S37G++UbYcxENeMjDnC6PLq4kMJtlGlhYwCzxvLKYEBs45hwGXELlWpC8zeadVMcTQiOO+gb49JkzJfJg0G8fb2JKlgbzGy9GMSB2QAnYEq0W]
Senator Wyden will answer pre-selected questions from audience members that fit into the categories of: public lands, clean energy, climate, the Endangerment Finding, federal funding cuts to environmental programs and agencies, and other environmental issues. Make sure you RSVP and submit your questions here for the chance to have Senator Wyden answer them! [https://secure.ngpvan.com/4E0z8mwxE0ahw93hgRTJ2w2]
See you there,
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AVLCV/1/70877/images/Laurel.png]
Laurel Viles (she/her)
OLCV Engagement Organizer
https://www.facebook.com/oregonlcv [https://www.facebook.com/oregonlcv] https://bsky.app/profile/olcv.org [https://bsky.app/profile/olcv.org] https://www.instagram.com/olcv/?next=%2F [https://www.instagram.com/olcv/?next=%2F] https://x.com/OLCV [https://x.com/OLCV]

1110 SE Alder Suite 220
Portland, OR 97214
United States

Hey team, Tonight at midnight is Eric’s first end-of-month fundraising deadline since launching his campaign for Governor, and right now we’re falling short of our goal. Let me explain.
#
[](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/1276?c0=mcb-em-20251130-1.vPfO9J&refcode=em20251130-2536&amount=5&t=1&akid=2536%2E21716%2Er6tm_O)
**$5.**
**$5** is the exact amount I’m asking you to [**chip in before our big end-of-month fundraising deadline at midnight.**](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/1276?c0=mcb-em-20251130-1.vPfO9J&refcode=em20251130-2536&amount=5&t=2&akid=2536%2E21716%2Er6tm_O) Let me explain why:
**$5** will have a powerful impact in helping me win re-election — and continue taking on the biggest fights in Congress, holding Donald Trump accountable for his cruelty, and legislating to make your life better.
**$5** will power our efforts to help Democrats take back the House next year and save our country.
**$5** will help prove that a different kind of politics is possible, one focused on hope and solutions.
And **$5** will go a _long_ way to help us reach our $45,000 November goal.
I understand that with so much uncertainty right now, not everyone who reads this email will be able to give $5, but if you’re in the position to do so:
**[Can I count on you to pitch in $5 —or whatever you can spare — right now? With less than 24 hours left until our deadline, I need your help to cross the finish line.](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/1184?c0=mcb-em-20251130-1.H7ZqLM&refcode=em20251130-2536&amount=5&t=3&akid=2536%2E21716%2Er6tm_O)**

Sarah

name: Dexter HQ
subject: Trump is not a scientist.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maxine for Congress
body:
https://maxinefororegon.com/ [https://maxinefororegon.com/]
One thing that’s giving us hope right now? This recent Atlantic article:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-25q4?refcode=x_251130_theatlantic_EOM1_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-25q4?refcode=x_251130_theatlantic_EOM1_act]
Medical experts, scientists, and people who give a damn— people like Maxine Dexter —are running for elected office because they understand that our public health institutions are under threat.
That threat is a president who’s fired, rehired, and then proceeded to re-fire thousands of CDC employees. Some of the disease research staff were fired and reinstated three times.
That threat is a POTUS who has hollowed out the FDA and HHS, weakening the teams responsible for keeping our food and medicines safe. They’re the people we rely on to prevent contaminated food, unsafe drugs, and public health crises.
And that threat is a Health and Human Services Secretary who believes vaccines do more harm than good.
Well, it’s time scientists, doctors, and medical experts become a threat of their own.
As a physician, Dr. Maxine Dexter is leading the charge and building a movement of licensed professionals who are fighting for:
* Universal healthcare
* Expanded veterans’ benefits
* Reproductive rights for everyone, no matter what state you live in
Why? Because she actually knows what she’s doing. Maxine knows how to research, diagnose, and treat our families, and now she’s treating our democracy.
As we close out the month, we’re counting on this community to help us hold the line. Chip in today to protect real science, public health, and safety—and push back against Trump and his cronies. Every contribution matters. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-25q4?refcode=x_251130_theatlantic_EOM1_act]
If you have saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately:

DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-25q4?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=x_251130_theatlantic_EOM1_act] OTHER [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-25q4?express_lane_other=true&refcode=x_251130_theatlantic_EOM1_act]

Now she's using those skills in Congress to ensure healthy communities by standing up to Big Pharma, fighting climate change, and expanding reproductive rights, as well as rebuilding a fair economy for all by protecting Social Security and Medicare.
To learn more about Maxine, visit MaxineForOregon.com [https://maxinefororegon.com/] .

body:
James has taken millions of dollars from the DeVos family while Jocelyn is funding her campaign with grassroots donations from people like you.
# [](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/203?t=1&akid=1064%2E181023%2E8Yy_4Z)

If you want to chip in before then, here is the link to give: **[secure.actblue.com/donate/jmb-em-q42025](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/239?c0=jmb-em-q42025.hprbVa&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20251130_AM1_V1_S1&t=2&akid=1064%2E181023%2E8Yy_4Z)**
Why is this deadline so important?
**Because our campaign was OUTRAISED by MAGA Republican John James during the last fundraising period.**
It’s not surprising. James has taken millions of dollars from the billionaire donors like the DeVos family, while Jocelyn is funding her campaign with grassroots donations from people like you. _Her average grassroots donation is just $22.76._
But we can’t give up and let John James buy his way to the governor’s mansion. We need to catch up NOW if we’re going to beat him next time around – and that starts with crushing this November fundraising goal.

subject: upfront

I’m going to pull back the curtain, Peter, because I need to level with you. **Tonight marks one of our final fundraising deadlines before the midterm election year. From the passage of Prop 50 adding tens of thousands of voters to CA-27, to the implications of the government shutdown, this month changed the landscape of our race.** As one of the only Democrats to flip a red seat blue last year, I’m at the top of the national GOP target list. We’re already facing a Republican challenger in this race, I’ve been named one of the most at-risk Democratic incumbents nationwide, and you can bet I’m already facing baseless attacks. We expect the outside spending to increase in the new year -- right as we’re working to reach the new voters we need to keep this seat blue. So I need to be upfront: What we raise before midnight will be the clearest signal of our strength heading into the midterm election year. We cannot afford to fall short when the stakes are this high. **[Before we close the books on November, I want to make sure our warchest is ready for what comes next. * * *
**** Millions of people with disabilities and chronic conditions could lose their healthcare on January 1st. Republicans in Congress have not extended the ACA’s enhanced subsidies, meaning health insurance premiums are set to double or even triple in 2026. This looming crisis will hit the most vulnerable hardest. An estimated 4.8 million people will become uninsured – _up to 2 million individuals with chronic conditions could lose their health coverage._ Losing this coverage means forfeiting essential benefits like durable medical equipment, specialized prescriptions, and rehabilitation. _For many, losing this coverage means sickness and death._ **House Democrats have filed a discharge petition to force a floor vote on extending these critical subsidies. We need 218 signatures, which means just four Republicans are needed. Now is the time to force action.** **[Click this link to check if your Representative has signed the discharge petition and send an urgent message demanding they protect comprehensive, affordable care.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3-xqxHetE1QJIRA7neEqnERrd-cH1Sp-vcWpmm8BsKMuowYrt8SANzN0rsmMkCiq5w10ycOFkPVwOhgrp-RdfTx6HJTeNIVjhDv3ErAojtuzX8xIMqkTMk89J2aylzMx0McUOKg754wSM8Z8j90F1BSRDlfwOE1E6PDKroBL2OW35nHBArSQxbRiS_qkrXrAJQHAeLUxya4pctEBqOenIxVVIeTRHC0D95n9OGf8KVQjNkY7z6pUk1cdxHDooCbQ4lMIr0TlBl0TJwPTvNgA59KAVbI56zuWdR7C9Nsb6MOAHvs78vopW-FNAKdwLn3T7qptorGn9l3-RxlQZ-dPZTf-DsokrygDiLZIAh986k1vUaiXxe3mid5EqIodPswyA68vnr_mdS0qxSSVBx3hpmcRY9eXSb_0X3Az_j4X3D7XYfEzBDKhwVaMkhg4Qkd1DmzW_8fGuoU71IOcInoDK0m_V5bL_lhODsvtWlmE2Crog/4m1/OuAv_YdzRbOpd8iM6Kai6g/h2/h001.lgagqp_FGDIiG2Nd-TxCAbs_VkVBU0lCBWGQxABnk7o)** | [SIGN](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3-xqxHetE1QJIRA7neEqnERrd-cH1Sp-vcWpmm8BsKMuowYrt8SANzN0rsmMkCiq5w10ycOFkPVwOhgrp-RdfTx6HJTeNIVjhDv3ErAojtuzX8xIMqkTMk89J2aylzMx0McUOKg754wSM8Z8j90F1BSRDlfwOE1E6PDKroBL2OW35nHBArSQxbRiS_qkrXrAJQHAeLUxya4pctEBqOenIxVVIeTRHC0D95n9OGf8KVQjFdsmgYKPq3X-OhdYhoqguk3hMPK5xGRbNPOo73UA_IEyrjCso26B9iPhfQnJhEW1UhdXqCy5-V-3EoaRVBYrGE-cJ7km00pJPeEcxdcLIxAjLrStstEvrZqUzGQENyizjJ1UYfvzLIT-Nr_7LIW-aMp5uZBf3Vfwu1O9LzPOsf-C2Uvdm1O4vRGZZQlusroMOQCntAPLoYUj1I8cg7IMtZ-14R2YIt_rxTRDUYX4CHCMrvyy4IQoC2VgkI5yQzhTQ/4m1/OuAv_YdzRbOpd8iM6Kai6g/h3/h001.6V4V5-d8OHbOgFseT8O1R-ANEktfhBAShYf3f6Jx9js)

For disabled individuals, this premium spike is a direct threat to economic independence.
The exodus of sick and disabled enrollees will also destabilize the entire insurance market, leading to the loss of nearly 340,000 American jobs.
**Not exactly Making America Great or Healthy Again, is it?**
**[We need FOUR Republican signatures immediately. Add your name and demand they save affordable healthcare!](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3-xqxHetE1QJIRA7neEqnERrd-cH1Sp-vcWpmm8BsKMuowYrt8SANzN0rsmMkCiq5w10ycOFkPVwOhgrp-RdfTx6HJTeNIVjhDv3ErAojtuzX8xIMqkTMk89J2aylzMx0McUOKg754wSM8Z8j90F1BSRDlfwOE1E6PDKroBL2OW35nHBArSQxbRiS_qkrXrAJQHAeLUxya4pctEBqOenIxVVIeTRHC0D95n9OGf8KVQjMVbJArlKwlxQ1a8cXq33_Opg4gfF7FUpc17boH4nwaItpASdu6z_sfCyN6f5JuwV6Gl9MmbDwkPm0aJZcr9yze9kUTHmX-lJFlcwuT9phr47TfxvHDZOxpq1SCD4k6yrDTgkmrE74RtQ2pz_G4nt_tGLoVGTYUrh3feMeiz8x4WjqeRyloR6GPO1RMljTsZ4P31vbVm8pRB_RJxsXIlY-oWSXthA1XHA-BrqvQcrsn9Dr1h7A5Que6psqwroUak2g/4m1/OuAv_YdzRbOpd8iM6Kai6g/h4/h001.B62Lbu6_EyVCPgQKAP7O8hSs11zjCoqgCWEpuci5ZqE)**

clean_body: | | | Our lives are on the line, and the clock is ticking. Millions of people with disabilities and chronic conditions could lose their healthcare on January 1st. Republicans in Congress have not extended the ACA’s enhanced subsidies, meaning health insurance premiums are set to double or even triple in 2026. This looming crisis will hit the most vulnerable hardest. An estimated 4.8 million people will become uninsured – up to 2 million individuals with chronic conditions could lose their health coverage. Losing this coverage means forfeiting essential benefits like durable medical equipment, specialized prescriptions, and rehabilitation. For many, losing this coverage means sickness and death. House Democrats have filed a discharge petition to force a floor vote on extending these critical subsidies. We need 218 signatures, which means just four Republicans are needed. Now is the time to force action. | For disabled individuals, this premium spike is a direct threat to economic independence. The exodus of sick and disabled enrollees will also destabilize the entire insurance market, leading to the loss of nearly 340,000 American jobs. Not exactly Making America Great or Healthy Again, is it? ** Thanks for your support. -Able Dems elects Democrats with disabilities. We fight to protect accessible voting, expand health care and Social Security, and equality for all. To donate by check, send to: Able Dems PAC c/o Pocketbook Strategies 1110 N Virgil Ave #375 Los Angeles, CA 90029 \- \- Paid for by Able Dems PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to Able Dems PAC are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. | | Sent via . body:

# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=9251%2E5257348%2E6Cfnsp)
I'm not a fortune teller. My Magic 8 Ball skills are iffy. And I can't predict the future. _But it looks like we have a winning formula for the next election, Derek._
Based on the results from the elections earlier this month, the winning agenda is **one focused on affordability and taking bold action rather than defending the status quo.**
It’s not about deciding which _one leader_ represents our party (because spoiler alert, it’s never going to be just one leader who represents all of us).
It’s about addressing the things that people care the most about: the cost and quality of life — whether it’s food, housing, or health care — and defending our democracy by standing up to Trump.
Everywhere from New York City to New Jersey to Virginia, voters were focused on what it takes to pay rent, get to work, and buy food to feed their families.
And here in California, with just one issue on the ballot, near record numbers turned out to counter the GOP’s efforts to gerrymander the U.S. House on Trump’s behalf.
I’m working tirelessly to lower costs and to make sure voters know which party actually cares about affordability. And I will always stand up to Trump.
[**If you're able to, please pitch in so we can go into 2026 strong, using this winning message to turn out voters, flip the House and Senate, and stand up to Trump once and for all.**](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q42025_abs_em.dd-KUe&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20251130_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=9251%2E5257348%2E6Cfnsp)

| | Every day, we hear about a new horror carried out by the Trump administration — detaining U.S. citizens in ICE immigration raids, using the military to illegally strike boats in international waters, and refusing to fix health care for millions of Americans who will be sicker as a result. **The stakes of this moment demand a strong and organized grassroots movement. Which is why I'm asking you to step up today.** [**Will you chip in to power our grassroots movement into the next month of this fight?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120288846/585816209/-2122444374?refcode=2025-11-30-eom&recurring=&amount=12&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=82279e36-19ce-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MjI3OWUzNi0xOWNlLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TiyOnXxVQFx8A-6Iy4LowWCpGFa1DEvHabQEZ8I8s6I=) Over the last few months, we've proven what people power can achieve. We forced a vote to release the Epstein files — and after months of resistance, the Senate unanimously agreed, and Trump signed the bill. We pushed back against and rang the alarm bells about Trump's authoritarian overreach, exposed corruption, and stood up for those without a voice. None of these victories were guaranteed. They happened because people like you fueled this movement and refused to let the powerful operate above the law. Right now, Trump and his MAGA allies are doubling down on attacks on our rights and democratic institutions. Corporate giants are spending millions to silence workers and block climate progress. And Republicans are gearing up for more assaults on health care, voting rights, and basic freedoms. If we're going to keep pushing for a democracy that works for all of us, we need to stay strong. name: Wesley Bell
subject: Is it too cliche to say there's no "I" in "team"?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BELL FOR MISSOURI
body:
Peter,

I've been serving St. Louis in Congress for almost a year now, and every day I'm fighting like hell to stand up against Donald Trump and his allies in the House.

My work is far from done, _and neither is our fight to restore decency and common sense back to our government._ Soon, we'll be headed into a critical 2026 midterms, and for me, **this fight and this campaign have always been personal.**

My dad spent 25 years as a police officer and growing up, my family taught me I had a responsibility to make a difference when I could. In Congress, that means putting the needs of St. Louis ahead of my own. It means standing up when Republicans try to gut our healthcare, securing resources for families who need it, and pushing for investments in our community that will last for decades. But to keep this fight going, I need people like you to step up.

[**Can I count on you to chip in anything you can to help me finish this month strong and take back our Democratic House majority? The work starts now.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120289189/585817411/-1347839382?refcode=em25_251130_eom2_fndd_gq_act___WB_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_251130_eom2_fndd_gq_act___WB_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=e9f5719d-1ace-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYzODkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTlmNTcxOWQtMWFjZS1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=FnTsR5BNQyFQztDqB5k5pUPxza-VgebfqCclkc0it8E=)
