clean_body: Peter, I've been serving St. Louis in Congress for almost a year now, and every day I'm fighting like hell to stand up against Donald Trump and his allies in the House. My work is far from done, and neither is our fight to restore decency and common sense back to our government. Soon, we'll be headed into a critical 2026 midterms, and for me, this fight and this campaign have always been personal. My dad spent 25 years as a police officer and growing up, my family taught me I had a responsibility to make a difference when I could. In Congress, that means putting the needs of St. Louis ahead of my own. It means standing up when Republicans try to gut our healthcare, securing resources for families who need it, and pushing for investments in our community that will last for decades. But to keep this fight going, I need people like you to step up. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- Thanks for your support, Wesley = = PAID FOR BY BELL FOR MISSOURI PO Box 190669, ST LOUIS, MO 63119

clean_body: Help us unlock a REAL 600% MATCH... | Patriot, In just a few short days, my grassroots campaign to FIRE Kathy Hochul will be forced to close the books once and for all on our very FIRST month of fundraising. But this is no ordinary deadline... It’s a golden opportunity to deal the FINAL BLOW to the most vulnerable governor in America’s struggling reelection campaign! You see, the State of New York unlocks matching funds at a rate of 6-to-1 once a candidate hits the fundraising benchmarks written into state law. By CRUSHING this goal, we can take a massive step towards unlocking the LEGAL MAXIMUM amount of matching funds to FIRE Hochul from office. I can’t overstate how critical these matching funds are. Kathy Hochul’s whole campaign strategy revolves around massively outspending us on the airwaves with her and her Democrat allies’ multimillion-dollar ad buys. If we unlock these matching funds, we’ll have the resources we need to cut straight through her lying attacks and put our winning message in front of every New Yorker. With Hochul’s approval rating already at a RECORD LOW and the polls showing the governor’s race is already within the margin of error, that would be nothing short of catastrophic for the worst governor in America! Our path to victory has never been clearer, Patriot. But it all depends on unlocking these vital matching funds. Thank you, Elise Stefanik Paid for by Elise for Governor PO Box 500 Glens Falls, NY 12801

name: Gabby Giffords
subject: Never expected this
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-q42025.UDsFRy&refcode=em251130-1-b&t=1&akid=11069%2E3935704%2EHHWFB8)
**_Gun safety is a winning issue. Thanks to you.**_
**November 30: A note from Gabby Giffords to you.**
Please don’t click away from this message. Today is Sunday, November 30, and our monthly fundraising deadline expires in less than 18 hours. Unfortunately, we are falling short of our fundraising goal.
If you are tired of the endless bad headlines about gun violence — and you are ready to do something about it — please join the 2% of supporters who are pitching in to end the gun violence epidemic in America.
When I founded GIFFORDS more than a decade ago, many warned me that the gun lobby was too difficult to take on. Now, gun safety is a winning issue..._thanks to supporters like you._
GIFFORDS relies on the support of people like you to help us advance our cause in the courts and in state legislatures, and to get the message out widely when Republicans overstep.
So while you probably didn't wake up this morning and think you were going to make a donation to GIFFORDS, that's what I am asking you to do.
Any contribution goes a long way — especially before tonight’s deadline. Thank you.
Gabby Giffords

**Make a contribution to GIFFORDS PAC now.** The average gift this year is $21. Some people will give more — others less. The thing that matters most is that you are taking action to stop gun violence.

From affordability, to strengthening our public schools, to protecting the freedoms we cherish — there’s a lot of work ahead, and I’m ready to get started. But I can't do it alone.

clean_body: We have a real opportunity to shape what comes next for Virginia and for the country. = Peter, This month, we did something extraordinary together. We flipped Virginia's Governor's office by 15 points and showed the entire nation what's possible when we stay focused on people instead of partisanship. But winning this election was just step one — and right now, we have a real opportunity to shape what comes next for Virginia and for the country. From affordability, to strengthening our public schools, to protecting the freedoms we cherish — there’s a lot of work ahead, and I’m ready to get started. But I can't do it alone. That's why I'm asking you to become a Founding Donor and stand with me in this next chapter. = = = = = = = I’m so proud of what we achieved, and I’m even more hopeful about what we can accomplish for the Commonwealth. Thank you for standing with me, believing in our mission, and helping us write the next chapter in Virginia’s history books. With gratitude, Abigail Spanberger By submitting your phone number you're agreeing to receive periodic text messages from the Spanberger for Governor campaign. Message & data rates may apply. Text HELP for more info. Text STOP to stop receiving messages. . Paid for by Spanberger for Governor Spanberger for Governor P.O. Box 3121 Glen Allen, VA 23058 United States

name: Haley Stevens
subject: Behind the scenes at Team Haley HQ
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
New ads, new friends, same energy

| |
---|---|---
| | | Forwarded this email? [Subscribe here](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9oYWxleWZvcm1pLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.eol1967AWgKs7TRR7Z8OT9KUYrOgJaO0SjndT9TKWyI?) for more
---
# [Behind the scenes at Team Haley HQ](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=6380051&post_id=179957488&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc5OTU3NDg4LCJpYXQiOjE3NjQ1MjkzNTMsImV4cCI6MTc2NzEyMTM1MywiaXNzIjoicHViLTYzODAwNTEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.JeMZ3jUdpk8c6S9ybeJgvLsMC_2sOV4h1f93Z1B1Ktw)
### New ads, new friends, same energy
| | [Haley Stevens](https://substack.com/@haleyformi)
---
| Nov 30
---
| [](https://substack.com/@haleyformi)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9vcGVuLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9wdWIvaGFsZXlmb3JtaS9wL2JlaGluZC10aGUtc2NlbmVzLWF0LXRlYW0taGFsZXktaHE_.66jtFlhdt2moKkEFKFsKUNkcoBfiu4-s7F8WM3DeRA8?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/haleyformi/p/behind-the-scenes-at-team-haley-hq?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

Hi friends,
Haley here! Just wanted to share a little behind-the-scenes update from Team Haley HQ as we barrel toward the end of the month (seriously, how is Christmas less than a month away?!).
Lately, our days have been packed - _in the very best way._ We've been filming new ads to help introduce this campaign to voters across Michigan. They're turning out incredible, and I can't wait for you to see them.
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/e06948ff-e4d3-4e01-8781-3c9819480527?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
We've also been on the road nonstop, all across Michigan, talking with folks from every walk of life - union leaders, teachers, nurses, auto workers, retirees, and so many others. **And let me tell you: Michiganders are fired up and ready for change.**
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/7629c6cd-c414-4c18-a9bf-51c06c62936d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Every conversation reminds me why I raised my hand to run: because Michigan deserves a Senator who knows this state, loves this state, and will work her tail off for the people who call it home.
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/8f8bbc94-5894-4b0a-83f6-550561ef2449?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The energy on the ground is _incredible_. The momentum is _real_. But I want to be honest with you: November has been one of the _toughest_ fundraising months we've faced.
We're facing a tidal wave of outside spending from GOP megadonors and dark-money groups, and we're still behind on our $350,000 end-of-month goal. If we fall short, we'll have to scale back the very work that's helping us reach voters - and with Republican Mike Rogers and his billionaire backers ramping up, we simply can't afford that.
**So if you 're able, I'm asking: Will you chip in to help us close the gap and stay on track? Every dollar powers this grassroots campaign - and I promise we'll put it to work immediately.**
[Donate](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/779f5ca1-e8f7-4e0a-ba1c-551c96dfd1a1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Thanks for being on this journey with me. More soon.
With grit and gratitude,
Haley
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/2a36cf39-e86e-4342-a947-c7380e828914?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* * *

A personal note from Haley 👋

I'm a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. I've spent my career fighting for Michigan's working families - and now I'm running for the U.S. Senate to keep standing up for the people I love.

But here's the truth: Senate control could come down to Michigan. And Trump and his megadonors know it. That's why they're gearing up to spend tens of millions to defeat me and hand this seat to a MAGA Republican.

I need your help to fight back. This race will be one of the most competitive - and expensive - in the country, and I'm counting on grassroots support to win.

If you're with me, will you chip in today?
[Donate](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/85ba1533-772e-4841-8d08-2d790a366c23?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
###### Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate.

---

33717 Woodward Ave #539, Birmingham, MI 48009

body:
We are only days away from this potentially *glass ceiling shattering* special... | | |

---
Peter –

In the official ranking of states based on women in government, Tennessee ranks 46th out of 50 states. And at the federal level, Tennessee has 9 congressional representatives in Washington – only one is a woman.

Black women in TN are 3x more likely to die from pregnancy-related causes than white women. **TN ranks among the bottom in the nation for maternal health outcomes,** and women in TN are living under a near-total abortion ban with no exceptions for rape or incest.

That’s why we are doing everything we can to support one of Tennessee’s leading pro-choice CHAMPIONS in a special election that will give Democrats a rare but important opportunity to secure another seat in the U.S. Congress. Her name is **Aftyn Behn** – and if you haven’t heard of her by now, we’re thrilled to be the ones to bring her to your attention!

Last month, Aftyn won her crowded primary election – despite being the ONLY WOMAN on the ballot. Now, we are only days away from this potentially *glass ceiling shattering* special election **– on December 2nd – and her victory would be a major development for Democratic power in the U.S. House of Representatives.** (More on that below...)

[**Join Aftyn’s historic movement by rushing a split $20.25 contribution between Aftyn’s campaign and Her Bold Move immediately.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hbm-aftyn/?refcode=EM_F_251122Aftyn_CD_90DO_14_G_N_L1&amount=20.25)

**Why we’re feeling encouraged:** New data came out last week highlighting an unprecedented shift in this district’s likelihood to elect a Democrat in a historically solid Republican region. Early-vote data shows an **80% drop in Republican turnout,** while Democratic-leaning precincts across the district are dramatically overperforming expectations. Highly motivated Democrats and new or infrequent voters are being activated for this race (!!!!).

Aftyn is on the ballot against Matt Van Epps, a Trump-endorsed Republican who said he would “100% have the President’s back” if elected to Congress.

Additionally, he is adamantly anti-choice, stating that “every life is a gift from God,” and that he will stand “shoulder-to-shoulder” with Trump to fight against reproductive rights...

Before serving in the Tennessee state legislature, Aftyn organized with reproductive justice and healthcare access advocates across Tennessee and the South. She has worked closely with groups on the ground to expand access to healthcare, combat stigma, and defend reproductive freedom in some of the toughest turf in the country.

**This is important:** she told us that she has been able to accomplish more in her time as an elected lawmaker than she ever could have imagined as a rural organizer. **We NEED her voice and her tireless determination in government where it belongs.**

This seat is in a red district in Tennessee, but if anyone can win, it’s Aftyn. If you were looking for a chance to elect a phenomenal woman and flip a federal seat... **This is it. Your support could make all the difference.**

[**Aftyn’s Election Day is coming up FAST. Join Aftyn’s deeply needed movement in Tennessee by splitting $20.25 or more between Aftyn’s campaign and Her Bold Move RIGHT NOW.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hbm-aftyn/?refcode=EM_F_251122Aftyn_CD_90DO_14_G_N_L2&amount=20.25)

Together,

Colleen Davis

clean_body: We are only days away from this potentially glass ceiling shattering special... | | | | | = Peter – In the official ranking of states based on women in government, Tennessee ranks 46th out of 50 states. And at the federal level, Tennessee has 9 congressional representatives in Washington – only one is a woman. Black women in TN are 3x more likely to die from pregnancy-related causes than white women. TN ranks among the bottom in the nation for maternal health outcomes, and women in TN are living under a near-total abortion ban with no exceptions for rape or incest. That’s why we are doing everything we can to support one of Tennessee’s leading pro-choice CHAMPIONS in a special election that will give Democrats a rare but important opportunity to secure another seat in the U.S. Congress. Her name is Aftyn Behn – and if you haven’t heard of her by now, we’re thrilled to be the ones to bring her to your attention! Last month, Aftyn won her crowded primary election – despite being the ONLY WOMAN on the ballot. Now, we are only days away from this potentially glass ceiling shattering special election – on December 2nd – and her victory would be a major development for Democratic power in the U.S. House of Representatives. (More on that below...) = Surrounded by men voting on the topic of abortion access in the Tennessee Capitol, Rep. Aftyn Behn, D-Nashville, looks to Rep. Jason Zachary, R-Knoxville, while he defends SB 1971, making it a crime for a person to help a minor travel outside of Tennessee to access abortion care, during a House session on Tuesday, April 23rd, 2024. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and automatically split between Her Bold Move and Aftyn Behn: | | = | | = | = | | = | = | | = Why we’re feeling encouraged: New data came out last week highlighting an unprecedented shift in this district’s likelihood to elect a Democrat in a historically solid Republican region. Early-vote data shows an 80% drop in Republican turnout, while Democratic-leaning precincts across the district are dramatically overperforming expectations. Highly motivated Democrats and new or infrequent voters are being activated for this race (!!!!). Aftyn is on the ballot against Matt Van Epps, a Trump-endorsed Republican who said he would “100% have the President’s back” if elected to Congress. Additionally, he is adamantly anti-choice, stating that “every life is a gift from God,” and that he will stand “shoulder-to-shoulder” with Trump to fight against reproductive rights... Before serving in the Tennessee state legislature, Aftyn organized with reproductive justice and healthcare access advocates across Tennessee and the South. She has worked closely with groups on the ground to expand access to healthcare, combat stigma, and defend reproductive freedom in some of the toughest turf in the country. This is important: she told us that she has been able to accomplish more in her time as an elected lawmaker than she ever could have imagined as a rural organizer. We NEED her voice and her tireless determination in government where it belongs. This seat is in a red district in Tennessee, but if anyone can win, it’s Aftyn. If you were looking for a chance to elect a phenomenal woman and flip a federal seat... This is it. Your support could make all the difference. name: All On The Line
subject: If you care about democracy, this is your fight
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
Fighting for our values starts with fairness in our democracy
|
---

_Our midnight fundraising deadline is our last chance of the month to show just how strong this movement for fair maps and fair representation is. But after unprecedented attacks on our democracy this year, we’ve got our work cut out for us.[**Rush a donation right away to help hold the line and show you’re all in to fight for the democracy we deserve.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120290643/585821567/2092430633?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_EOMFight_email_20251130-AOTL-Tier1-EOMFight_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20251130-AOTL-Tier1-EOMFight_&utm_campaign=EOMFight&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJkNjg4NGNlLTFlY2UtZjAxMS04MTk1LTAwMGQzYTFkNThhYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ajc4O-IMYmONDBvyQTdgBcm3jFEYXXdCyXxJTujokZo=)_
---
Peter,
Looking ahead towards our end-of-month fundraising deadline, one thing is clear: The fight for fair representation belongs to all of us.
Maybe you care about expanding health care for the most vulnerable among us. **The fight for fair maps is your fight.**
Perhaps you’re passionate about eliminating child poverty and ensuring every family can put food on their table. **Then the fight for fair maps is your fight. **
Or you could be someone who believes everyone should be able to marry the person they love, regardless of gender identity or sexual orientation. **The fight for fair maps is your fight, too.**
Gerrymandering takes power away from the people. It creates safe seats where some radical politicians never truly have to face their voters. Worse, in these skewed districts, candidates are rewarded for taking extreme positions.

**Put simply, without fair representation, our system gets more extreme, more divided, and less accountable to the people.**
**That’s why All On The Line is building the biggest, broadest coalition possible of people who care deeply about our democracy and are ready to fight for their values. From organizing grassroots supporters to sounding the alarm about power grabs in Texas and beyond — our work has never been more urgent or more vital. **

clean_body: Fighting for our values starts with fairness in our democracy | Our midnight fundraising deadline is our last chance of the month to show just how strong this movement for fair maps and fair representation is. But after unprecedented attacks on our democracy this year, we’ve got our work cut out for us.= Peter, Looking ahead towards our end-of-month fundraising deadline, one thing is clear: The fight for fair representation belongs to all of us. Maybe you care about expanding health care for the most vulnerable among us. The fight for fair maps is your fight. Perhaps you’re passionate about eliminating child poverty and ensuring every family can put food on their table. Then the fight for fair maps is your fight. Or you could be someone who believes everyone should be able to marry the person they love, regardless of gender identity or sexual orientation. The fight for fair maps is your fight, too. Gerrymandering takes power away from the people. It creates safe seats where some radical politicians never truly have to face their voters. Worse, in these skewed districts, candidates are rewarded for taking extreme positions. Put simply, without fair representation, our system gets more extreme, more divided, and less accountable to the people. That’s why All On The Line is building the biggest, broadest coalition possible of people who care deeply about our democracy and are ready to fight for their values. From organizing grassroots supporters to sounding the alarm about power grabs in Texas and beyond — our work has never been more urgent or more vital. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Make no mistake: If we don’t ultimately defeat attempts to suppress the will of voters, we won’t be able to fight for the issues that matter to us at all. Reproductive rights. Humane immigration policy. Getting money out of politics. Affordable, accessible health care. Fair representation might not always feel as urgent or obvious as these issues. But without it, our democracy gets weaker. That’s why we fight day in, day out for fair maps that are a cornerstone of a healthy democracy. = Thanks for your support in this critical moment for our work. — All On The Line is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. Support our work to end gerrymandering. Text FAIR to 88228 to receive recurring updates from AOTL by automated text message. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. name: AOC
subject: Personal to me.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
Did you know that over half of all Members of Congress are millionaires? Meanwhile, the median household income is only $70,784. 👈🏽 **This is wild.**
Many of our lawmakers have no lived experience of working paycheck to paycheck or trying to pay rent working a low-wage job.
To me, policy is personal. When I worked as a bartender, I relied on tips to pay the bills. I know the urgent and daily stresses of working class people because I have lived them. And I intimately understand how important measures like raising the minimum wage, universal health care, universal child care, and free college can be for families living in financial uncertainty.
That’s why I’m in Congress: **to represent working families like mine.**
I am honored to be here, and I can’t do this work without you — the grassroots supporters who have had my back every step of the way. I can’t self-fund my campaign by writing a big check, and I don’t do any donor call-time or exclusive fundraising events.
[We rely completely on small-dollar donors, so if you are able, can you chip in $5 today to our campaign for progress?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20251130.ABUpgc&refcode=em20251130-10296-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=10296%2E2526796%2EzUJl-v)
[**](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20251130.ABUpgc&refcode=em20251130-10296-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=10296%2E2526796%2EzUJl-v)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20251130.ABUpgc&refcode=em20251130-10296-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=10296%2E2526796%2EzUJl-v)**
Yours in service,
Alexandria

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20251130?refcode=em20251130-10296-P_FND_EGR_GRM&t=22&refcode2=10296_2526796_zUJl-v&akid=10296%2E2526796%2EzUJl-v)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20251130-10296-P_FND_EGR_GRM&t=23&akid=10296%2E2526796%2EzUJl-v)**

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

name: Voter Action Project Team
subject: They want a complete dismantling of the Voting Rights Act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
@ariberman.bsky.social: SCOTUS decision killing what’s left of Voting Rights Act could cost Dems 19 House seats, eliminate every majority-minority district in South, eviscerate 14th/15th Amendments & fulfill John Roberts 40-year crusade against country’s most important civil rights law [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=113025_2&amount=25]
The impact shows how partisan this all is, Team. A complete dismantling of the Voting Rights Act -- a key civil rights law -- would only harm one political party and return parts of the country to a suppressive era we left behind sixty years ago.
During the oral arguments in Louisiana v. Callais , at least five conservative justices seemed ready to handicap the VRA so that it will no longer stop white majorities from locking racial minorities out of elected office through racial gerrymandering.
The consequences are simple to understand and grave for voter participation. The harder we make it to vote, the more politicians make voter participation feel worthless, the less people actually take part. Needless to say, the less people who participate, the less our democracy and our government looks like the people it's supposed to represent.
Team: We have to spread the word about this case and the consequences of dismantling the Voting Rights Act. Step up with $25 or whatever you can today and help us defend the right to vote >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=113025_2&amount=25]
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=113025_2&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=113025_2&amount=25]
GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=113025_2&amount=50] GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=113025_2&amount=100]
GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=113025_2&amount=250] Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=113025_2&amount=35]
At issue in the case is Section 2 of the VRA, which requires that racial minorities have an equal opportunity to meaningfully participate in the electoral process. This provision has been used to strike down districting schemes and maps that prevented Black voters and other racial minorities from electing their preferred representatives. Since 1965, Section 2 has given people of color a seat at the table, from school boards to the halls of Congress. It appears this 60-year era is coming to an end.
We've said it before and will say it again, but it's been clear long before the MAGA movement that Chief Justice Roberts has seen the removal of the VRA as one of his top goals for his time on the Court. It appears he may be on the cusp of succeeding.
Striking down the last remnants of the Voting Rights Act is exactly why the Supreme Court held this case over from last year. Gutting Section 2 would take us backwards in time and allow racial gerrymandering to be a standard practice, silencing more voters. Just like the redistricting fights across the country, this is all about whether the party in power can choose their voters in order to stay in power in perpetuity.
We simply can't afford to go backwards like this. Will you chip in with $25 or more to help us fight back against these partisan efforts to silence voters? >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=113025_2&amount=25]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=113025_2&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=113025_2&amount=20]
Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax-deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code.
A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003.
Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www.voteractionproject.org, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
Integrity First Voter Action Project
P.O. Box 19294
Portland, OR 97280
United States
This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails are a crucial way to keep supporters up to date on the latest attacks on voting rights and our efforts to expand ballot access for all Americans. If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.everyaction.com/p/FQb7Rbo110qLPmSvMAn63Q2?unsubscribedata=YYbzOAGsK2Gs8lKbSRDop8brcYOMPJGL0UtyoUW3Bq3Pwl6lHg63IMLiEXeMnC1%2FO9jtJgd6CqCWNNPIECZFJ%2B33fr%2BYpAU7UrIZX56oBiDvNkEpWOC9cnYWCk5%2FR%2FXdZIFRglfuwfWsfIYToG0U%2FrM2DSXlumLRipUIt3V8KxJJ6TQ9a9KDloSou5czT8zhJ7u8zC6hl1V4Urww53KiVueAuUag%2B3lwNIW4wi6DeAAL%2B8yJsc3cvVOU719%2FwaPIR9zVMCS3O31wNPaFun%2Fe1ulq8HFiZaVxGg6hZ%2BE9%2Fdu%2BH5oRpzAyRxE9h2E8VI07kNdNFizjrbFssNfaj%2FcnsPZXk8rKuCDI8iBN3AJkXXCbw5K9yWeTsklhzL2IBOapc4WaeMOOMZCxo%2BUqYKut%2B58NK%2Bw1sM7ckSxkilTMV5k%3D .

name: Jason Crow
subject: Not one to back down from a fight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress
body:
Jason Crow For Colorado [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88523/images/Screenshot%202025-08-21%20at%2010.50.41%E2%80%AFAM.png]
I know you're busy, folks, so I’ll get right to the point.

You know that I’m not one to back down from a fight.

It was that way when I served in the military, and now as a member of Congress.

And in the face of nonstop attacks from Donald Trump, I’ve never had more resolve to fight to defend the country I love.

Trump is weaponizing the FBI to intimidate and harass members of Congress, including me.

But their attacks won’t discourage me. I’m fighting every day in Congress to hold the Trump administration accountable, and I’m not giving up. As a former Army Ranger, it’s just not in my nature.

Some of the most important fights of our lives are happening right now. For our democracy, for our Constitution, and for the rule of law. I won’t sit on the sidelines because now is a time to lead.

Will you join me by making a donation before tonight’s November fundraising deadline? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-nov25]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

DONATE $10 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-nov25?amount=10&express_lane=true]

Jason

Peter,
---
This just hit my desk...
---
...And I’ll come right out and say it: _we’ve got a five-alarm fire on our hands._
---

While Washington remains gridlocked, Dr. Raul Ruiz is committed to serving and helping constituents with the problems they have with the federal government and cutting red tape. If you’d like to unsubscribe, click here. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/dAfRehWDrkq5GdVTndjWgA2?unsubscribedata=0et28ZgPX3rjDLOm3tDG7PrmqeDciCFJ%2BuxDTcreTvdOBYs2w1LH4jPCisJF7lYwCmvizC2va6sS%2Bn%2FogXxYF0JCu0L%2FfFuD%2FiZhQHuo3jczzytY9jHv3s4%2BJ0K61z4jOTPUy5Ha6mtHwg1%2FVVgGZ4Vb4oWKEAZULsAJYOfcWV4Oroa1lhdE9voMWwMZvxWNux8aoZzod9IrmKsNqIsI3vFXVoxV6hOfY1Zf4yeY8EKDy2Me80SHAguTkRdkotvGyFPOvjKsMYn6YAqVW0SEFLIZAEkiBhLpZWfF265SDO7gJKD6EU60W2CIluM%2BcY26I%2B%2FMCbM%2B%2F09o7gMk9tGEHmhNhereHatWRoFUEf4wQUL2lEi9r%2Bh7Fg6A0NPeElv0a%2BOqxnCc1jKnXy8NNtkhkpQNrjEufpE%2FKaCGSC8omTWBqq6OIKTjgLfo%2BThn56V6]

# [#]
Hi, it’s Raul,

We’re falling behind on our November goal at the worst possible time.

CA-25 is at risk of going red in 2026, and the NRCC are getting ready to launch a full-blown attack. They've already started spreading lies about me, and the attacks will only intensify from here on out.

We must defend CA-25 from NRCC attacks, but to do it we need to act fast.

After this month's elections, we saw that the GOP base is fracturing. We can’t waste this opportunity to fight back and keep CA-25 blue.

If you're ready to donate, chip in at this link now:

[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruiz-em-fr-nov25?amount=10&source=SBD_RR_EM_FR_113025_EOM3_D1_S3]

Thank you,

Raul Ruiz
https://www.facebook.com/DrRaulRuiz/ [https://www.facebook.com/DrRaulRuiz/] https://www.instagram.com/doctorraulruiz [https://www.instagram.com/doctorraulruiz] https://twitter.com/Dr_RaulRuiz [https://twitter.com/Dr_RaulRuiz]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruiz-em-fr-footer [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruiz-em-fr-footer]
The son of hardworking farmworkers, Dr. Ruiz grew up in Coachella, CA and learned at an early age that the key to attaining the American Dream is hard work and a great education. In the summer of 1990, Raul walked in the desert heat from business to business in the Coachella Valley asking them to invest in their community by contributing to his education. With each investment for college, he made a promise to come back home and serve his community as a physician. In 2012, he decided to take his service to the community to the next level by running for Congress. Dr. Ruiz needs our help to continue fighting for us in Congress.

Friend, THIS IS NOT A DRILL. Reporting just revealed that Trump’s election security team is being run by **Heather Honey, a far-right activist who pushed bogus fraud claims in 2020** and helped draft the blueprint for how to challenge and reverse legitimate results. Now she’s inside the Department of Homeland Security. According to internal communications, Honey told a group of right-wing activists that the president could declare a “national emergency” to effectively take control of local election administration. **Let’s be clear: Trump and his MAGA allies want to take control of our elections on a bogus emergency declaration so Republicans can hold on to power.** That’s why Democratic Secretaries of State are so critical. They are our last line of defense of our democracy at the state level. Elected, independent officials who can certify legitimate results, protect access to the ballot, and reject coordinated disinformation. But they cannot do it alone. name: Heidi Hall
subject: We can't have more of the same
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HEIDI HALL FOR CONGRESS
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251130_em_fr_b1_HH_big [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251130_em_fr_b1_HH_big]
Friend, it's Heidi Hall here.
Tomorrow, we'll enter the month of December and face the last quarterly deadline of the year and the first deadline since Prop 50 passed.
Our opponents, you know, the ones who got in a back room and came up with a plan to switch districts and try to push me out of this race, are going to be stepping up their fundraising efforts so that their public reports can show that they have the resources to win.
But, Friend, money from billionaires doesn't mean what they think it does. It doesn't mean that they're the best candidate for our district— it means the opposite.
Hundreds of thousands of dollars from billionaires means that these are the men that the DC establishment trusts to protect their interests and ensure that nothing fundamentally changes.
We can't have more of the same. We need change. We need Medicare for All, we need to help working-class families, and we need to take action on our climate.
Friend, will you help me fight for real change by donating what you can to help us raise the $2,409 we need to reach our fundraising goal and prepare for a tough December? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251130_em_fr_b1_HH_big]
DONATE TODAY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251130_em_fr_b1_HH_big]
Thank you so much,
Heidi Hall
Heidi Hall has spent her three-decade public service career working with others to solve problems, protect our land and water, improve health, and build opportunities for others, all while raising two boys primarily as a single mom.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251130_em_fr_b1_HH_big [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251130_em_fr_b1_HH_big]
Raised by parents who had persisted to make a middle-class life for their kids in Contra Costa County while lifting up others, Heidi was taught to push through and overcome challenges rather than complain about them. She learned to stick up for the vulnerable, to respect working people, and to value equal opportunity and justice.
After graduating from Pomona College and earning graduate degrees from Columbia and Rutgers, Heidi went to work for the Rockefeller Foundation promoting reproductive care and then began her career at the Environmental Protection Agency, stopping the dumping of toxic waste and holding corporate polluters accountable.
Today, Heidi chairs the Nevada County Board of Supervisors, where she’s taken on homelessness, expanded broadband access, and worked to reduce crime and illegal cannabis growth. Heidi flipped her seat from red to blue – and now she’s ready to do it again in Congress to take on toxic politics in Washington and put people first.
Prefer to donate via mail? Address a check to:
Heidi Hall for Congress
PO Box 729
Grass Valley, CA 95945
SUPPORT HEIDI [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251130_em_fr_b1_HH_big]
PAID FOR BY HEIDI HALL FOR CONGRESS

Heidi Hall for Congress
PO Box 729
Grass Valley, CA 95945
United States

If you would like to get fewer emails, If you would like to unsubscribe, WE TOLD YOU: The Supreme Court’s 2010 Citizens United decision opened the doors for BILLIONS of dollars in Dark Money to flood our elections→ WE TOLD YOU: Our democracy is currently being bought and sold by Billionaire Donors (like Elon Musk in 2024!) →→ AND WE TOLD YOU: Top Democrats like Amy Klobuchar, Elizabeth Warren and Raphael Warnock are saying enough is enough →→→ These brave Democrats are calling for a Constitutional Amendment that would OVERTURN Citizens United and rid our elections of Dark Money! But they can’t do it alone. []() | | | | | | | Look team, we CAN’T afford to miss this deadline. The fate of our democracy is quite literally on the line. If we fail now, Billionaire Donors will keep using Citizens United to FLOOD every election with Dark Money, ensuring their candidates win every race. It’s not fair, and it’s not democratic. | | | | | | We wouldn’t ask if it wasn’t important. Fight for Reform | This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com | | Paid political advertisement paid for and provided by End Citizens United Nonfederal, P.O. Box 66005, Washington, D.C. 20035. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Your contribution to FFR will be used in connection with FFR’s matching funds program to match the contributions of other contributors. Contributions to End Citizens United Non-Federal are not tax deductible. Contributions to End Citizens United Non-federal will be used in End Citizens United Non-federal’s sole discretion and are not being earmarked for use in any particular state or election.

I’ll get right to the point, Peter —
My team sets finance metrics that we have to hit each month to keep our campaign on track. **Our goal is to raise $825,000 online in November, and with just five days left, we’re not where we need to be.**
**[Is there any amount you can donate right now to get us on track to meet this goal?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120292063/585826186/1573338254?refcode=ea.56c33ad0-24ce-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ms=ea.56c33ad0-24ce-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NmMzM2FkMC0yNGNlLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5tfiPdTEz0Pevub9BBK-wMYklq8EF0LamZRMx5APoj8=)**
Now, I know that fundraising isn’t what’s going to be the only thing that will win this campaign, Peter.
The real success comes from connecting with people and sharing our vision for this nation — a vision that can get us back on track.
But your support now is what will let us make those critical connections here in North Carolina. You see, we’re facing unified GOP efforts to defeat us — they’re already spending heavily against me, and experts expect that this race could become the first Senate election to ever cost a billion dollars or more.
That’s why the earlier your support comes in, the more of a difference you can make. A donation right here, right now — _today_ — will go further than at any other point from here on out. Our team can plan our expenses more effectively with more time, putting your donation to the best use.

name: Troy Downing
subject: I have President Trump’s complete and total endorsement. Now I’m counting on yours.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress

I’m counting on your endorsement to continue our America First mission. Please read.

### Just before a holiday tragically celebrating the indigenous genocide across North America, a Native American tribe in California got back a piece of their land
| | [Shahid Buttar](https://substack.com/@shahidbuttar)
---
| Nov 30

| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/shahidbuttar/p/the-best-news-youll-read-all-weekend?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

When I moved to the mountains in 2022, I found myself excited by many things, including a summer job guiding kayak tours on Lake Tahoe. My tours emphasize ecology and history, and wanting to offer more depth for my guests led me to explore a local history by which I've been continually fascinated.
At our company's annual post-season dinner, I recently learned that my colleagues named me our "most knowledgeable" and "most inspiring" tour guide. As I told them in the speech they demanded, "If America had learned anything from the devastation it wrought in this particular place, your futures would suck a lot less."
_Thanks for reading Chronicles of a Dying Empire! You can help inform --and inspire--your friends by sharing this post._
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=180341189&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTgwMzQxMTg5LCJpYXQiOjE3NjQ1MzI1NjAsImV4cCI6MTc2NzEyNDU2MCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.vuJH7IPZmat24lx6x4dqqekNPdsFCCWpcIoerykdbqQ)
### **Original people**
The first human settlements in the area where I now live were those of the [Washoe people](https://substack.com/redirect/4ec9859a-c6ff-46ce-802e-554ab6ef1644?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), whose ancestral lands overlapped those of their sister tribe to the north, the [Paiute](https://substack.com/redirect/a7374f00-f963-40e9-8427-3a6ba82c7741?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). The Paiute range across Nevada and into Utah, while the Washoe have a smaller range straddling what is now the border between Nevada and California.
The Washoe were historically a nomadic people, migrating frequently in order to maximize their access to seasonally available food resources. In the winter time, they lived in the valleys in western Nevada, where lower elevation and higher temperatures allowed more abundant resources than the Sierra Nevada (literally, "snowy mountains" in Spanish) to the west. They usually trekked into the mountains surrounding Lake Tahoe during the summer, when food is more plentiful.
Evidence of Washoe settlement is apparent around the entire Lake Tahoe basin: there are [indentations in rocks](https://substack.com/redirect/4c9565b7-86da-43f5-b3fc-13fab086b0d3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)--reflecting sites where pine nuts and acorns were ground into flour--at the tops of every mountain peak, and even on rocks across the lake itself.
These indigenous communities peacefully coexisted with the land for thousands of years until Lake Tahoe's "discovery" by settler-colonists in 1844.
_Chronicles of a Dying Empire is a publication made possible by readers. To receive new posts,**sign up for a free subscription!** Paid subscribers help support my work and make it available for 21,000 readers to learn for free._
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..lIqTfuCc8HAtYGtBD5bDGUlRWh9UTvuaGael2wl0HQk?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=180341189)
### **Stolen land**
Within a single generation, whatever passes for western civilization wreaked havoc on the landscape. Coinciding with the onset of industrialization, the exploration of the lake Tahoe region started off slowly for a few years, until the discovery of Gold at Sutter's Mill in January 1848 sparked a global mass migration that escalated dramatically within a year.
This is the era that [established](https://substack.com/redirect/867d8cab-70eb-491e-93a3-4617b7211110?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) San Francisco. It grew from a Spanish Mission settlement with under 1,000 people in 1847 to, within a year of the gold strike, 25,000 by 1849. Long before the city became a hub for technology, LGBTQ culture, and a tragically [ignorant](https://substack.com/redirect/bcf0a069-6fab-43a7-92c1-9a2b607923ec?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) version of [white supremacy](https://substack.com/redirect/64dd627c-2e7c-417d-affb-9a41eccd19a2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that [continues](https://substack.com/redirect/8b1202d3-3985-456e-a19a-40f08b9931f7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to infect it today, it was a mining colony, a destination for sea-borne prospectors whose ultimate destination was the mountains to the east.
The first phase of the Gold Rush sparked the indigenous [genocide](https://substack.com/redirect/7a000779-45b6-451c-9f65-10080e3767ea?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that besieged California long after the massacres on the East Coast ironically celebrated this weekend. As I frequently remind guests on my kayak tours, the genocide in the east was relatively more brutal--but despite the contemporary "progressive" reputation enjoyed by California, its [crimes](https://substack.com/redirect/162c24d7-4c0d-4eba-93e2-e389aadacbeb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) against humanity were far more recent.
The ecocide started ten years after the Gold Rush, with the discovery of silver in 1859 on the other side of the Washoe's ancestral range, in what would soon become Nevada. I'll save the history for how Tahoe's natural resources helped liberate a race of enslaved Americans for another post, but would note for now that--in one of the first examples of industrial resource extraction ever on Earth--100 million trees were [mowed to the ground](https://substack.com/redirect/72a28dc0-6920-46de-8454-d927143fdd38?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) within a generation of the lake's discovery by white settlers moving west.
The resulting genocide and ecocide could have offered warnings for a civilization insightful enough to learn its lessons. Alas, we are not part of one.
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=180341189&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTgwMzQxMTg5LCJpYXQiOjE3NjQ1MzI1NjAsImV4cCI6MTc2NzEyNDU2MCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.vuJH7IPZmat24lx6x4dqqekNPdsFCCWpcIoerykdbqQ)
Enabled by the ignorance of the impacts of that era, industrial civilization went on to wreck not only local ecosystems, but also the entire biosphere. We today live in the [shadow](https://substack.com/redirect/509ba723-b71a-447f-b185-9685ec08fb85?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) of a future [poisoned](https://substack.com/redirect/97e4f983-87a7-49c7-998b-7b77145c376c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) by accelerating climate catastrophes.
It did not have to be this way.
If a younger America had been willing to respect indigenous rights, all of our futures today would be immeasurably brighter.
### **Land back**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/f9eb23cb-5e31-4220-a8be-b91078b21bb6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
_Part of the over 10,000 acres reclaimed by the Washoe people. Photo credit: Elizabeth Carmel, courtesy of the W ašiw-šiw Land Trust_
In this context, it is especially important for indigenous communities to receive their land back--not only for them, but for all of us and the future we share.
A week to the day before America [perversely celebrated](https://open.substack.com/pub/siouxchef/p/the-convenient-fallacy-of-thanksgiving?r=97w99&utm_medium=ios) the indigenous genocide, California's Wildlife Conservation Board approved a $5.5 million grant to help the Wašiw-šiw Land Trust purchase over 10,250 acres roughly 50 miles north of Lake Tahoe, near Loyalton, California.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/aebcaa78-370d-4969-8ab2-4749a378f344?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Source: Wašiw-šiw Land Trust, [https://wasiw-siwlandtrust.org/news/55m-grant-from-wildlife-conservation-board-supports-historic-return-of-10000-acres-in-the-sierra-nevada-to-the-washoe-people](https://substack.com/redirect/20fb1502-27c7-42be-aa33-f95b21c61f18?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Washoe Tribe Chairman Serrell Smokey celebrated the tribe's recovery of parts of its land, [saying](https://substack.com/redirect/20fb1502-27c7-42be-aa33-f95b21c61f18?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), "The reclamation of these Washoe homelands is of great importance. Wa*šiw people were once forcefully removed from these lands. This plays a huge part in the trauma our people go through. Now the land is calling the Washoe people home and we are answering that call."
With the assistance of the grant announced 10 days ago, the Wašiw-šiw Land Trust plans to acquire land with a diverse array of natural features. The tribe's press release announcing the grant explained that it straddles two mountain ranges:
> rising from sagebrush scrub and grasslands to conifer forests, aspen groves and mountain meadows. It includes pinyon pines, juniper woodlands, rocky crags, springs and perennial creeks. Pronghorn, mule deer, mountain lion and gray wolf range through the property, moving from winter habitat in the east to summer habitat in the west. The land also supports plants of cultural importance to the Washoe, including pinyon pine, a food source that has been devastated by recent wildfires throughout the Washoe homelands.
### Better for all of us
Not only do land back agreements to the important work of expanding indigenous sovereignty, they also offer the possibility of better land management techniques being revived after centuries of dispossession.
For example, indigenous communities [historically](https://substack.com/redirect/1eaefc1c-56dc-4582-bad3-9966f645b7de?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) managed wild forests, in contrast to the hands-off approach [favored](https://substack.com/redirect/6b2bb694-77a4-4fd1-9fe4-d3bf8b0ef1f9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) by the federal government over the past several decades. That discredited approach allowed fuel loads to relentlessly accumulate, contributing to the [catastrophic wildfires](https://substack.com/redirect/9b8a6572-a3b3-42dd-b2ac-de295eafffe5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that have recently devastated the west--and the air quality in cities on the [east coast](https://substack.com/redirect/cec79245-f265-4e15-8826-94a47cf97283?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), or even as far away as [Europe](https://substack.com/redirect/3c225be0-1546-4e2d-9026-d148cd5f18b8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
Chairman Smokey [noted](https://substack.com/redirect/20fb1502-27c7-42be-aa33-f95b21c61f18?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that "Getting the Washoe people back onto the land is healing for the people and for the land. The Wa*šiw have managed these lands for thousands of years. Now we can bring those management practices back."
Many indigenous communities also demonstrated more insightful approaches to [gender](https://substack.com/redirect/302e6657-e6c7-40d5-afc4-0d17f11db53d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) than the colonists whose patriarchal systems have done so much to suppress human rights in the decades since their dispossession. Men and women enjoyed roughly [equal rights](https://substack.com/redirect/4f6f5530-3931-40aa-8b07-9381ffa0761f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and people who today would be considered LGBTQ enjoyed respect and acceptance.
Allowing indigenous communities to recover their land offers a better future for all of us, not just communities struggling for recognition after years of relentless state violence.
For their own sake, and for the sake of the rest of us, I'm most grateful this year for the Washoe's recovery of part of their land. One hopes the trend might continue until [all our relations](https://substack.com/redirect/89ab5782-6cd0-4536-a59a-7077257eef08?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) are allowed once again to live [at home in peace](https://substack.com/redirect/7a000779-45b6-451c-9f65-10080e3767ea?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..lIqTfuCc8HAtYGtBD5bDGUlRWh9UTvuaGael2wl0HQk?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=180341189)
You're currently a free subscriber to [Chronicles of a Dying Empire](https://substack.com/redirect/8bf71fc9-886a-490d-a3a2-1907e8aea86d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). For the full experience, [upgrade your subscription.](https://substack..lIqTfuCc8HAtYGtBD5bDGUlRWh9UTvuaGael2wl0HQk?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=postcta)

At our company's annual post-season dinner, I recently learned that my colleagues named me our "most knowledgeable" and "most inspiring" tour guide. As I told them in the speech they demanded, "If America had learned anything from the devastation it wrought in this particular place, your futures would suck a lot less." The Paiute range across Nevada and into Utah, while the Washoe have a smaller range straddling what is now the border between Nevada and California. The Washoe were historically a nomadic people, migrating frequently in order to maximize their access to seasonally available food resources. In the winter time, they lived in the valleys in western Nevada, where lower elevation and higher temperatures allowed more abundant resources than the Sierra Nevada (literally, "snowy mountains" in Spanish) to the west. They usually trekked into the mountains surrounding Lake Tahoe during the summer, when food is more plentiful. Hopefully, this is the shortest email you'll ever read. |

Fellow American - Just 19 words.

Our November deadline is hours away. **[Will you help before it's too late?](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=b868b392938d4762862397792141f8a7&_e=ZCJqfsJO4R01DvW35-3mUxu4yqcGs0HwIb-tD3hvfpJxl6hkjPCO7ZYE9rDbbxr0bBJAq1wxTTE8uPXXaak4zIzO03jhLjda6KKKFT04s1ypiOM37HUAG6Xqv8lG4TRbY9uOqEnuGV1NTxXPHc787iVC5JhnIS9Y9yQIB6fgOLSOMWVwHhWBK839AvoPIPmAKTc3LBQ9lUqgLmUfBIrggR-_kdTRy7CXas3V4DxS7HvXG6w-H5nK6TGKGgH5aPfgcDoomIzd7odkZEJ78-DYnukK87Xh7690DQ0a7qTDaZZV_mxL7wEMgk6D1oy9o8FuHpbLXqlnYWdVJCvznac-ocdBMcbIhTyP8qltEvpptOmOcyH_ZwzpWPML6os-BtOPImxK4SkQZNkUG7AgP5tGa-DEgqZyOsgOEHiwT768lF3VH1pbwGkp4Xj6tgHEy8_jaNKihQUfLndn3HZY4JPMkq1GZPOXWqQcIw3GyG4O2OyvE4vYUbR16QJ_Sm4SNJyJ9E_nUKwjIBaw5DztPbqXwtI8lHmj7d2WJGG4ezjaJkVrrE3Qbd0Zhw-AmiyfcLTO9M5XJkwltR96TU3aRG5mrMZJ0bBwGmiKYnknFfT1W72uwCjeeYY8PTuaU0Gcdf2miiXb1UMwsD1xr3Nh5x_NA5nwwPGZ9MQ4by5jblpIL-z5EFVADIwg7L5-wDzM8eAOqQAB9SizML2gpf4unnWxvZ-mP64lVLFSrXhxw2AI4SoNE6gamvdtXLxA3-sM-MADIISXQZpRmBBVJhZhXYihxA%3D%3D)**

body:

| | | | | [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jrMd0UP6XajarJwhjesNNoc42eM9GqdhsrMjWYDcv2CR6aV0xUPkXYh4KQQ8DafZAYVn71EoYHodRcjqDCR9iMKwEWdwpkoSeIXxTldYNZPi0DkEjf5Ghaamx4dRosuA2-uU-oKKA-KrM_GIFftIemtvlCjDYVxqCT-M5ecRtpdcoACASWmCAsVfJyF5v7AuQGdHRnfPMzBHcaHPVXvgGp9QkO05JN4I&c=pHWo7K-sA4eyGGtzPSOuy3g231rtiGM8VFSvXEbNm1_NLaGXfEDu6A==&ch=ZDN3eY_QN25ZVR9V_0Ym8N6mrDmDlixqeZ4Yy0LU0klAc3HKhXEchQ==)

Peter,
I'll give it to you straight: We are staring down a critical end of month deadline.
We need to hit our goal of $10,000 raised before midnight tonight to stay on track--and we are $3,040 short with only a few hours to go.
Unlike Boebert, we don't have corporate lobbyists or MAGA billionaires waiting to write us blank checks. We just have each other.
Ending November strong is absolutely crucial, because as soon as the Christmas lights go up, contributions go down.
I know budgets are tight. People are worried about gifts and heating bills, not political donations. But to defeat Lauren Boebert, we have to rely on folks like you pitching in.
It's also essential we protect our massive advantage. Last fundraising quarter, we outraised Boebert five-fold.
That money didn't come from DC insiders; it came from supporters like you. It shows that while Boebert's support is collapsing, we are surging. But if we slow down now, we let the establishment buy her way back in.
[So I am asking you directly: Will you chip in $50, $25, or whatever you can afford before midnight tonight to help us reach our crucial November goal and keep our fundraising advantage over Boebert?](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jrMd0UP6XajarJwhjesNNoc42eM9GqdhsrMjWYDcv2CR6aV0xUPkXYh4KQQ8DafZHZLURZzpeyjBIBViOaYeaPIuoFG1IMBoifDcqlJ2N_mCr_Iq0vPNXU5BZLsE6Pa_KlgZfM14ZIwQvP5zfv02aaV_a4QDhhq0kXH9c9ZsiyfqjnOjcG-VNPchnvS61ScrehMyga_bOQaDyIFJU0zx2X3HmqN22JvgFN6y_fqqfGs=&c=pHWo7K-sA4eyGGtzPSOuy3g231rtiGM8VFSvXEbNm1_NLaGXfEDu6A==&ch=ZDN3eY_QN25ZVR9V_0Ym8N6mrDmDlixqeZ4Yy0LU0klAc3HKhXEchQ==)

clean_body: = Did you see this message from Shontel, Peter? Republicans have been putting in the work to attack our democracy, damage our economy, raise prices of everything from healthcare to groceries, and more. They must be stopped – and the best way to fight back is by securing a Democratic majority in the House. Republicans are scared they’ll lose. That’s why they have been working to pass extreme gerrymandered maps in red states across the nation – which means we are going to need all hands on deck to overcome these obstacles and win during next year’s midterms. = Together, Team Shontel Brown \---------- Forwarded message --------- Hi Peter, This holiday season has been a clear reminder of how far Republicans have gone to make life more difficult for the American people. From cutting food assistance and blocking SNAP benefits from being paid out during our government’s longest-ever shutdown to refusing to come to the table to ensure that healthcare premiums don’t skyrocket next year, Republicans have shown their true colors again and again. To add insult to injury, the cost of groceries and holiday gifts is record high due to Trump’s tariffs. name: George Conway
subject: what a bunch of corrupt morons!!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action
body:
But Annie can’t do this alone, she needs all of us having her back.
| | | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T094963db-fc3b-438e-bc91-bcc1a27d720a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T01fbb0de-51b7-4387-a597-9a03ffa3ba3a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Recently, I got to hang out with my favorite pediatrician and candidate for Senate, Annie Andrews. We talked about all she’s doing in South Carolina to put spineless Lindsey Graham’s feet to the fire to finally kick him to the curb next year, and how she OUTRAISED him this past quarter, showing the momentum her campaign has. And frankly, Peter, it’s momentum I know we all witnessed last month at the No Kings Rallies across the country. The No Kings initiative is important because we have to stand up for our rights, for our democracy, and against authoritarianism. [If you agree, I’m hoping I can count on your support to split a donation between Annie’s campaign and Blue Amp Action right now. >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T503fa6a2-78c2-4328-a6f9-ddb6713eb5d1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [DONATE](https://default.salsalabs.org/T313d7425-e588-4fda-83aa-d24d4f4ad722/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| "No Kings was a 'hate America rally.'” That kind of language truly pisses me off — because it couldn’t be further from the truth. These are people who love this country. We love America, and this country stands for things that Donald Trump wants to take away from us: the right to free speech, the right to vote, and the right to basically have a government that's not run by a bunch of corrupt morons. That’s why we came together, and that’s why we have to elect Annie to the Senate. She’s running against one of those corrupt morons, and I’m more than ready to see his reign end. But Annie can’t do this alone, she needs all of us having her back. [So I’m asking you directly: Will you split a donation of $10, $25, or whatever you can today to join me in this fight and help Annie Andrews and Blue Amp Action send spineless Lindsey Graham packing once and for all? >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te9a8cb70-bdb3-4649-9215-009f62f19069/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade, it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in a democracy, not a dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Taaf46a78-53ab-45e2-b302-510ee1cf9b16/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

body:
DEADLINE

| | | [](https://trk.email.tedcruz._vbA)
---
| | Fellow Conservative, I'm going to be straight with you: **we 're at a critical point, and we cannot afford to fall short.** My team has reached out to you over the past few days to let you know about our urgent deadline. This year the Thanksgiving slump is significant- and I am reaching out today to make sure you know what is on the line. The holidays are here. But Democrat are still on the march... ...and America is still in jeopardy. So our mission can't take a break -- and the challenges we're facing won't pause just because it's the end of the year. I'll be working the phones along with my team to help with a final push before year-end. Every donation counts. Every minute you spend helping matters. If we don't hit our end-of-month goal, we lose momentum that we've worked so hard to build. Please, if you can, take a minute to make a gift today:
---
[ **Donate Now** ](https://trk.email.tedcruz._I6A)
---
We can't do this without you, Fellow Conservative . This fight is personal, and your support is what makes it possible. Thank you for standing with me -- truly thankful for all you do, For Liberty, Ted Cruz **PS -** If you haven't donated yet, I am asking you to step up right now. Any donation amount counts. And please share this email with likeminded friends and family if you can. Thank you! [**Please use this link >>**](https://trk.email.tedcruz.)

name: Sen. Heidi Campbell
subject: We’re Close to Our Goal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Campbell for State Senate, Lee Jones, treasurer
body:
https://voteheidicampbell.com/ [https://voteheidicampbell.com/]
Peter,
I just got an email from my fundraising team, and they’re excited to let me know we are very close to hitting our November fundraising goal! We are only $1,066 short, and we have until midnight to get there.
Once the legislature goes into session in January, I won’t be able to raise money again until we adjourn in the spring. Would you be willing to help us finish November strong with a contribution of $10, $25, or $50? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/heidiemail2025?refcode=noveom]
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/heidiemail2025?refcode=noveom]
As we get closer to the beginning of the 2026 legislative session, I’m already getting worried about what far-right agenda the GOP has planned. Your contribution puts me in a good position to be able to fight back. Thank you for your support.
Best,
Heidi Campbell
State Senator
Senator Heidi Campbell is a Tennessee State Senator, representing District 20. She is championing change for Tennessee and won't rest until we see gun safety reform, corporate accountability, and a safe and prosperous community where everyone can thrive.

name: Trisha Calvarese
subject: When Christmas lights go up...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trisha 4 Colorado
body:
While Boebert’s support is collapsing, we are surging. But if we slow down now, we let the establishment buy her way back in.
| | | | | [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013Q7_AoqHWH288lYc4niUJMXX-MWqyrfYH8VYGusH5A_lew1e8LVvA5JgBOXbjMDYJm1ORyiNNfcliTXJLKGmTyuIxnCvUZfMKUbimJD2DkmWO5d0AjAETU9ExDqZHUIpUlyDn7Ue404mVHHFriWZ_vlybtTQwlCNNaGoajDJ_DYO4YHP80b21j-Byzdqxk8dR6zjULWthOhYOnPLWUrMhPYV_C5atIVi&c=yzQY5uoqry_BQccUABVRzu6Zgh7yLndChUORdubPVq20xxS5Nobv4g==&ch=Y9Ci8_0T25ma7l-2DTVS2QZTq7n7iiyp1VeEKc4TkrlqsB_5Hbs4Og==)
---
|

Peter,
I'll give it to you straight: We are staring down a critical end of month deadline.
We need to hit our goal of $10,000 raised before midnight tonight to stay on track--and we are $3,040 short with only a few hours to go.
Unlike Boebert, we don't have corporate lobbyists or MAGA billionaires waiting to write us blank checks. We just have each other.
Ending November strong is absolutely crucial, because as soon as the Christmas lights go up, contributions go down.
I know budgets are tight. People are worried about gifts and heating bills, not political donations. But to defeat Lauren Boebert, we have to rely on folks like you pitching in.
It's also essential we protect our massive advantage. Last fundraising quarter, we outraised Boebert five-fold.
That money didn't come from DC insiders; it came from supporters like you. It shows that while Boebert's support is collapsing, we are surging. But if we slow down now, we let the establishment buy her way back in.
[So I am asking you directly: Will you chip in $50, $25, or whatever you can afford before midnight tonight to help us reach our crucial November goal and keep our fundraising advantage over Boebert?](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013Q7_AoqHWH288lYc4niUJMXX-MWqyrfYH8VYGusH5A_lew1e8LVvA5JgBOXbjMDYvEEreH2Erlyt7OthXbjbHBIMw2_I5QZgHiliH2BNrMacLN4mV-X8y0wWQ-S8Sq6WnZ2gE7UNBSQtHpWMXudy6JbpqxPudXx1rvpKflIIMazFnU0uV4759mD8lSvJsCYl4Pi4rTH24-hleS8cvrmG6NiEIBnbOgUGnFXAQNUMWxw=&c=yzQY5uoqry_BQccUABVRzu6Zgh7yLndChUORdubPVq20xxS5Nobv4g==&ch=Y9Ci8_0T25ma7l-2DTVS2QZTq7n7iiyp1VeEKc4TkrlqsB_5Hbs4Og==)

| | Peter, One takeaway that I've been consistently seeing in the aftermath of the election losses on November 4th is that the media - left, right, and center- think we (The GOP) are rudderless; that we don't stand for anything and don't have a plan to govern. I sent you a survey immediately after our election night losses to help me better understand how we can retain your vote and support in Congress, but I didn't hear back. **_I 'm resending the survey because it's of extreme importance not only to me, but also to the future success of our conservative movement. _** I really need you to fill it out without skipping over any questions. _**_Can you do this as a personal favor to me?

clean_body: After our royal shellacking on November 4th, I sent out an email with a survey attached, but only a few opened it, much less filled it out. After our royal shellacking on November 4th, I sent out an email with a survey attached, but only a few opened it, much less filled it out. | | | | | Peter, One takeaway that I've been consistently seeing in the aftermath of the election losses on November 4th is that the media - left, right, and center- think we (The GOP) are rudderless; that we don't stand for anything and don't have a plan to govern. I sent you a survey immediately after our election night losses to help me better understand how we can retain your vote and support in Congress, but I didn't hear back. I 'm resending the survey because it's of extreme importance not only to me, but also to the future success of our conservative movement. I really need you to fill it out without skipping over any questions. Can you do this as a personal favor to me? With Gratitude,Ted Cruz | | | Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate | | PO Box 25400 Houston, TX 77265 | | | id: 2025-03-20-13:09:49:516t |

name: Katie Porter
subject: A billionaire, a Fox News host, and me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
Peter,
Last week, another billionaire opponent entered the race for California Governor.
I want to talk a little bit about what this is going to mean for us, but first, will you chip in $5 to show everyone watching this race that our campaign is as strong as ever? **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20251130_2_ak?personal=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21694?c0=em_ms_kp_20251130_2_ak.PyjU5e&refcode=em20251130-40504&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=40504%2E3422442%2E9UP9By)**
We already have seen polls that show Republican Steve Hilton, a former Fox News host, leading in this race. And with our new billionaire opponent already dropping $2 million on TV ads, we can expect this race to get even more competitive.
In terms of how I’m spending my time, I’m going to continue what I’ve been doing since we launched our campaign, which is getting into every part and pocket of California and meeting people where they are. To represent a big state like California, I can’t wait to hear people’s stories and bring communities together to work on solutions for our biggest challenges.
But on the money side, the reality is that winning elections here is expensive, and outside groups are going to be making decisions very soon about whether to flood money into this race.
For a campaign like ours that rejects money from corporations, lobbyists, and Big Bank CEOs, this is a make or break moment.
**We don’t have the money to buy this election.** We’re counting on grassroots supporters like you to help us show everyone that our campaign is strong and not going anywhere.
If you’ve been on the fence about whether to give to our campaign, I’m telling you now: your donation today can really make an outsized difference. So please, will you chip in $5 or whatever you can spare?
Here’s a personalized link where you can chip in:
**[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20251130_2_ak?personal=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20251130_2_ak.TUbPcL&refcode=em20251130-40504&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=40504%2E3422442%2E9UP9By)**
Thanks,
Katie

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4g-emails?source=40504&t=3&akid=40504%2E3422442%2E9UP9By)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4g-em-update-info-footer?source=40504)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4g-unsubscribe?source=40504&t=4&akid=40504%2E3422442%2E9UP9By)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Governor 2026
PO Box 5176, Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)
Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
FFPC #1479597

name: Mark Kelly
subject: I will not give up on our country
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
It has given me too much, and I’ll never be able to repay that debt. I still believe in our democracy, our values, and our Constitution.
#

Peter,
This has been quite a week for our country.
If you can believe it, things didn’t stop when Trump called for my hanging. It didn’t stop with the threat of a court-martial from Pete Hegseth, either. Because now, the FBI has asked to question me and other members of Congress.
All for saying things the president didn’t like to hear.
If you’re feeling like this isn’t the country you grew up in, I don’t blame you. But I hope you aren’t giving up on it, Peter.
I certainly haven’t. This country has given me too much, and I’ll never be able to repay that debt. I still believe in our democracy, our values, and our Constitution.
There’s no chance in hell that somebody like Donald Trump is going to stop me from serving the people of this nation. None.
If he thought all of this was going to shut me up, he’s got another thing coming.
And if you’d be willing to help support me as we gear up to fight back against the attacks coming our way from Donald Trump and his Administration, please:
[**Split a donation between Ruben Gallego and me. It would mean a lot to me.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-mek-em-mar25.qIyu4X&refcode=em251130-1-160&t=1&akid=4041%2E734936%2EWJpJab)

name: Justice Democrats
subject: The billionaires aren’t done. Neither are we.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

The corporate elite want you to sit back and let them run Congress. But we
don’t play by their rules. We fight to win. And today is your last chance
this month to make that fight even stronger.

Midnight tonight marks our [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20251130.DeatBf&refcode=em20251130-37239&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1002&akid=37239%2E1203867%2EcZOtvf ]end-of-month fundraising deadline. Every
dollar you give fuels our movement to take on billionaires, back
candidates who actually serve their communities, and build a progressive
bloc in Congress that won’t be bought.

This isn’t just about money—it’s about power. The power of people who
refuse to bow to corporate interests and demand a government that works
for everyone, not the 1%.

We’ve seen what people power can do. Leaders who refuse checks from
corporate PACs, grassroots campaigns that defy the odds, victories that
send a message loud and clear: we are here, and we are not backing down.
But the fight isn’t over. Every minute, every donor, every action counts.
We need you now.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20251130.DeatBf&refcode=em20251130-37239&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1003&akid=37239%2E1203867%2EcZOtvf ]Chip in $5 before midnight tonight. Help us finish this
month strong, fight the corporate elite, endorse more champions for the
people, and keep building the Congress we deserve.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats
