name: Roy Cooper
subject: I’m asking for your help. I can’t do this without you.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
Your support keeps me going.
#
My opponent has been gaining on me in the polls. Far-right actors are attacking me online. National GOP groups are pouring money into NC to defeat me and our people-first campaign.
_This is all weighing on my mind, Peter._
I know we have a tough race ahead of us — the most competitive of my career. The coming months won’t be easy.
**But here’s what keeps me going:** We’ve earned financial support from tens of thousands of folks across the country. More than 90% of donors are giving $100 or less. Even more are sharing news of our campaign online.
Together, we’re building the momentum we need to win the most competitive U.S. Senate race in the nation. I’m deeply grateful to everyone who has joined us so far.
**[I’m asking for you to join our fight by splitting a contribution between our campaign and State Democrats Committee today. Would just $5 fit in your budget right away?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98358?refcode=em20251130-9777&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9777%2E614464%2ELfP4iM)**
**[DONATE](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98358?refcode=em20251130-9777&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9777%2E614464%2ELfP4iM)**
I appreciate your strong support.
Roy Cooper

body:
can I count on you to chip in before midnight tonight?

|
---

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120294055/585832116/-1739126990?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_EOM5_251130_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNGRiMWE4Ni0yYWNlLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g3ZMf7HI8b5RU3oVMQubPOFwzSfk6b1t2HwFd1JubQE=) Derek,

I just got off the phone with my team, and the truth is that we're over 500 donations short of our end-of-month fundraising goal.

[_**This is our last chance to close the gap before tonight’s deadline, so I have to ask, can you make a donation before midnight?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120294057/585832117/-1739126990?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_EOM5_251130_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNGRiMWE4Ni0yYWNlLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g3ZMf7HI8b5RU3oVMQubPOFwzSfk6b1t2HwFd1JubQE=)

I know I've been in your inbox a lot this month. But with just a month left before the critical midterm election year, we simply cannot afford to fall short of our goal.

Next year, this Senate seat will be one of the most closely watched races in the country. Republicans know that taking back this seat could lock in their Senate majority for years to come, and they're already preparing to spend whatever it takes to defeat me.

I’m talking about billionaires pouring their unlimited money into super PACs, with their sights trained directly on _this Senate seat._

We need to be ready. And that means hitting our fundraising targets now, so we have the resources to fight back when the time comes.

[_**Derek, will you make your first $20 contribution before midnight to help us close this gap and protect this seat for Democrats?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120294058/585832119/-1739126990?amount=20&refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_EOM5_251130_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNGRiMWE4Ni0yYWNlLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g3ZMf7HI8b5RU3oVMQubPOFwzSfk6b1t2HwFd1JubQE=)

Thank you again,

Mark Warner **Before you go:**

Republicans will spend whatever it takes to hold onto power, no matter how unpopular their agenda is with voters.

**And they know that there’s no Senate majority for Democrats without Virginia.**

[_**Will you consider a contribution today as an early investment in the campaign infrastructure we're building to reelect Mark Warner and flip control of Congress? Your donation today will have a much bigger impact than a donation of the same amount made right before the midterm elections.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120294060/585832120/-1739126990?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_EOM5_251130_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNGRiMWE4Ni0yYWNlLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g3ZMf7HI8b5RU3oVMQubPOFwzSfk6b1t2HwFd1JubQE=)**__********[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120294061/585832121/-1739126990?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_EOM5_251130_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNGRiMWE4Ni0yYWNlLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g3ZMf7HI8b5RU3oVMQubPOFwzSfk6b1t2HwFd1JubQE=)**********

subject: In all honesty
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120294723/585832901/-272948131?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20251130_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNmU0MmE4Ni0yYmNlLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FNiuVrCWHrd_77QyRpnBG-HN90B7QCEye8nGa8o3fSk=&emci=65251f80-2bce-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=a6e42a86-2bce-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=252045)

Wow, team, November went by fast. We saw a lot go down this month, and then we got to talk about it with our family members over Thanksgiving. All of that to say: **I’m sure you’re tired.** In all honesty, I am too. But I had to reach out one final time this month. Our end-of-month deadline expires at midnight tonight. We only need 30 more donors to step up to reach our goal. [**Can I count on you to be one of them?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120294725/585832903/944546612?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20251130_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNmU0MmE4Ni0yYmNlLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FNiuVrCWHrd_77QyRpnBG-HN90B7QCEye8nGa8o3fSk=) Link: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120294727/585832905/944546612?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20251130_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNmU0MmE4Ni0yYmNlLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FNiuVrCWHrd_77QyRpnBG-HN90B7QCEye8nGa8o3fSk=)** Thank you for sticking with me. More to come, Martin

clean_body: Wow, team, November went by fast. We saw a lot go down this month, and then we got to talk about it with our family members over Thanksgiving. All of that to say: I’m sure you’re tired. In all honesty, I am too. But I had to reach out one final time this month. Our end-of-month deadline expires at midnight tonight. We only need 30 more donors to step up to reach our goal. = Link: = Thank you for sticking with me. More to come, Martin | Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate Senator Martin Heinrich is committed to helping New Mexico become a leader in defense, tech, and energy with opportunities in every corner. clean_body: Following up on behalf of the Congressman| | | Friend, Did you see this from Congressman Hurd yesterday? Following up on his behalf. We had a finance team call this morning, and the good news is—we’ve made progress. But we still need to raise $3,200 TODAY to hit our goal. | | | | Every donation will add up to cut the deficit and get Team Hurd over the top. No matter the size, your support makes a real difference in this final push. THANKS SO MUCH!!! CarolineTeam Hurd | | \---------- Forwarded message ---------From: Jeff Hurd Date: Sat, Nov 29, 2025 at 10:28 AM | | I’m sorry to be reaching out just after Thanksgiving, but I’m facing an important deadline tomorrow. $6,087 That’s what I need to raise by 11:59PM tomorrow Sunday, November 30th With the holidays, fundraising has been slower and it’s been harder for us to hit our goals. If you’re able to contribute today, it will take a huge weight off my team and me. I understand this is a big ask, especially when every dollar counts toward groceries and bills. | | | | Thank you sincerely for your support, | | Jeff Hurd | | | | | ---|---|--- | | Paid for by Jeff Hurd For Congress Copyright © 2025 Jeff Hurd For Congress Our mailing address is: Jeff Hurd For Congress 2695 Patterson Rd, Suite 2-287 Grand Junction, CO 81506 If you would like to donate online, please visit our website . Be sure to follow the campaign on , , , and . You can also reach us at mailto:info@jeffhurdforcolorado.com.

subject: We’d hit $100k if…
body:
Immigrant youth around the country are counting on this community to keep fighting. | | | Hey Peter, We know the holiday season is busy, but this won’t take long. clean_body: Immigrant youth around the country are counting on this community to keep fighting. | | | Hey Peter, We know the holiday season is busy, but this won’t take long. Folks are enjoying time with family instead of checking their email inbox (as they should!), but we wanted to give you a quick update on our End-of-Year campaign. Just take a look at what we’ve raised so far — if everyone reading this email , we’d breeze past our goal. Looking at our progress, if everyone reading this email donated $4 right now, not only would we hit our target, we would also be able to create a stretch goal to expand our programs and trainings in 2026. Immigrant youth around the country are counting on this community to keep fighting. Will you join us? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | The respective merchants of record for transactions to United We Dream Network are ActBlue Charities Inc. They receive and process those donations and subsequently give them to the organization or cause indicated on the contribution form within 30 days. This donation is tax-deductible. Thank you, Ximena, United We Dream | Follow us on: | | | | |

name: Mark Kelly
subject: I will not give up on our country
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
body:
It has given me too much, and I’ll never be able to repay that debt. I still believe in our democracy, our values, and our Constitution.
Folks,
This has been quite a week for our country.
If you can believe it, things didn’t stop when Trump called for my hanging. It didn’t stop with the threat of a court-martial from Pete Hegseth, either. Because now, the FBI has asked to question me and other members of Congress.
All for saying things the president didn’t like to hear.
If you’re feeling like this isn’t the country you grew up in, I don’t blame you. But I hope you aren’t giving up on it, folks.
I certainly haven’t. This country has given me too much, and I’ll never be able to repay that debt. I still believe in our democracy, our values, and our Constitution.
There’s no chance in hell that somebody like Donald Trump is going to stop me from serving the people of this nation. None.
If he thought all of this was going to shut me up, he’s got another thing coming.
And if you’d be willing to help support me as we gear up to fight back against the attacks coming our way from Donald Trump and his Administration, please:
**[Split a donation between Chris Pappas and me. It would mean a lot.](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251130_2_kelly.5s_pqP&refcode=em20251130-2&t=1&akid=3716%2E582294%2EOhTasK)**

Thank you,
Mark

**New Hampshire is poised to be one of the closest Senate races in the country in 2026. Will you chip in today to help Chris stop the Republicans from flipping the Granite State red and expanding their Senate majority?**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_footer?refcode=em20251130-2&t=22&refcode2=3716_582294_OhTasK&akid=3716%2E582294%2EOhTasK)**

Peter, The elections earlier this month delivered powerful victories for Georgia that we're still celebrating here at DPG. Here in Georgia, we broke Republicans' unanimous control of the Public Service Commission by electing Democrats to the PSC for the first time in two decades. And across the country, voters showed up to reject extremism and elect leaders who put people ahead of corporate interests or an allegiance to Donald Trump. These victories proved something important: our work here can lead to wins in the hardest of races, but it also proved the incredible strength of supporters like you. None of this progress would be possible without your determination to save our democracy and move Georgia — and our country — forward. We're taking this momentum straight into the critical 2026 elections, Peter. The road ahead will be tough, but we've proven this team can take on any challenge. [Together we will defend our Senate seat and play our part in ending MAGA chaos in 2026. clean_body: Our winning strategy is working. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | = Peter, The elections earlier this month delivered powerful victories for Georgia that we're still celebrating here at DPG. Here in Georgia, we broke Republicans' unanimous control of the Public Service Commission by electing Democrats to the PSC for the first time in two decades. And across the country, voters showed up to reject extremism and elect leaders who put people ahead of corporate interests or an allegiance to Donald Trump. These victories proved something important: our work here can lead to wins in the hardest of races, but it also proved the incredible strength of supporters like you. None of this progress would be possible without your determination to save our democracy and move Georgia — and our country — forward. We're taking this momentum straight into the critical 2026 elections, Peter. The road ahead will be tough, but we've proven this team can take on any challenge. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = | = | = | = In this fight together, Charlie Bailey Chair, Democratic Party of Georgia | = Help Elect Georgia Democrats. name: Don Jr.
subject: A special thank you for you,Patriot
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
My father and I couldn’t do this without patriots like you. Open this note of gratitude. |
Fellow American, it's Don Jr. I wanted to take a moment to **express my heartfelt gratitude** for **your unwavering support**. My father and I know that this fight **isn't possible without patriots like you** who are willing to stand up for what's right.

We're honored to have you on our team, **Fellow American.**

**[As a small token of our appreciation, I'd like to share a special message with you. name: Hope
subject: On the warning track
body:
Here is a bit of campaign *inside baseball* for you.
| | | | | [](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001bCxVLCeQCYWrDf2fvXKxr5nHh4wcgWNAUSRAqlGc1b_1miPDn8hvWEfPDyjgT0sRnpvWMmPbeUSLJrHYeC74oGWA0VhD1NEbIrqvTd_If2orw55H4CvSiVuGDyYn5QYNIBEA_UL34AIuNCW5HcZh6CbUQvQFJ0cF7RXemzH7vsgXvKLubpVfjBEYs-ozcFHqBI7ihNim6cv6ClQpJpGdfP8xecMHTrwc&c=2rg0XzSYMuO-XKZdkS__gA6h0I_PCTOqkJ0RhpjhOQAPrwJhFHYFzw==&ch=Tb2ipw7TEZM-fzLoQ9xS793BqI6abgHBU07vm0bkBnlvC471-J0x1g==)
---
|
Peter,
I'll keep this short because the clock is ticking.
Bushra started November on fire. But we have a bit of campaign *inside baseball* for you: The single biggest driver of fundraising is "Call Time"--the candidate personally picking up the phone to ask for support.
Between a packed schedule of forums, interviews, and meet-and-greets, Bushra actually lost her voice for a full week.
That meant zero call time. And in this game, if the candidate can't speak, the campaign falls behind.
We are entering the final hours of the month, and that week of silence has left us with a gap to close. We are exactly $2,115 short of our November goal, and the deadline is midnight tonight.
[We need to make up for lost time (and lost voice) right now. clean_body: Here is a bit of campaign inside baseball for you. | | | | | == | Peter, I'll keep this short because the clock is ticking. Bushra started November on fire. But we have a bit of campaign inside baseball for you: The single biggest driver of fundraising is "Call Time"--the candidate personally picking up the phone to ask for support. Between a packed schedule of forums, interviews, and meet-and-greets, Bushra actually lost her voice for a full week. That meant zero call time. And in this game, if the candidate can't speak, the campaign falls behind. We are entering the final hours of the month, and that week of silence has left us with a gap to close. We are exactly $2,115 short of our November goal, and the deadline is midnight tonight. == | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | == | Let's bring it home. subject: read this before midnight

body:

| | |
---
Derek, is there anything I can say to convince you to chip in $5 before my end-of-month fundraising deadline at midnight?
What if I told you I'm in D.C. right now trying to stop Trump and his crew from breaking Social Security – but the most powerful tool we have against them is flipping their seats from 🔴 to 🔵?
What if I told you that Trump just pushed a plan last month that would've meant the biggest Social Security cut in history – costing _hundreds of thousands_ of people their benefits?
**What if I told you that we're still 23% short of our goal with just hours left?**
If folks like you step up right now, we can still reach our critical $50,000 goal by midnight and build the resources we need to stop these devastating cuts before it's too late.
**[So, what do you say, Derek? Will you pitch in $5 to help us give extremist Republicans the🥾 and save Social Security?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/52370?t=2&akid=10451%2E434096%2EeecS2_)**

name: Hillary Clinton
subject: Democracy does not defend itself.
body:
When women lead, democracy is stronger, families are safer, and our country is fairer. |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120300175/585838489/-1510725204?sourceid=1057396&refcode=WUEFEK79_20251130_ClintonSurrogateRS_PL&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTM0ZDk4ZS0yZmNlLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JPsW8ATmp0ua_Y7LJvP8yRGgO5F_nEo13J3y1rmAIS4=) Hi Peter, it's Hillary Clinton.

I've spent my life fighting alongside women who refuse to sit down or be silenced. And I can tell you this with absolute certainty: When women lead, democracy is stronger, families are safer, and our country is fairer.

**That's why EMILYs List matters more today than ever.**

EMILYs List has spent 40 years building a pipeline of Democratic pro-choice women ready to govern — and the impact of their work is real. In 2025, Democratic women delivered major victories that prove voters still believe in defending our fundamental freedoms, decency, and competence in leadership. These wins give us momentum heading into 2026, but only if we keep pushing.

Right now, EMILYs List is working to close a critical end-of-month fundraising gap. They need to raise $20,000 today to stay on track — and they can't do it without us.

If the past few years have taught us anything, it's that democracy does not defend itself. We defend it — with our voices, our votes, our organizing, and yes, with our resources.

The opponents we're up against are organized, well-funded, and determined to roll back the clock on fundamental freedoms like women's rights and voting rights. They are counting on us to be tired, divided, or distracted.

We cannot give them that victory.

If you believe in a future where every woman controls her own body, where every vote counts, and where our democracy survives this moment — then I need you with us today.

clean_body: When women lead, democracy is stronger, families are safer, and our country is fairer. | = Hi Peter, it's Hillary Clinton. I've spent my life fighting alongside women who refuse to sit down or be silenced. And I can tell you this with absolute certainty: When women lead, democracy is stronger, families are safer, and our country is fairer. That's why EMILYs List matters more today than ever. EMILYs List has spent 40 years building a pipeline of Democratic pro-choice women ready to govern — and the impact of their work is real. In 2025, Democratic women delivered major victories that prove voters still believe in defending our fundamental freedoms, decency, and competence in leadership. These wins give us momentum heading into 2026, but only if we keep pushing. Right now, EMILYs List is working to close a critical end-of-month fundraising gap. They need to raise $20,000 today to stay on track — and they can't do it without us. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = If the past few years have taught us anything, it's that democracy does not defend itself. We defend it — with our voices, our votes, our organizing, and yes, with our resources. The opponents we're up against are organized, well-funded, and determined to roll back the clock on fundamental freedoms like women's rights and voting rights. They are counting on us to be tired, divided, or distracted. We cannot give them that victory. If you believe in a future where every woman controls her own body, where every vote counts, and where our democracy survives this moment — then I need you with us today. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Onward! | | Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him.
---

It’s not about rockets, EVs, or social platforms.

Instead, the footage showcases a breakthrough that may impact global manufacturing—and drive major economic change.

Executives describe this development as a turning point.

Regulators are reviewing. Investors are paying close attention.

Industry teams are working quickly to address the implications.

[See what’s generating so much conversation—and learn why everyone’s talking about it.](https://links.main.yourcapitalminds.com/u/click?_t=affa6bfca09a497f86454ba803e6a9a2&_m=bd3151b3fa324e18ad86bcf0206300cc&_e=ds-2UynYBH9nAanSTaQB24dHUeBJgv9uJkuL0hJ6aMiEbBVnx4t3ptA3eTfcVAymxYncWDxz9noD5d08HcEwRV_k_kVJ1wXedw--1NCtLRizalQqtcqDHgSa2LvFLBSAD2mQWHDvo2c43QvMmLrhvhJM_R4K1f5a8RxRr7uRCC_H6aBh0dK5u-HBg1S2TTyQxRBN2szj-qyjCAgkGOnXJdGY1o9rNFQqMG7d3zFyhPn1tKRFcDwqBvMqdeU7YPQnxZyQxAKQIiIbjsk6i7QPYU03r57Q0lsGFe8305TmtnLW_nHbyu1-LGkujKsz1qxjx6Us1DfdUZAoVtfy3OV2pC7LaYN9wRqSF3rBPjb9JZ2oWxcpfgxdNsjFvdEB-rkVxS1pzGXKlk8vJa2wA9VkF-M30kB0woibj-Ks6G4lhw1dZCpSe1our5huFFBrWKk8Op3XmU5homFWvr-xVyb11oPCV5LjcP28zOsBfzSC6IC9DpY3pZ-o27IyyPKAeUGJ0PRLOFTo4aoV2N06V1CZPDohXfN9COSI0NPq6liatqhFkdyWC9KrwWtmpk9-tdMPcnQtkfQUuj6oVrptEXoP_g%3D%3D)
Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675*, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671.

The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him. name: Janelle Bynum
subject: sorry to email on a Sunday
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Janelle Bynum for Congress
body:
Hi, I’m sorry to be emailing you on a Sunday, but I promise I’ll keep this brief. **Our end-of-month deadline is TONIGHT, and my team just let me know that we’re still $1,387 short of our goal.** We’re officially less than a year out from the midterm elections, so hitting this goal is vital to ensuring we have the resources to win one of the most important House races in the country next year. With National Republicans already targeting this seat, I’m counting on your support to help me fight back against their attacks and ensure Oregonians know about my work fighting to bring down costs, protect healthcare, and build a brighter future for the next generation. So if you can, will you make a donation before midnight to help close the gap on our goal and help my team gather the resources needed to defend this seat? **Here’s the best link to give: **[_**secure.actblue.com/donate/bynum-email**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120301185/585840758/1565084121?refcode=email_113025_sunday&amounts=5,25,50,75,100,250,500&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjk0YTNjZTctMzJjZS1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=3etW7TRNgZ-fqZmu8ScXK4AJ-Luh1FATgeCDHjb6f0U=) Thanks, Janelle

name: Nellie Pou
subject: Checking in
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nellie Pou for Congress
body:
Hi friend,
I truly dislike reaching out during the holidays, but this goal is important. Winning this district is not a guarantee. We have to earn every single victory, with every conversation, every door knock, every show of commitment. That’s why we saw huge swings in this month’s election.
People deserve to know we are fighting for them. They deserve to see that we care about what keeps them up at night. If we continue showing up, if we continue proving that their voices matter, we can win this election.
If you are able to help us meet our end-of-month goal, I would be so grateful. Please chip in $10 or any amount you can afford today.

Hey team,

I hope you had a relaxing holiday! I’m sorry to reach out on the last day of the holiday weekend, but we’re so close to hitting our November end of month goal that I figured I should ask one more time.

As you know, local and county races aren’t always glamorous and don’t receive a lot of attention. But that doesn’t make them any less important. Local elections determine what your child studies in school and what books they can read. Local elections determine if you’ll have a Trump loyalist who just wants to do his bidding as your representative on the County Board.

Local elections matter, even if they don’t get attention.

It also means that we have to do a lot more voter education and mobilization with often a LOT fewer resources.

[**Your $5 or $25 to IDCCA goes a lot further than you know. It helps pay for our Vote By Mail program and volunteer recruitment. That’s why I’m asking you to make a contribution to IDCCA. Would you donate now to support Democrats throughout Illinois?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120301346/585841518/-1616192732?amount=25&refcode=IDCCA_EMAIL_301125_FR_EOM-2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU1NzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzViOGMwYzItMzNjZS1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=j47kV2hY7pDByX4Qa5VKtZ_35elwM8DknZIZAUduFIQ=)

subject: I need to level with you
body:

Holiday weekends always slow things down, but we don’t have the luxury of waiting. National GOP donors and special interest groups have already started spending big to defeat Marie, and they’re betting we can’t keep up.

body:
MAGA is furious that Governor Newsom’s lines put me in a district they’ve long treated as their turf
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120301728/585842081/938567526?refcode=header&noskip=true&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYWU2ZGZmMi0zNGNlLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L5YNyHvBwoP5sJu8XsAlx8ZZc92EUkolr60pU8PyFC8=)
I’ll get straight to it: _Our race is going to be one of the toughest in the country in 2026._
The MAGA right is furious that Governor Newsom’s new lines would put me — one of the most progressive members of Congress — in a district they’ve long treated as their turf. And they’re already mobilizing to flip it back.
But I’m _**not**_ backing down. I’m _**not**_ watering down my values. And I’m _**not**_ giving them this seat without a hell of a fight.
**[To stay competitive, I set a goal of raising $5,000 before the end of November — and we still need supporters to step up.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120301729/585842082/789508428?refcode=251130_RG_eom&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYWU2ZGZmMi0zNGNlLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L5YNyHvBwoP5sJu8XsAlx8ZZc92EUkolr60pU8PyFC8=)**

[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120301731/585842084/-309737922?refcode=251130_RG_eom&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYWU2ZGZmMi0zNGNlLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L5YNyHvBwoP5sJu8XsAlx8ZZc92EUkolr60pU8PyFC8=)
Grassroots power has always been the core of this campaign. And with a newly drawn, tougher district, that support matters more than ever.
We can win this race. But only if we build our campaign now — not next year, not when the attacks start, but right now.
**[If you’ve been waiting for the right moment to give, this is it. Chip in before November 30 and help us meet our $5,000 goal.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120301732/585842085/789508428?refcode=251130_RG_eom&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYWU2ZGZmMi0zNGNlLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L5YNyHvBwoP5sJu8XsAlx8ZZc92EUkolr60pU8PyFC8=)**
Thank you for being in this fight with me — especially when the stakes are this high.
Robert Garcia

True leadership emerges in the heat of battle
| | | | [](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=a006576e54404f309f96f36ec51823a0&_e=sgxp-R3aKecRPy5taM-J0-aC32wNPoZrGymY_kMM2ZYACKGbT1h7hpR973jZyec9C3L9OP8lIU2t7iwyOKzXISQ6UMFJbVKx-VyNoLeyHQV0ki-Su19pSYRNCgjeOIQdWPw7QaIiWGb0h7Jtpkq3m6YTLEVHLzwIQXMxVfKmP4HBawfS80sgYUAIphyHKFhVPGim985pCTKtQESx3uTC6Qk2dqVfoKX0mHD6e0VzHBsn2k6okGNsFgRRAPUvJXiQKOjfikP0CDW4LegWGFiEz2a39U96e0bi347BC-r9wpnasgU8qcFvVy46AP8WFFH2eenh-lbmNkp17OoOZXYVU15U94BZjZdW_Dk3cl6zfPCDeJmMEnH3vKZLlJJgcrT97Cmt9dni1QJdqZwZ3dvsNi1zYFErXaSNwszjlw1OeWhqXBACoD1IkOegAuVPOMCLbdVEm_2Fd4fAsHxwgk_uJ05XlX316fKGNE9ylx2Aiu1yT5AUcldb5dB9miZqz2sF5BIIfd2EnxKf-9YSBAPDJg%3D%3D)
---
|

Hey Peter, Matt Van Epps here.

You probably don’t know me yet. No worries, it's okay.

**What matters is the motto I lived by in the 160th Special Operations Aviation Regiment:_Night Stalkers Don’t Quit._**

We fly low and fast in the black of night so the best shooters on the planet can do their job. Over the course of nine combat tours, including deployments in Afghanistan and Iraq, I piloted the Apache attack helicopter, and then MH-47 Chinooks.

What I learned was this: **true leadership emerges in the heat of battle.** Decisions must be made to save lives and complete the mission – _no matter the odds._

**Right now, I have a new mission. The stakes are very different, but the future of the nation hangs in the balance.**

**On December 2nd, the House Special Election in TN-07 decides whether the Trump agenda moves forward, or is put on life support. House Republicans are barely clinging to their majority, and it's my job to hold the line. If we fail, things will get real ugly, real fast.[_Will you rush in a donation now?_](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=a006576e54404f309f96f36ec51823a0&_e=sgxp-R3aKecRPy5taM-J0-aC32wNPoZrGymY_kMM2ZYACKGbT1h7hpR973jZyec9C3L9OP8lIU2t7iwyOKzXISQ6UMFJbVKx-VyNoLeyHQV0ki-Su19pSYRNCgjeOIQdWPw7QaIiWGb0h7Jtpkq3m5nnfUOztnd3QRLGFxHvWBE-hKjWhv06zKMr3qfaVo78XDT5glgITqsN7oFmVH2fQcV-3QerAfkRH42FytY_YCfzm5imkkVKkMrA2etaWtnXuJ6RpH0l0UuAFVfOdXRSCvrKFM4ZSmfYDFoVdmy_ZBsIpmUrMZbVRUAsUCuPcjYNI5SB8njt4bbvaEHTFT4qbdqjW_Q5l1OuOpDv1_1NmNgTnQLqmDrbWj4GIMbkqqI00cai9rPSsPh6mBtSN-Bq7m05z4C8DOBzNmaWMnRQc4qkFmn_lf6r8mA_bnXyDawzH4sBFAWhOwcx55MpkyMvnShXTmSJFSoUS_cIAb3_SLkgUWzjvVObWVoWWZ8_PhUbnAnew9aiPlI2wE1SE-VC8g%3D%3D)**
|
---
[PITCH IN ASAP](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=a006576e54404f309f96f36ec51823a0&_e=sgxp-R3aKecRPy5taM-J0-aC32wNPoZrGymY_kMM2ZYACKGbT1h7hpR973jZyec9C3L9OP8lIU2t7iwyOKzXISQ6UMFJbVKx-VyNoLeyHQV0ki-Su19pSYRNCgjeOIQdWPw7QaIiWGb0h7Jtpkq3mw2o-U5DuqXDTTsmv3wLoBGcG-a9TVj3uKhB85jhZk93y4Yuqnt-R8fXul4UexoPKyxISh2KMnb-hCUXETeGEm2grvaojAgUAE__MTYt7iYBWOlHwcEJCC2elpmpnE7BqRA-H_zyFPLx822bV00Rs5vydIgnjqSFlaY2WiePW8R-ytO71EVn2ZqN91oG-vj0KQSn2PzTcCouIjkSCjc1cRpjLekB1JlZlujbqplCB0VTtRGqo8rjSKDTtZGNA5cS6RcL4CLfY1V1w2vuTId7onvqvRgDoB1YKahdZHOG4X3r7JwdIGu2b_0IenXNBMA-vNi9Jp7uIFyQZsBDk98L6KZ8ExvymFD4bPa49F6L5iSA9Ukuk3royzVAVau_AgxTdg%3D%3D)
|
---
The Democrats are all-in on a radical who's campaigning alongside **Jasmine Crockett** , was previously **endorsed by the Democratic Socialists of America** , and brags and laughs hysterically on video about her personal **bullying of ICE agents and law enforcement.** She's already being called "_**the AOC of Tennessee**_ " and is gunning to be the **newest member of "The Squad."** _No thank you._

**I didn’t raise my right hand at West Point in 2001 as a member of the "Class of 9/11" and serve nine combat tours so America Last politicians could open our borders, fund endless wars, and crush the middle class under the weight of Big Government.**

**President Trump offered me his Complete and Total Endorsement, telling the people of my district: “Matt Van Epps is a WARRIOR who will never let you down.”**

_I’m running to prove him right._

Remember – this is not just some race. Next year, every single member of Congress will be running. **This race, right now, is the firewall._And it's the only game in town._**

**[I’m not asking for much – just your endorsement and whatever you can pitch in right now. $5 keeps a door-knocker on the street. $25 fuels a mail piece. $100 runs digital ads that could flip undecideds.](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=a006576e54404f309f96f36ec51823a0&_e=sgxp-R3aKecRPy5taM-J0-aC32wNPoZrGymY_kMM2ZYACKGbT1h7hpR973jZyec9C3L9OP8lIU2t7iwyOKzXISQ6UMFJbVKx-VyNoLeyHQV0ki-Su19pSYRNCgjeOIQdWPw7QaIiWGb0h7Jtpkq3m6Vhq1cQdGeRmOf3nCdJWy5-1SZF7lBHwsWf5ukbX7l5im_YP8QaZe0gAbH_nmIcHbTgG-3z1oWueZvUfdhTg1Fbezga8EAyFI8yaWWPlk3YhCcjcUNjkeq2xgXyqQgIZ1hvvwrD4qG2wn6cxf61zlbNlgRx0l3sv3qHQh0EjLnrpizmSTC1Sqg-1873eR15SUnvN474gnBV2HEIe1U8s325DkSsIiwm5VGYEQiRt_FUnXcY61rhvLek-2i_BLPJU0q00DSMbRUcqXPUtjGu0VNQk6dM8aksgRMWBPonmoK6Uab1ZvTwaZzdD5hsIAXw2UoZY2NKF68hRWVOVQSCf3vvibnJeFkBL-gCwexar622dHP1r1XqDpj4yQAtjf09IA%3D%3D)**

_**Night Stalkers Don’t Quit.**_

**But I can’t hold this line alone. Lock in with me before December 2nd comes and goes. Let’s bring the thunder one more time.**

Thank you for your commitment.
Sincerely,
Matt Van Epps

name: Wes Moore
subject: Can’t continue
body:
# [](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/8?t=1&akid=998%2E1086043%2EtCidJp)
Hi Peter,
Having this team on my side gives me the strength I need to say this: **I won’t back down.**
Not when Donald Trump comes for Maryland, not when Congress threatens people’s livelihoods and health care, and not when Republicans try to defeat us in 2026. I’ll hold the line for workers, protect our rights, fight for our communities, and leave no one behind.
**But I can’t continue without you.**
**[Your contributions power everything we do. It’s how we beat the odds in 2022, and it’s how I know we’ll win this race. Can you chip in today?](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251130-2.IEWdho&refcode=em-20251130-2&t=2&akid=998%2E1086043%2EtCidJp)**
**[Donate $5 ››](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251130-2.IEWdho&amount=5&refcode=em-20251130-2&t=21&akid=998%2E1086043%2EtCidJp)**
We’re building a movement together. It’s powered by people who believe we need leaders who won’t bow down to bullies.
I would be so grateful if you made your very first contribution to our campaign today, Peter. It will go directly toward powering our work.
**[So if you’re with me and believe in our mission, make a contribution before our end-of-month deadline tonight.](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251130-2.IEWdho&refcode=em-20251130-2&t=22&akid=998%2E1086043%2EtCidJp)**
Thank you for being with us, and I’m grateful you read these messages, Peter.
Elevate,
Wes
[](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251130-2.IEWdho&refcode=em-20251130-2&t=23&akid=998%2E1086043%2EtCidJp)

* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-footer?refcode=em-20251130-2&t=24&refcode2=998_1086043_tCidJp&akid=998%2E1086043%2EtCidJp)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=25&akid=998%2E1086043%2EtCidJp)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.wesmoore.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=998%2E1086043%2EtCidJp)

Email us: [info@wesmoore.com](mailto:info@wesmoore.com)
BY AUTHORITY: WES MOORE FOR MARYLAND, MARY TYDINGS, TREASURER

name: Bailey the campaign dog
subject: big sigh
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
Instead of howling about it, I thought I’d reach out and see if you could help.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=1500%2E49239%2EYSDhtD)
| | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/9564?t=2&akid=1500%2E49239%2EYSDhtD)
---
[](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/9544?t=3&akid=1500%2E49239%2EYSDhtD)
Hey null, it’s Bailey, Team Stevens’ campaign pup!
I hope you had a good Thanksgiving. I _definitely_ did, thanks to all the turkey scraps I found in the kitchen and that the humans sneakily fed me under the table. 😈
But now, we’re back to work. _Big sigh._
If I look a bit concerned in my picture, it’s not JUST because my mom keeps breaking my treats in half 🙄 – it’s also this: **Today is the last day of the month, and we’re falling short of our important fundraising goal.**
Instead of howling about it, I thought I’d reach out and see if you could help. We have to win in Michigan to flip the Senate – and all eyes (and ears) are on us.
**[I hate to beg, but I have to: Will you throw me a bone and chip in $5 to our campaign before the midnight deadline?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/9872?t=4&akid=1500%2E49239%2EYSDhtD)**
| | [Donate Now](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/9544?t=5&akid=1500%2E49239%2EYSDhtD)
---
When my mom is less stressed, I’m less stressed (and also get more belly rubs). So this is a top priority. Thank you in advance for your attention to this critical matter. ♥️
Bailey 🐾
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/9873?t=6&akid=1500%2E49239%2EYSDhtD) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/9564?t=7&akid=1500%2E49239%2EYSDhtD)
---
You can also text “JOIN” to 80242 to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive, real-time updates from my campaign.
Thank you,
Haley
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=8&akid=1500%2E49239%2EYSDhtD)
Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate.
33717 Woodward Ave #539
Birmingham, MI 48009

Friend,

I hope you’ve had a joyful Thanksgiving holiday with your friends and family. It’s hard to believe, but with the upcoming holiday season comes one of our last opportunities to prepare for the midterm election year.

And I’ll be upfront: My finance director tells me we need a surge of grassroots donations to meet tomorrow’s end-of-month goal.

**[Asking my supporters like you to chip in their hard-earned money toward my campaign is my least favorite part of this job -- but with the stakes sky-high, it’s critical. Will you chip in $3, then let me explain why we can’t miss the mark?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120302596/585844608/-2063340125?refcode=em-11.30.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYzhhNDBmMy0zN2NlLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M8umQqqKArvdgvCpgQ4N-bHX3ZwR_eeZD95jBb9ekto=)**
| **[Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120302599/585844610/-2063340125?refcode=em-11.30.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYzhhNDBmMy0zN2NlLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M8umQqqKArvdgvCpgQ4N-bHX3ZwR_eeZD95jBb9ekto=)**
---

I’m up against multiple GOP challengers in this race who want to keep to the status quo. That’s unacceptable for the working families who are hurting, and it’s why we must build our voter outreach efforts to protect this seat.

**The path to House control runs through critical seats like mine. I take my commitment to working families seriously, and the best way to push back against the lack of support from the GOP is by flipping the majority.**

Affordable healthcare, the rising cost of living, the way of life for our local farmers, and much more depends on it.

**[So before tonight’s fundraising deadline, I need your support to prepare for the midterm election year and the battles in my race to come. Will you chip in $3 or any amount you’re comfortable with right now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120302601/585844612/-2063340125?refcode=em-11.30.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYzhhNDBmMy0zN2NlLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M8umQqqKArvdgvCpgQ4N-bHX3ZwR_eeZD95jBb9ekto=)**

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: Sorry about this email
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
I hope you know that I never take your support for granted.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120303159/585845942/1734447991?amount=5&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.11.30_Youre-Not-ATM_B1_F1_S1_C1_90OP_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyY2M2MGE1Zi0zOGNlLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PjbaEsktXpzJjcJMUTkXSp-8Jmd--GEWMXjc34tD0ME=) Folks, I want to be completely transparent.

I don’t like reaching out just to ask you for money, especially when folks’ budgets are as tight as they are now. **You’re not an ATM — I hope you know that I never take your support for granted.**

When I _do_ ask, it’s because we are up against a real, urgent deadline — and tonight is one of those moments.

Republicans are already pouring millions into key Senate races to protect their majority. They’re counting on corporate PACs and billionaire donors to keep control of the Senate, push Trump’s billionaire-first agenda even further, and block the progress we’re fighting for.

Our team doesn’t have that kind of money.

We’re depending on grassroots power to support battleground races across the country and take back our majority. I know you’re busy. I wouldn’t ask you to help out if it wasn’t absolutely necessary.

* Build an organizing operation across New Hampshire to elect Chris Pappas

clean_body: I hope you know that I never take your support for granted. = Folks, I want to be completely transparent. I don’t like reaching out just to ask you for money, especially when folks’ budgets are as tight as they are now. You’re not an ATM — I hope you know that I never take your support for granted. When I do ask, it’s because we are up against a real, urgent deadline — and tonight is one of those moments. Republicans are already pouring millions into key Senate races to protect their majority. They’re counting on corporate PACs and billionaire donors to keep control of the Senate, push Trump’s billionaire-first agenda even further, and block the progress we’re fighting for. name: Elise Stefanik
subject: It’s Time To Save New York
body:
I’m running for governor to make New York affordable and safe again

| | | | [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/byE9/?__vbtrk=MzM2MTk4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzM2MTk4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
Friend, it’s time to Save New York!
Since I launched my campaign earlier this month I have been crisscrossing the Empire State from Buffalo to Long Island and from NYC to the beautiful North Country I call home. In every coroner of this great state New Yorkers have made one thing clear; **they are ready for new leadership!**
For almost two decades New York has suffered the consequences of nearly unchecked single party Democrat control and the results have been disastrous. Thanks to failed Democrat policies **New York has become one of the most**** _unaffordable_****and**** _unsafe_****states in the nation.**
We need a leader now to fight to restore New York more than ever but unfortunately we are currently led by accidental Governor Kathy Hochul, the WORST governor in America.
Despite an affordability crisis in NY, Governor Hochul is **RAISING TAXES** on hard-working families and supporting policies that are surging the cost of rent, utilities, and groceries just as the state is recovering from the pandemic lockdowns.
In the face of a crime wave from violent illegals along with a mental health crisis **she cemented New York as a sanctuary state and embraced failed bail reform.**
And when New Yorkers looked to her for leadership to be a check on the Radical Leftists taking over her party **she bent the knee to Zohran Mamdani and helped him be elected mayor of our nation’s largest city!**

[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/byE9/?__vbtrk=MzM2MTk4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzM2MTk4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
_Governor Hochul at a rally in Queens for Zohran Mamdani’s mayoral campaign where she responded to chants of “TAX THE RICH!” with “I hear you!”_

[SAVE NEW YORK](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/byE9/?__vbtrk=MzM2MTk4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzM2MTk4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
Zohran Mamdani is a communist who wants to defund the police and raise taxes on “whiter” neighborhoods to pay for his socialist projects. That is who Kathy Hochul just helped get elected Mayor of NYC.
Enough is enough!
I will not stand by as Kathy Hochul and Zohran Mamdani team up to send the Empire State into freefall.
**_[I am running for governor to SAVE NEW YORK from Hochul and Mamdani](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/byE9/?__vbtrk=MzM2MTk4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzM2MTk4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_****!**
As the strongest voice for America First values in the state, I have fought hard to deliver the largest middle-class tax cut in New York’s history and pass legislation that lays the groundwork to undo cashless bail for violent criminals and make our nation safer.
And with your help I plan to FIRE KATHY HOCHUL next year!

[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/byE9/?__vbtrk=MzM2MTk4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzM2MTk4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
[FIRE KATHY HOCHUL](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/byE9/?__vbtrk=MzM2MTk4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzM2MTk4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
I know that we can win this race by assembling a broad coalition of common sense patriots.

In 2022, Lee Zeldin came within six points of becoming the governor of New York.

In 2024, New York swung more towards President Trump and the Republican Party than any other state in the Union.

And now just a few weeks into our race I am already neck and neck with Kathy Hochul with the most recent polling showing that independents are leaning towards voting Republican and revealing that **New York is now a TOSS-UP!**

[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/byE9/?__vbtrk=MzM2MTk4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzM2MTk4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)

I need all the support I can get to make sure that we have the resources needed to turn out our voters and hold the line across the state.**__**
**__**
**_[So please, if you can, make a contribution today to help me make New York affordable and safe again](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/byE9/?__vbtrk=MzM2MTk4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzM2MTk4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_****.******
****I am humbled by the number of personal endorsements that I have already received and the outpouring of support so far from Americans across the county like you who remain committed to restoring our nation.

**Let’s SAVE NEW YORK!**

clean_body: I’m running for governor to make New York affordable and safe again | | | | Friend, it’s time to Save New York! Since I launched my campaign earlier this month I have been crisscrossing the Empire State from Buffalo to Long Island and from NYC to the beautiful North Country I call home. In every coroner of this great state New Yorkers have made one thing clear; they are ready for new leadership! For almost two decades New York has suffered the consequences of nearly unchecked single party Democrat control and the results have been disastrous. Thanks to failed Democrat policies New York has become one of the most unaffordableand unsafestates in the nation. We need a leader now to fight to restore New York more than ever but unfortunately we are currently led by accidental Governor Kathy Hochul, the WORST governor in America. Despite an affordability crisis in NY, Governor Hochul is RAISING TAXES on hard-working families and supporting policies that are surging the cost of rent, utilities, and groceries just as the state is recovering from the pandemic lockdowns. In the face of a crime wave from violent illegals along with a mental health crisis she cemented New York as a sanctuary state and embraced failed bail reform. And when New Yorkers looked to her for leadership to be a check on the Radical Leftists taking over her party she bent the knee to Zohran Mamdani and helped him be elected mayor of our nation’s largest city! Governor Hochul at a rally in Queens for Zohran Mamdani’s mayoral campaign where she responded to chants of “TAX THE RICH!” with “I hear you!” Zohran Mamdani is a communist who wants to defund the police and raise taxes on “whiter” neighborhoods to pay for his socialist projects. That is who Kathy Hochul just helped get elected Mayor of NYC. Enough is enough! I will not stand by as Kathy Hochul and Zohran Mamdani team up to send the Empire State into freefall. ! As the strongest voice for America First values in the state, I have fought hard to deliver the largest middle-class tax cut in New York’s history and pass legislation that lays the groundwork to undo cashless bail for violent criminals and make our nation safer. And with your help I plan to FIRE KATHY HOCHUL next year! I know that we can win this race by assembling a broad coalition of common sense patriots. In 2022, Lee Zeldin came within six points of becoming the governor of New York. In 2024, New York swung more towards President Trump and the Republican Party than any other state in the Union. And now just a few weeks into our race I am already neck and neck with Kathy Hochul with the most recent polling showing that independents are leaning towards voting Republican and revealing that New York is now a TOSS-UP! J.L Partners poll conducted in November showing that the NY gubernatorial race is currently within the margin of error. Patriot, it is crucial now that we continue to fight and keep up our current momentum. As the gap continues to close Democrats across the country are increasingly being called upon to save Hochul in order to keep the state blue. I need all the support I can get to make sure that we have the resources needed to turn out our voters and hold the line across the state. .** I am humbled by the number of personal endorsements that I have already received and the outpouring of support so far from Americans across the county like you who remain committed to restoring our nation. Thank you in advance for your time and continued support. Let’s SAVE NEW YORK! Your fellow patriot, Elise Stefanik** Proud New Yorker | | | | | | | | | | _ | 215 N Payne Street, Alexandria, VA 22314

In the last couple of weeks, we've seen Trump and his extremist allies hit the panic button. Trump himself has called for violence against his political foes.
Despite their triple majority (the House, Senate, and the White House!), national Republicans are doing everything they can to blame the state of the country on Democrats.
**_They're also funneling millions into campaigns to protect their power across the country._**
This is why this deadline is extra important. **We cannot show any sign of weakness today or in the coming weeks.** My team and I are powered by grassroots supporters like you, Peter, not through sketchy billionaires like Elon Musk.

clean_body: Austin Davis is helping continue the progress we've made for Pennsylvanians by ensuring we keep Pennsylvania blue up and down the ballot. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Sorry to reach out on Sunday, Peter, but today is super important to our campaign. It's Austin Davis, and at midnight, my team closes the books on our final deadline before the quarter ends next month. That means that after tonight, there is only one month left before we have to report our numbers for the year. = | | = In the last couple of weeks, we've seen Trump and his extremist allies hit the panic button. Trump himself has called for violence against his political foes. Despite their triple majority (the House, Senate, and the White House!), national Republicans are doing everything they can to blame the state of the country on Democrats. They're also funneling millions into campaigns to protect their power across the country. This is why this deadline is extra important. We cannot show any sign of weakness today or in the coming weeks. My team and I are powered by grassroots supporters like you, Peter, not through sketchy billionaires like Elon Musk. In my time as Lt. Gov., we've been able to accomplish real positive change, like lowering violent crime and gun violence rates throughout the Commonwealth. We've made positive economic change through funding for mass transit, increased protections for labor workers, investing in small businesses, and more. I can't wait to keep fighting for the Commonwealth, but to do that, I need your help. = **If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | **=** | **=** | **=** | **=** | **=** | **=** From the team and me, thank you so much for your support! —Austin Davis | | | ---|---|--- | get involved to support austin davis for PA Lieutenant Governor While serving as Lieutenant Governor, Austin Davis helped advance some of the most progressive changes the Commonwealth has seen in decades. Now, he's helping continue the progress we've made for Pennsylvanians by ensuring we keep Pennsylvania blue up and down the ballot. | [](https://substack.com/redirect/b4dbad06-20b9-4b6b-9fa6-f534f06a4154?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/b4dbad06-20b9-4b6b-9fa6-f534f06a4154?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* * *
##### **Cliff 's Note:** Politics isn't just policy -- it's the lives we live and the stories that shape us. That's why we're launching **BAM Culture** , a new section digging into where culture and politics collide. _**As we head toward 2026, understanding that intersection is mission-critical.**_
##### If you believe independent media matters, subscribe and help us build the movement that's going to help save this country.
##### --Cliff
* * *
_**By Dana DuBois**_
"I don't think I'll ever live to see 70," my dad sighed, turning toward me as he paused at the traffic light.
My dad had me in his mid-20s, right about the age I was when we had this conversation. My brain was barely on the cusp of adulthood. Too young to know how to respond. Too young to be handed that kind of emotional weight. The light turned green and he turned his focus back to the road, and away from me, thankfully.
Blue Amp Media is a reader-supported publication; please consider becoming a free or paid subscriber.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.IMSlGvu65pxPX4G58Mvl-J2RggN1UJTxddBgbp9sDjw?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=180292367)
I had no idea what to say.
Because honestly? I didn't disagree with him. By his early fifties, he'd already had five -- yes, _five_ -- angioplasties. His mother, my namesake, died of a heart attack at 50. And he had the whole cardiac-risk vibe going for him: overweight, barrel-chested, subsisting on a terrible diet, and fueled by Type-A rage.
It didn't bode well for longevity.
But looking back now, decades later, I'm struck by the lack of boundaries in that moment. Why tell your twenty-something daughter you're pretty sure you won't make it? I didn't have the emotional capacity then.
He didn't have the emotional tools, ever.
I still don't have an answer to those questions. But I believe he wasn't so much hoping for a wise reply from me as he was reckoning with himself, with an audience. Perhaps he feared dying young.
Or maybe he feared what would happen if he didn't.
* * *
Spoiler: he didn't die young.
I'm now older than he was when he said it.
But he's still here -- more or less.
I can't say that my dad is _happy_ now. But I'm not sure he ever aimed for happiness. He was more invested in verbally dominating anyone who inconvenienced him and watching sports he could bet on.
We've never been close. His anger was a consistent presence in my childhood, and emotional availability wasn't part of the repertoire. Losing him early would _not_ have been devastating. Perhaps that's why I froze in the car when he mentioned his likely early demise.
But he did make it to 70. Against his own odds.
* * *
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/b4dbad06-20b9-4b6b-9fa6-f534f06a4154?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* * *
For his 70th, he wanted a family trip -- me, my brother, our kids. So we met in San Diego at a resort he and his wife loved. I braced myself but showed up. He'd earned that much by simply making it to 70.
My girls were six and four. He was elated to see them; they didn't know what to make of him. It took only minutes for him to drop one of his legendary inappropriate comments, and it was a doozy. "When you're older, will you share your boyfriends with Annika?" he asked my eldest.
The kids stared, stunned. I intervened, gently but firmly. And I spent the entire trip ensuring he was never alone with either of them.
Later, on his birthday dinner outing, he was unable to parallel park his giant rental car -- something he'd never done much living in Florida. His wife shrieked from the backseat, "You're doing it wrong!" He yelled back, telling her to _shut up_. Annika covered her ears and cowered, horrified.
My kids are Pacific Northwest children -- raised on passive-aggressive conflict, not screaming.
"I'll do it," I told him gently, referencing my Seattle-parallel-parking credentials. He didn't want to give up the wheel -- driving was always a man's job -- but we had a reservation to make, and he's nothing if not food-motivated.
Once everyone was out of the car and on the curb, I backed it in with ease.
"This is how they are," I told the girls later. "Not happy, but not unhappy. Just... fine. Thankfully, they live far away. Can we get through this for a couple more days?"
They nodded, absorbing -- for the first time -- how other childhoods existed.
And this is how he made it to 70: fraying a bit at the edges, but still essentially himself.
* * *
My dad lives in a memory care unit now, since his wife died three years ago. Moving him there in the days following her funeral was [agonizing](https://substack.com/redirect/0977eef8-79b6-4f7b-894b-5a6b9ba00f3a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). But now? It's his normal. He's the star bingo player. He answers all the "On This Day in History" questions during morning trivia. He plays balloon volleyball.
He beams during pet therapy visits.
He likes the food in the cafeteria. He's somehow managed to gain quite a bit of weight in spite of the portion restrictions. We suspect he's convinced the staff to bring seconds... or thirds.
Sometimes he colors. On my last visit, he proudly held up a page with a crab and a wave. "It's good, isn't it?"
"It sure is, Dad."
It's strange to see him like this, the tyrant of my youth now a docile old man with crayons. I can see he's doing okay.
Not thriving, but fine.
Not happy, but content enough.
But I can also see the man he was. And that man would rather have died than live like this.
* * *
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/b4dbad06-20b9-4b6b-9fa6-f534f06a4154?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/b4dbad06-20b9-4b6b-9fa6-f534f06a4154?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
My dad, showing off his drawing. Photo by author.
* * *
I called my dad for his 81st birthday.
He can't use his iPhone independently, so I have to call the nurses' desk for someone to hand him the phone.
"I miss my mom and dad so much," he told me.
This was new. He'd never talked like this in his fully cognitive life, nor in the early years of dementia.
"Tell me about that," I said.
"Well, the people here, their parents come to visit them. And I'm here all alone."
He knows who I am. He knows I'm his daughter. But he rounds everything -- need, loneliness, longing -- down to the simplest form of love he can name: parents.
He wants his mother. He wants his daughter. He wants someone who feels like home.
I don't correct him. That feels cruel now.
"Well, one of these days soon I will get down there again."
"Good," he replied. "Because I'm 81 years old now. I don't know how much longer I'll be here."
I think, _I 've heard you say that before._
And here you still are.
* * *
BAM Culture examines the intersection of politics and culture. Subscribe for free for more.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.IMSlGvu65pxPX4G58Mvl-J2RggN1UJTxddBgbp9sDjw?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=180292367)
* * *
As hard as dementia is, it's been a strange mercy.
Dementia stripped away my dad's anger. It pulled back his defensiveness. It revealed the vulnerable little boy who never really learned how to father anyone, including himself.
It doesn't justify what he was like when I was growing up.
But it does contextualize it.
In losing pieces of himself, he's gained something gentler. And I've gained access to a part of him that never existed for me before.
Does he feel the healing too? Does he sense how much lighter his relationships are without rage running the show?
I hope so.
If not dawning peace, then what is the point of his limited, liminal final stage of life?
* * *
So happy birthday, Dad.
Eighty-one is legitimately old age. You've made it, against all the odds, including your own.
I hope you're finding some peace in your here and now -- your own dementia-fueled reckoning with the life you ended up living, instead of the one you imagined.
You thought you'd die young. Instead, you lived long enough to become someone I can finally meet with compassion.
And here you still are.
I'm grateful for these final strange, blurry years you never thought you'd have.
I hope you are too.
* * *
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/b4dbad06-20b9-4b6b-9fa6-f534f06a4154?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
My dad, the birthday boy. Photo by author.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/b4dbad06-20b9-4b6b-9fa6-f534f06a4154?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
